LanguageData.VFE_AnimalSarcophagus.description: An ornamented burial receptacle for the honored dead animals.
LanguageData.VFE_AnimalSarcophagus.label: animal sarcophagus
LanguageData.Bed_Simple.description: A somewhat comfy net and pillow rested on a sturdy frame.
LanguageData.Bed_Simple.label: simple bed
LanguageData.Bed_StoneSlab.description: A large slab of smoothed stone, very uncomfortable and only marginally better than sleeping on the floor.
LanguageData.Bed_StoneSlab.label: slab bed
LanguageData.Seat_Bench.description: A simple long platform on which multiple people may sit at the same time, not very comfortable but much better than nothing. Can be used at tables, work stations, and elsewhere.
LanguageData.Seat_Bench.label: bench
LanguageData.Seat_Cushion.description: A simple cushion for sitting on, popular amongst the tribes. Can be used at tables, work stations, and elsewhere.
LanguageData.Seat_Cushion.label: sitting cushion
LanguageData.Seat_SquareChair.description: A comfortable and attractive chair not specifically used for dining. Can be used at tables, work stations, and elsewhere.
LanguageData.Seat_SquareChair.label: square chair
LanguageData.Table_1x1c.label: table (1x1)
LanguageData.Table_Counter.description: A smooth, waist high surface for eating off of, commonly found in kitchens and bars.
LanguageData.Table_Counter.label: countertop
LanguageData.Stone_Campfire.description: Cooks meals but produces less heat but more light, burns out slower than the standard campfire. As with all heat sources, it must be placed indoors so it has a closed space to heat. Refuelable.
LanguageData.Stone_Campfire.label: stone campfire
LanguageData.Table_LightEndTable.description: A small bedside table that has been adorned with a light, making nearby beds more comfortable. Must be placed directly adjacent to the head of the bed. Placing more than one end table near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.Table_LightEndTable.label: lamp end table
LanguageData.Stone_DarklightCampfire.description: A specially-treated firepit that produces a dim light over a large area. People who prefer darklight work best with this light source. Cooks meals and produces heat, but burns wood in the process. As with all heat sources, it must be placed indoors so it has a closed space to heat. Refuelable.
LanguageData.Stone_DarklightCampfire.label: dark firepit
LanguageData.Joy_Arcade.description: A tall cabinet that holds a small cathode ray display and control panel for playing a variety of pre-installed games.
LanguageData.Joy_Arcade.label: arcade machine
LanguageData.Joy_DartsBoard.description: A popular game among rimworlds involving throwing darts at a circular target, It's relaxing, and trains shooting skills at a higher rate than horseshoes or hoopstone.
LanguageData.Joy_DartsBoard.label: darts board
LanguageData.Joy_InudstrialComputer.description: A desktop computer based off an old design, very inefficient and prone to crashing. Gives a minor boost to learning after use.
LanguageData.Joy_InudstrialComputer.label: old computer
LanguageData.Joy_ModernComputer.description: A high tech computer with utilising an LCD monitor and better performance parts that are less prone to crashing. Gives a boost to learning after use.
LanguageData.Joy_ModernComputer.label: modern computer
LanguageData.Joy_Piano.description: A large playable piano for practising on, quite enjoyable and it is a great way to develop artistic talent.
LanguageData.Joy_Piano.label: piano
LanguageData.Joy_PunchingBag.description: A fabric filled punching bag to let out anger on. Can be quite calming and helps to train melee ability.
LanguageData.Joy_PunchingBag.label: punching bag
LanguageData.Joy_RouletteTable.description: A soft-topped bounded table with a wheel for playing roulette, a good way to train your social skills and luck.
LanguageData.Joy_RouletteTable.label: roulette table
LanguageData.Radio_Industrial.description: An old device from a bygone era, it is able to pick up radio waves and play them back. Even on the rimworlds, there is often an old transmitter or lone radio station broadcasting something.
LanguageData.Radio_Industrial.label: industrial radio
LanguageData.Radio_Spacer.description: A high tech radio reciever that is able to pick up very faint signals and play them back at crystal clear quality.
LanguageData.Radio_Spacer.label: longwave radio
LanguageData.Bin_Large.description: A large bin to help keeping the area around it clean. Slowly removes trash and filth in a 20 Cell radius.
LanguageData.Bin_Large.label: large bin
LanguageData.Bin_Small.description: A small bin to help keeping the area around it somewhat clean. Slowly removes trash and filth in a 10 Cell radius.
LanguageData.Bin_Small.label: small bin
LanguageData.Light_Streetlamp.description: A tall electrical lamp that lights an area, able to be placed outside without catching fire, making it ideal for road lighting and only turns on at night.
LanguageData.Light_Streetlamp.label: outdoor lamp
LanguageData.Misc_FileCabinet.description: A piece of furniture used for organising documents and records in paper form. It will help you perform research taks faster.
LanguageData.Misc_FileCabinet.label: file cabinet
LanguageData.Shelf_1x1c.description: A small shelf for storing miscellaneous items. Items stored in this will not deteriorate, even if outside.
LanguageData.Shelf_1x1c.label: shelf (1x1)
LanguageData.Shelf_WeaponRack.description: A heavy duty rack for storing weaponry. Weapons stored in this will not deteriorate, even if outside.
LanguageData.Shelf_WeaponRack.label: weapon rack
LanguageData.Bed_DoubleErgonomic.description: An ergonomically designed double-wide bed to help support the spine, distribute body weight and overall enchance sleep quality. Fits two.
LanguageData.Bed_DoubleErgonomic.label: ergonomic double bed
LanguageData.Bed_Ergonomic.description: An ergonomically designed bed to help support the spine, distribute body weight and overall enchance sleep quality.
LanguageData.Bed_Ergonomic.label: ergonomic bed
LanguageData.Light_ModernLamp.description: A power saving lamp that more effectively converts electricity to light, useful for lighting rooms. Will short circuit in rain.
LanguageData.Light_ModernLamp.label: modern lamp
LanguageData.Seat_ModernChair.description: A flexible ergonomic chair designed to fit the curves of the human body, improving comfort.
LanguageData.Seat_ModernChair.label: ergonomic chair
LanguageData.Table_Wardrobe.description: A tall wardrobe for storing clothing and other items. Gives a small sleep effectiveness bonus to all nearby beds. Placing more than one wardrobe near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.Table_Wardrobe.label: wardrobe
LanguageData.VFE_ModularCouch.description: A compact, cushioned seat designed to be combined with others to create larger couches or corner seating arrangements. Ideal for large rec rooms, lounges, or social areas.
LanguageData.VFE_ModularCouch.label: modular couch
LanguageData.Bed_Kingsize.description: A bed fit for a king, flush with gold-inlaid posters and a high head rest. Extremely comfortable and beautiful, it is a true luxury. Fits two.
LanguageData.Bed_Kingsize.label: royal poster bed
LanguageData.Seat_RoyalArmchair.description: A grand, exquisitely crafted armchair with deep cushions, fine upholstery, and ornate detailing. Can be used at tables, work stations, and elsewhere.
LanguageData.Seat_RoyalArmchair.label: royal armchair
LanguageData.Seat_RoyalChair.description: A luxurious, high-backed dining chair adorned with fine upholstery and intricate craftsmanship. Can be used at tables, work stations, and elsewhere.
LanguageData.Seat_RoyalChair.label: royal chair
LanguageData.Table_Royal1x1c.label: royal table (1x1)
LanguageData.Table_Royal1x2c.label: royal table (1x2)
LanguageData.Table_Royal2x2c.label: royal table (2x2)
LanguageData.Table_Royal2x4c.label: royal table (2x4)
LanguageData.Table_Royal3x3c.label: royal table (3x3)
LanguageData.Table_RoyalDresser.description: A luxurious dresser, adorned with solid gold and elegant in design, making nearby beds more comfortable.Placing more than one end table near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.Table_RoyalDresser.label: royal dresser
LanguageData.Table_RoyalEndTable.description: A small bedside table that has been adorned with luxury gold fittings, making nearby beds more comfortable. Must be placed directly adjacent to the head of the bed. Placing more than one end table near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.Table_RoyalEndTable.label: royal end table
LanguageData.AirConditioningUnit.description: An air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Exhaust cool air without forcing warm air onto another room. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer.
LanguageData.AirConditioningUnit.label: air conditioning unit
LanguageData.Bed_CryptoBed.description: A medical that uses partial cryptosleep to slow down the degredation of wounds and help the body heal, although with the same side effects of cryptosleep, albeit at a lesser severity.
LanguageData.Bed_CryptoBed.label: cryptosleep suspender
LanguageData.Bed_OperatingTable.description: A crude table cluttered with instruments that supposedly make surgery easier, the cleanliness of the table is questionable though. Slightly improves medical outcomes over normal beds.
LanguageData.Bed_OperatingTable.label: operating table
LanguageData.Facility_IVDrip.description: An intravenous drip stand for quickly delivering lost fluids to a patient, helping the immune system and blood loss recovery when placed directly adjacent to a hospital bed or surgical table. Only works for hospital beds or surgical tables - normal beds will not benefit. Attaching more than one stand to the same bed will have no effect.
LanguageData.Facility_IVDrip.label: intravenous drip stand
LanguageData.Facility_ResearchCounter.description: A waist high sterilised surface for performing sensitive research on. Gives a small boost to nearby research benches as well as helping to keep the area clean. Stacks up to 20 times.
LanguageData.Facility_ResearchCounter.label: research counter
LanguageData.Facility_VitalsCentre.description: A large centre for monitoring the vitals of several patients at once, increasing medical tend quality, surgery success chance and immunity gain speed when placed in the vicinity of a hospital bed or surgical table. Only works for hospital beds or surgical tables - normal beds will not benefit.
LanguageData.Facility_VitalsCentre.label: vitals centre
LanguageData.Wall_SterileBlue.label: blue sterile wall
LanguageData.Wall_SterileBrown.label: brown sterile wall
LanguageData.Wall_SterileCream.label: cream sterile wall
LanguageData.Wall_SterileDark.label: dark sterile wall
LanguageData.Wall_SterileGold.label: gold sterile wall
LanguageData.Wall_SterileGreen.label: green sterile wall
LanguageData.Wall_SterileRed.label: red sterile wall
LanguageData.Wall_SterileTeal.label: teal sterile wall
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_HMGComplex.label: HMG bullet
LanguageData.VFES_DeployableBarrier.description: A submersible barrier which acts as a normal floor tile when unpowered. Provides excellent cover from ranged attacks. It only takes half as much damage when submerged.
LanguageData.VFES_DeployableBarrier.label: deployable barrier
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_FloorTurret.label: submersible military turret doublegun
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_HMGComplex.description: A mounted variant of a heavy machine gun.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_HMGComplex.label: mounted HMG
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_FloorTurret.description: A submersible military-grade double barreled automatic turret which acts as a normal floor tile when unpowered. It only takes half as much damage when submerged. Requires steel to refurbish its barrels after heavy use. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_FloorTurret.label: deployable turret
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_HMGComplex.description: A stationary heavy machine gun supported by some sandbags to grant cover.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_HMGComplex.label: HMG complex
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_AutocannonDouble.description: A twin-barreled variant of the autocannon turret. While less accurate and slightly shorter-ranged than its single-barreled cousin, it compensates with a high volume of fire. It cannot fire at close-up targets, and may explode when damaged.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_AutocannonDouble.label: double autocannon turret
LanguageData.VFES_TurretDoubleAutocannon_Top.descript: A self-loading large-bore double cannon designed to be attached to a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_TurretDoubleAutocannon_Top.label: double autocannon
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_PointDefense.description: A rapid-fire gun for point-defense applications.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_PointDefense.label: point defense gun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_AntiAir.description: A specialized defensive turret that intercepts explosive projectiles and incoming drop pods within its protective radius, but cannot engage ground targets. Interception chance scales with the target's velocity. Requires steel to refurbish its barrels after heavy use.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_AntiAir.label: anti-air turret
LanguageData.Gun_AutomatedMortar.label: automated mortar
LanguageData.VFES_Artillery_ArtilleryGun.description: Artillery launcher. Lobs bombs over walls. Accurate and long-ranged.
LanguageData.VFES_Artillery_ArtilleryGun.label: artillery gun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Artillery.description: A manned artillery that launches all kinds of shells. Capable of inflicting devastating damage to both enemy forces and structures, this military machinery excels at laying down fire support for soldiers in the field.\n\nCapable of targeting other areas of the world within a medium radius.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Artillery.label: artillery
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_AutomatedMortar.description: An automated mortar that launches high-explosive shells. While it can inflict devastating damage, the mortar's inherent inaccuracy makes it more useful for attacking large fortifications than groups of enemies in the field. Due to a delicate firing mechanism, it's only calibrated to fire high-explosive shells.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_AutomatedMortar.label: automated mortar
LanguageData.VFES_Artillery_Weapon.description: Artillery cannon capable of long range bombardment.
LanguageData.VFES_Artillery_Weapon.label: artillery
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_HeavyIncineratorComplex.des: A heavy incinerator mounted on a barricade to grant cover. Needs to be manned in order to fire. It is equipped with a powerful mega-burner that requires bioferrite to reload.
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexHeavyIncinerator_Top.descrip: A heavy incinerator designed to be attached to a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexHeavyIncinerator_Top.label: heavy incinerator
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_ChargeComplex.label: charge shot
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ChargeComplex.description: A charge gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ChargeComplex.label: charge gun emplacement
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ChargeComplex.description: A stationary charge cannon mounted on a metal barrier. Capable of sustaining fire until the barrel needs changing.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ChargeComplex.label: charge complex
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_ConcealedTurret.label: concealed turret bullet
LanguageData.VFES_ConcealedBarrier.description: A retractable, waist-high barrier for use as cover from incoming shots. It provides strong cover while deployed and is almost invisible when submerged. Barricades will block certain kinds of animals the same way that fences do. Requires power.
LanguageData.VFES_ConcealedBarrier.label: concealed barrier
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ConcealedTurret.description: A simple automatic gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ConcealedTurret.label: concealed turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Concealed.description: A compact automatic turret equipped with retractable armor plating and a submersion mechanism. It is capable of submerging into the ground, becoming impossible to target. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Concealed.label: concealed turret
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_Invisible.label: invisible
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_None.description: A replica gun made of wood for a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_None.label: decoy gun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Decoy.description: A cloth dummy holding a wooden rifle. Attracts enemy attention.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Decoy.label: decoy
LanguageData.VFES_AmmoCrate.description: A small ammunition box that improves the reload speed of everyone nearby. Will explode if damaged.
LanguageData.VFES_AmmoCrate.label: ammo box
LanguageData.VFES_BarbedWire.description: A razor wire fence consisting of sharp edges and points arranged at intervals. Not only does it slow down movement of enemies, it also inflicts cuts and puncture wounds. Razor wire will block certain kinds of animals the same way that fences do.
LanguageData.VFES_BarbedWire.label: razor wire
LanguageData.VFES_Platform.description: A long, narrow platform. Crossing it requires climbing up and down, therefore it significantly slows down movement speed. People on the platform receive a bonus to weapon range, but suffer from lower cover.
LanguageData.VFES_Platform.label: platform
LanguageData.VFES_Trench.description: A long, damage-resistant reinforced trench. Crossing it requires climbing up and down, therefore it significantly slows down movement speed. People inside the trench suffer a weapon range penalty, but gain significant cover and protection from explosive damage.
LanguageData.VFES_Trench.label: trench
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_FlameTurret.description: A flamethrower made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_FlameTurret.label: flame turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_MilitaryTurret.description: A refined automatic gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_MilitaryTurret.label: military turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_Searchlight.label: searchlight
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_SentryTurret.description: A fully automatic gatling gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_SentryTurret.label: sentry turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Flame.description: A portable flamethrower turret, capable of spewing a cone of flame that engulfs enemies and terrain. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Flame.label: flamer turret
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_MilitaryTurret.description: A refined turret with military-grade stabilization, targeting routines, and hardened casing. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_MilitaryTurret.label: military turret
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Searchlight.description: An apparatus combining an extremely luminous lamp and a mirrored parabolic reflector, useful for lighting up and dazzling targets.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Searchlight.label: searchlight
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_SentryGun.description: A self-powered turret with a small gatling gun mounted on top. Light enough to be carried and deployed wherever. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_SentryGun.label: sentry gun
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_GraserCannon.description: A devastating gamma ray laser mounted on a barricade to grant cover. It fires a sweeping beam capable of piercing armor and igniting targets. Needs to be manned in order to fire. Requires plasteel to refurbish its emitter array after heavy use.
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_GraserCannon.label: graser cannon complex
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexGraserCannon_Top.description: A graser cannon designed to be attached to a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexGraserCannon_Top.label: graser cannon
LanguageData.VFES_BearTrap.description: Two heavy metal jaws held open under tension, connected to a pressure-sensitive trigger. When stepped on, the jaws snap shut with high force, inflicting severe damage. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. When triggered, it can be re-armed.
LanguageData.VFES_BearTrap.label: bear trap
LanguageData.VFES_Artillery_Catapult.description: A ballistic device used to launch a projectile a great distance without the aid of gunpowder or other propellants.
LanguageData.VFES_Artillery_Catapult.label: catapult
LanguageData.VFES_Artillery_Rock.label: massive boulder
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_Ballista.label: ballista bolt
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_BallistaTurret.description: An ancient military siege engine in a form of a crossbow mounted on a wooden construct.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_BallistaTurret.label: ballista
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Ballista.description: An ancient military siege engine in the form of a crossbow mounted on a wooden construct. Bolts fired from this machine explode into splinters on impact. Needs to be manned in order to fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Ballista.label: ballista
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Catapult.description: A ballistic device used to launch a projectile a great distance without the aid of gunpowder or other propellants. In use since ancient times, the catapult has proven to be one of the most persistently effective mechanisms in warfare.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Catapult.label: catapult
LanguageData.VFES_CavalrySpikes.description: A row of sharpened spikes laid low across the ground. Designed to maim or cripple those who attempt to charge through, especially fast-moving animals or mounted units. Can be placed next to other cavalry spikes. Upon being triggered, cavalry spikes will need to be rebuilt.
LanguageData.VFES_CavalrySpikes.label: cavalry spikes
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_NonLethalTurret.description: A non-lethal rubber bullet gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_NonLethalTurret.label: non-lethal turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_NonLethalTurret.description: A turret designed to fire rubber bullets at intruders or unruly colonists. It causes pain and blunt trauma with low chance of fatal injury, making it ideal for non-lethal suppression. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_NonLethalTurret.label: non-lethal turret
LanguageData.VFES_LargeRepulsor.description:
A large, ultratech device that projects an extremely vast energy field around itself to protect everything inside, but consumes a huge amount of power when active. Works through walls.

Repulsors only activate when there's an active threat present such as a raid or an artillery bombardment. Otherwise, they stay in an inactive state and consume much less power.

Can set surrounding area on fire if enough damage is absorbed in a short period of time.
LanguageData.VFES_LargeRepulsor.label: large repulsor
LanguageData.VFES_SmallRepulsor.description:
An ultratech device that projects a potent energy field around itself to protect everything inside, but consumes a huge amount of power when active. Works through walls.

Repulsors only activate when there's an active threat present such as a raid or an artillery bombardment. Otherwise, they stay in an inactive state and consume much less power.

Can set surrounding area on fire if enough damage is absorbed in a short period of time.
LanguageData.VFES_SmallRepulsor.label: small repulsor
LanguageData.VFES_ShieldGenerator_Archotech.descripti:
A self-powered archotech device that projects a very potent energy field around itself to protect everything inside. Works through walls.

Shield generators only activate when there's an active threat present such as a raid or an artillery bombardment. Otherwise, they stay in an inactive state and consume much less power.

Can set surrounding area on fire if enough damage is absorbed in a short period of time.
LanguageData.VFES_ShieldGenerator_Archotech.label: archotech shield generator
LanguageData.VFES_ShieldGenerator_Large.description: An ultratech device that projects a large energy field around itself to protect everything inside, but consumes a huge amount of power when active. Works through walls.\n\nShield generators only activate when there's an active threat present such as a raid or an artillery bombardment. Otherwise, they stay in an inactive state and consume much less power.
LanguageData.VFES_ShieldGenerator_Large.label: large shield generator
LanguageData.VFES_ShieldGenerator_Small.description:
An ultratech device that projects a potent energy field around itself to protect everything inside, but consumes a huge amount of power when active. Works through walls.

Shield generators only activate when there's an active threat present such as a raid or an artillery bombardment. Otherwise, they stay in an inactive state and consume much less power.

Can set surrounding area on fire if enough damage is absorbed in a short period of time.
LanguageData.VFES_ShieldGenerator_Small.label: small shield generator
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_DoubleChargeLance.label: charge railgun shots
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_EMPCannon.label: EMP shot
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ChargeTurret.description: A charge rifle made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ChargeTurret.label: charged turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_EMPTurret.description: An EMP coil gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_EMPTurret.label: EMP cannon
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_RailgunTurret.description: An advanced railgun designed to launch electromagnetically accelerated projectiles.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_RailgunTurret.label: charged turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ChargeRailgunTurret.descript: A heavy railgun cannon usually mounted on spacecraft, utilising an array of advanced sensors which offer top-class accuracy. Requires components to be replaced in order to operate. May explode when damaged.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ChargeRailgunTurret.label: charge railgun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ChargeTurret.description: A portable automatic charged-shot turret. Pulse-charge technology charges each shot with unstable energy as it leaves the barrel. Requires plasteel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ChargeTurret.label: charge turret
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_EMPTurret.description: An electro-magnetic pulse cannon usually mounted on a spacecraft. Requires uranium rods to be replaced in order to operate. Can only target mechanoids and may explode if damaged.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_EMPTurret.label: EMP cannon
LanguageData.VEFS_TrapLandmine.description: A sophisticated explosive charge connected to a pressure plate trigger which detonates immediately on touch. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VEFS_TrapLandmine.label: landmine
LanguageData.VEFS_TrapShockmine.description: A concealed high-tech trap that releases a localized EMP pulse when triggered. It resets automatically after a short cooldown. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VEFS_TrapShockmine.label: shockmine
LanguageData.VFES_Dugout.description: A long, narrow ditch dug into the ground. Crossing it requires climbing up and down, therefore it significantly slows down movement speed. People inside the dugout suffer weapon range penalty, but gain significant cover and protection from explosive damage.
LanguageData.VFES_Dugout.label: dugout
LanguageData.Bullet_TeslaBlaster.label: tesla blaster bolt
LanguageData.Gun_TeslaBlaster.description: A specialized electrical weapon designed to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.Gun_TeslaBlaster.label: tesla blaster
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_Catapult.label: massive boulder
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_ChargeRailgunShot.label: charge railgun shot
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_ChargeTurretShot.label: charge shot
LanguageData.VFES_Bullet_HMG.label: HMG bullet
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_Charge.description: A heavy, pulse-charged rapid-fire blaster mounted on a barricade to grant cover. Needs to be manned in order to fire. Requires plasteel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use.
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_Charge.label: charge complex
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_Hmg.description: A heavy machine gun mounted on sandbags to grant cover. Needs to be manned in order to fire. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use.
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_Hmg.label: HMG complex
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_Minigun.description: A multi-barrel machine gun mounted on sandbags to grant cover and provide stability. Where most self-loading guns are powered by the energy from the gunpowder, the minigun uses an electric motor to rapidly cycle cartridges through the weapon. Needs to be manned in order to fire. Requires steel to refurbish its barrels after heavy use.
LanguageData.VFES_Complex_Minigun.label: minigun complex
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexCharge_Top.description: A self-loading minigun designed to be attached to a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexCharge_Top.label: minigun
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexHmg_Top.description: A self-loading HMG designed to be attached to a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexHmg_Top.label: HMG
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexMinigun_Top.description: A self-loading minigun designed to be attached to a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_ComplexMinigun_Top.label: minigun
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ArmoredTurret.description: A refined automatic gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ArmoredTurret.label: military turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ShotgunTurret.description: An automatic shotgun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_ShotgunTurret.label: shotgun turret gun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ArmoredTurret.description: An armored, portable automatic turret. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. Extra armor plating allows the turret to provide some cover, makes it more resistant to enemy fire and prevents explosion in case of severe damage. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ArmoredTurret.label: armored turret
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ChargeRailgun.description: A cutting-edge, pulse-charged, rail-assisted weapon system that fires a short burst of high-velocity projectiles, energized with unstable plasma as they leave the rail. The resulting shots pierce armor and bodies alike, but the turret requires new plasteel barrel after use. It cannot fire at close range, and may explode when damaged.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ChargeRailgun.label: charge railgun
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Minigun.description: A heavy automatic turret. Its multi-barrel mechanism unleashes sustained fire at high speed, shredding lightly armored targets at mid-range. It may explode when damaged. Requires steel to refurbish its barrels after heavy use.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Minigun.label: minigun turret
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ShotgunTurret.description: A compact automatic turret fitted with a semi-automatic shotgun. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ShotgunTurret.label: shotgun turret
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_TeslaBlaster.description: A cutting-edge utility turret designed to counter the mechanoid advances. Four capacitors are charged to release a bolt of electricity. Upon impact, the power surge stuns affected mechanoid, before seeking to jump to another. Will only target mechanoids.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_TeslaBlaster.label: tesla blaster
LanguageData.VFES_TurretMinigun_Top.description: A self-loading minigun designed to be attached to a turret.
LanguageData.VFES_TurretMinigun_Top.label: minigun
LanguageData.VFES_ArtilleryStrikeIncoming.label: artillery strike (incoming)
LanguageData.VFES_ArtilleryStrikeLeaving.label: artillery strike (leaving)
LanguageData.VFES_ActiveArtilleryStrike.label: artillery strike
LanguageData.VFE_DrugCabinet.description: Increases work speed when placed near a drug lab. One workbench links up to two drug cabinets.
LanguageData.VFE_DrugCabinet.label: drug cabinet
LanguageData.VFE_FabricationCabinet.description: Increases work speed when placed near a fabrication bench. One workbench can link up to two fabrication cabinets.
LanguageData.VFE_FabricationCabinet.label: fabrication cabinet
LanguageData.VFE_KitchenSinkCabinet.description: Increases work speed when placed nearby a cooking stove.
LanguageData.VFE_KitchenSinkCabinet.label: kitchen sink cabinet
LanguageData.VFE_MachiningCabinet.description: Increases work speed when placed near a machining table. One workbench links up to two machining cabinets.
LanguageData.VFE_MachiningCabinet.label: machining cabinet
LanguageData.VFE_SmithyCabinet.description: Increases work speed when placed near a smithy. One workbench links up to two smithy cabinets.
LanguageData.VFE_SmithyCabinet.label: smithing cabinet
LanguageData.VFE_TailorCabinet.description: Increases work speed when placed near a tailoring table. One workbench links up to two tailor cabinets.
LanguageData.VFE_TailorCabinet.label: tailor cabinet
LanguageData.VFE_TableMachiningLarge.description: A workbench equipped with advanced tools and enough space to produce technological marvels from simpler materials in shorter amounts of time. Consumes power.
LanguageData.VFE_TableMachiningLarge.label: large machining table
LanguageData.VFE_TableSmithyLarge.description: An electric-powered work center for smithing non-mechanical weapons and tools. Consumes a lot of power.
LanguageData.VFE_TableSmithyLarge.label: large electric smithy
LanguageData.VFE_TableStoveLarge.description: A large size manufacturing stove as well as multiple ovens to prepare meals and cook significantly faster.
LanguageData.VFE_TableStoveLarge.label: large stove
LanguageData.VFE_TableTailorLarge.description: A large size manufacturing workbench with several tools for designers and a sewing machine for rapid tailoring of clothes. Can work without electricity at 33% of normal speed.
LanguageData.VFE_TableTailorLarge.label: large tailoring table
LanguageData.VFE_ComponentFabricationBench.descriptio: A workbench equipped with advanced tools to produce components.
LanguageData.VFE_ComponentFabricationBench.label: assembly bench
LanguageData.VFE_FueledSmelter.description: A wood-fueled station for smelting. Extracts usable metal from slag chunks and other mixed metal items.
LanguageData.VFE_FueledSmelter.label: fueled smelter
LanguageData.VFE_TableButcherElectric.description: A motorized table with a rotating saw blade for butchering dead creatures quicker into precise slices of raw meat. Consumes a lot of power.
LanguageData.VFE_TableButcherElectric.label: electric butcher
LanguageData.VFE_TableDrugLabElectric.description: An advanced work bench equipped with containers, heaters, and measurement devices for producing various drugs with more efficiency. Consumes a lot of power.
LanguageData.VFE_TableDrugLabElectric.label: electric drug lab
LanguageData.VFE_TableStonecutterElectric.description: An advanced work table with electrical saws and holders for cutting stone chunks into usable blocks in shorter duration of time on an assembly line. Consumes a lot of power.
LanguageData.VFE_TableStonecutterElectric.label: electric stonecutter's table
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAnchovy.description: Raw anchovy. A small, common forage fish of the family Engraulidae. Most species are found in marine waters, but several will enter brackish water and some are restricted to fresh water.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAnchovy.label: anchovy
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAngelfish.description: Raw angelfish. Angelfish refers to several species of fish, both marine and freshwater, usually sporting bright colours and deep, laterally compressed bodies.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAngelfish.label: angelfish
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAnglerfish.description: Raw anglerfish. Anglerfish are bony fish named for their characteristic mode of predation, in which, a fleshy growth from the fish's head (the esca or illicium) acts as a lure towards other fish.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAnglerfish.label: anglerfish
LanguageData.VCEF_RawBass.description: Raw bass. Bass is a name shared by many species of fish. The term encompasses both freshwater and marine species, all belonging to the large order Perciformes.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawBass.label: bass
LanguageData.VCEF_RawCatfish.description: Raw catfish. Catfish are a diverse group of ray-finned fish. Named for their prominent barbels, which resemble a cat's whiskers.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawCatfish.label: catfish
LanguageData.VCEF_RawClownfish.description: Raw clownfish. In the wild, clownfish form symbiotic mutualisms with sea anemones. Depending on species, clownfish are overall yellow, orange, or a reddish or blackish color, and many show white bars or patches.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawClownfish.label: clownfish
LanguageData.VCEF_RawCod.description: Raw cod. Cod refers to several large species of fish with a voracious appetite, feeding largely on other fishes and various invertebrates. Cod has long been considered a perfect fish for human consumption, with its flaky white flesh, a high protein content and low fat content.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawCod.label: cod
LanguageData.VCEF_RawEel.description: Raw eel. An eel is any ray-finned fish belonging to the order Anguilliformes. Eels are elongated fish, possessing no pelvic fins, and many species also lacking pectoral fins. Eels swim by generating body waves which travel the length of their bodies.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawEel.label: eel
LanguageData.VCEF_RawGoldfish.description: Raw goldfish. The goldfish (Carassius auratus) is a freshwater fish in the family Cyprinidae of order Cypriniformes. It is one of the most commonly kept aquarium fish.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawGoldfish.label: goldfish
LanguageData.VCEF_RawGuppy.description: Raw guppy. The guppy (Poecilia reticulata), also known as millionfish and rainbow fish, is one of the world's most widely distributed tropical fish, and one of the most popular freshwater aquarium fish species.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawGuppy.label: guppy
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHaddock.description: Raw haddock. The haddock (Melanogrammus aeglefinus) is a saltwater fish from the family Gadidae, the true cods. It is an important food fish and has traditionaly been consumed either fresh or smoked.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHaddock.label: haddock
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHalibut.description: Raw halibut. Halibut is a common name principally applied to the two flatfish from the family of right-eye flounders. Less commonly, and in some regions only, other species of flatfish are also referred to as being halibuts.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHalibut.label: halibut
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHerring.description: Raw herring. Herring are forage fish, mostly belonging to the family Clupeidae. Herring often move in large schools around fishing banks and near the coast.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHerring.label: herring
LanguageData.VCEF_RawKoi.description: Raw koi. Koi are colored varieties of the Amur carp (Cyprinus rubrofuscus) that are kept for decorative purposes in outdoor koi ponds or water gardens.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawKoi.label: koi
LanguageData.VCEF_RawLobster.description: Raw lobster. Lobsters are large marine crustaceans. Lobsters have long bodies with muscular tails. Three of their five pairs of legs have claws, including the first pair, which are usually much larger than the others.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawLobster.label: lobster
LanguageData.VCEF_RawMackerel.description: Raw mackerel. Mackerel is a common name applied to a number of different species of pelagic fish, mostly from the family Scombridae. They are found in both temperate and tropical seas, mostly living along the coast or offshore in the oceanic environment.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawMackerel.label: mackerel
LanguageData.VCEF_RawMinnow.description: Raw minnow. Minnow is the common name for a number of species of small freshwater fish, belonging to several genera of the family Cyprinidae.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawMinnow.label: minnow
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPerch.description: Raw perch. Perch is a common name for fish of the genus Perca, freshwater gamefish belonging to the family Percidae. The perch lend their name to a large order of vertebrates: the Perciformes. Many species of freshwater gamefish more or less resemble perch, but belong to different genera.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPerch.label: perch
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPiranha.description: Raw piranha. A piranha is a freshwater fish that inhabits rivers, floodplains, lakes and reservoirs. Although often described as extremely predatory and mainly feeding on fish, their dietary habits vary extensively, and they will also take plant material, leading to their classification as omnivorous.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPiranha.label: piranha
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPufferfish.description: Raw pufferfish. Pufferfish are a family of primarily marine and estuarine fish. The majority of pufferfish species are toxic and some are among the most poisonous vertebrates in the world. In certain species, the internal organs, such as the liver, and sometimes their skin, contain tetrodotoxin and are highly toxic to most animals when eaten; nevertheless, the meat of some species is considered a delicacy when prepared by specially trained chefs.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPufferfish.label: pufferfish
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSalmon.description: Raw salmon. Salmon is the common name for several species of ray-finned fish in the family Salmonidae. Typically, salmon are anadromous: they hatch in fresh water, migrate to the ocean, then return to fresh water to reproduce. However, populations of several species are restricted to fresh water through their lives.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSalmon.label: salmon
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSprat.description: Raw sprat. Sprat is the common name applied to a group of forage fish belonging to the genus Sprattus in the family Clupeidae. Like most forage fishes, sprats are highly active, small, oily fish. They travel in large schools with other fish and swim continuously throughout the day.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSprat.label: sprat
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSwordfish.description: Raw swordfish. Swordfish, also known as broadbills, are large, highly migratory, predatory fish characterized by a long, flat, pointed bill.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSwordfish.label: swordfish
LanguageData.VCEF_RawTrout.description: Raw trout. Trout is the common name for a number of species of freshwater fish. Most species of trout live in freshwater lakes and rivers exclusively, while there are others, such as the steelhead, which can spend two or three years at sea before returning to fresh water to spawn (a habit more typical of salmon).
LanguageData.VCEF_RawTrout.label: trout
LanguageData.VCEF_RawTuna.description: Raw tuna. Tuna are large saltwater fish. An active and agile predator, the tuna has a sleek, streamlined body, and is among the fastest-swimming pelagic fish. Tuna has been highly prized as a food fish. Besides their commercial value as food, the great size, speed, and power they display as apex predators has attracted the admiration of fishermen, writers, and scientists.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawTuna.label: tuna
LanguageData.ShuttleChunkIncoming.label: shuttle chunk (incoming)
LanguageData.SlagIncoming.label: slag (incoming)
LanguageData.VEE_ShipChunkHuman.description: A chunk of a spacecraft. Can be deconstructed to yield useful resources.
LanguageData.VEE_ShipChunkHuman.label: ship chunk
LanguageData.VEE_Shuttle.description: A chunk of a shuttle. Can be deconstructed to yield useful resources.
LanguageData.VEE_Shuttle.label: shuttle chunk
LanguageData.VEE_Plant_Bluebell.description: A garden flower with a violet–blue teint, with strongly recurved petals. Bluebells are very beautiful, and last long.
LanguageData.VEE_Plant_Bluebell.label: bluebell
LanguageData.VEE_Plant_Gardenia.description: A flower with large petals. Gardenias are very beautiful.
LanguageData.VEE_Plant_Gardenia.label: gardenia
LanguageData.VEE_Plant_Gentian.description: A large cultivated flower with inimitable blue petals. Gentians are very beautiful.
LanguageData.VEE_Plant_Gentian.label: gentian
LanguageData.VEE_Plant_Petunia.description: A long lasting flower with purple petals. Petunias are very beautiful.
LanguageData.VEE_Plant_Petunia.label: petunia
LanguageData.VFE_Ecosystem.description: Grows plants quickly in an artificial, sealed ecosystem. Requires a high amount of power to work; plants will die if power is cut.\n\nContains a built-in sun lamp to provide light for the plants.
LanguageData.VFE_Ecosystem.label: artificial ecosystem
LanguageData.VFE_PlanterBox.description: Grows plants in a box of soil. Does not require power to work.
LanguageData.VFE_PlanterBox.label: planter box
LanguageData.VFE_Ecosystem_Tilable.description: Grows plants quickly in an artificial, sealed ecosystem which can be configured to effectively grow even picky plants. Requires a high amount of power to work; plants will die if power is cut. Contains a built-in sun lamp to provide light for the plants.\n\nThis version is modular and can be assembled in any shape necessary.
LanguageData.VFE_Ecosystem_Tilable.label: tilable artificial ecosystem
LanguageData.VFE_Hydroponics_Tilable.description: An artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. The nutrients pumps must work continuously; the plants will die if power is cut.\n\nThis version is modular and can be assembled in any shape necessary.
LanguageData.VFE_Hydroponics_Tilable.label: tilable hydroponics basin
LanguageData.VFE_PlanterBox_Tilable.description: Grows plants in a box of soil. Does not require power to work.\n\nCan be constructed in any desired shape.
LanguageData.VFE_PlanterBox_Tilable.label: tilable planter box
LanguageData.VFE_AnimalFeeder.description: A feeding trough. Food stored in this will not deteriorate, even if outside.
LanguageData.VFE_AnimalFeeder.label: animal feeder
LanguageData.VFE_Scarecrow.description: A humanoid figure made out of hay, dressed in old clothes to deter animals in a large radius. Small animals will be too afraid to approach.
LanguageData.VFE_Scarecrow.label: scarecrow
LanguageData.VFE_Sprinkler.description: A water sprinkler, providing an area around it with water. Enhances the growth of surrounding plants.
LanguageData.VFE_Sprinkler.label: sprinkler
LanguageData.VFE_ArchotechSculpture.description: An ancient, human-sized mysterious machine. Creates a detailed imagery in the minds of surrounding pawns. Works through walls.
LanguageData.VFE_ArchotechSculpture.label: archotech sculpture
LanguageData.VFE_Carving.description: A small carving sculpted from a waist-tall wall piece. Can act as cover.
LanguageData.VFE_Carving.label: carving
LanguageData.VFE_Monument.description: An impassable, massive monument with an ornate pedestal and a large art piece.
LanguageData.VFE_Monument.label: monument
LanguageData.VFE_Obelisk.description: A tall piece of material shaped into an obelisk with an art piece carved into the sides.
LanguageData.VFE_Obelisk.label: obelisk
LanguageData.VFE_Pillar.description: An impassable, decorated pillar capable of supporting a roof.
LanguageData.VFE_Pillar.label: pillar
LanguageData.VFE_Plinth.description: A small plinth with an artistic imagery carved into the sides. Can be used for storing miscellaneous items. Items stored in this will not deteriorate, even if outside.
LanguageData.VFE_Plinth.label: plinth
LanguageData.VFE_Pottery.description: A small-size pieces of pottery with artisting engravings. Can be crafted on a crafting spot.
LanguageData.VFE_Pottery.label: pottery
LanguageData.VFE_Relief.description: An impassable, long piece of wall with an artistic relief carved into it.
LanguageData.VFE_Relief.label: relief
LanguageData.VFE_StatueGrand.description: A huge piece of material on a decorative pedestal, sculpted into an artistic form.
LanguageData.VFE_StatueGrand.label: grand statue
LanguageData.VFE_StatueLarge.description: A person-sized piece of material on a decorative pedestal, sculpted into an artistic form.
LanguageData.VFE_StatueLarge.label: large statue
LanguageData.VFE_StatueSmall.description: A small-size piece of material on a decorative pedestal, sculpted into an artistic form.
LanguageData.VFE_StatueSmall.label: small statue
LanguageData.VFE_Wallpaper.description: An impassable wall with a beautiful wallpaper. Capable of holding up a roof.
LanguageData.VFE_Wallpaper.label: wallpaper
LanguageData.UnfinishedHologram.label: unfinished hologram
LanguageData.VFE_HologramOn.description: A human-sized light projecting device, depicting an artwork made using several programming languages. Needs to be plugged in to display the artwork.
LanguageData.VFE_HologramOn.label: hologram
LanguageData.UnfinishedRug.label: unfinished rug
LanguageData.VFE_RugGrand.description: A huge floor covering textile that dominates a room, decorated with artistic embroidery.
LanguageData.VFE_RugGrand.label: grand rug
LanguageData.VFE_RugLarge.description: A large size floor covering textile, decorated with artistic embroidery.
LanguageData.VFE_RugLarge.label: large rug
LanguageData.VFE_RugSmall.description: A small size floor covering textile, decorated with artistic embroidery.
LanguageData.VFE_RugSmall.label: small rug
LanguageData.VEF_OutpostDeliverySpot.description: Designates a spot for items from outposts to be delivered to.
LanguageData.VEF_OutpostDeliverySpot.label: outpost delivery spot
LanguageData.KCSG_PowerConduit.description: A burried bundle of electrical cables for moving power around.
LanguageData.KCSG_PowerConduit.label: power conduit
LanguageData.MVCF_Dummy.label: dummy
LanguageData.Bed_AdvBed.description: A powered high-tech bed that automatically readjusts itself to perfectly fit the contours of the sleeper, with built in white noise generation. Sleepers often report feeling refreshed and more alert the morning after.
LanguageData.Bed_AdvBed.label: advanced bed
LanguageData.Bed_AdvDoubleBed.description: A powered high-tech double bed that automatically readjusts itself to perfectly fit the contours of both sleepers, with built in white noise generation. Sleepers often report feeling refreshed and more alert the morning after.
LanguageData.Bed_AdvDoubleBed.label: advanced double bed
LanguageData.Table_IlluminatedDresser.description: An illuminated dresser, adorned with light strips. Gives a small comfort bonus to all nearby beds, whilst lighting up the room. Placing more than one dresser near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.Table_IlluminatedDresser.label: illuminated dresser
LanguageData.Table_IlluminatedEndTable.description: A small illuminated bedside table adorned with light strips which makes nearby beds a little bit more comfortable, whilst lighting the room. Must be placed directly adjacent to the head of the bed. Placing more than one end table near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.Table_IlluminatedEndTable.label: illuminated end table
LanguageData.UltrascreenTV.description: A huge, curved, ultra-tech television. Viewers feel as if they are part of the action themselves. Very entertaining. Capable of picking up signal from the core worlds.
LanguageData.UltrascreenTV.label: ultrascreen television
LanguageData.Light_SpacerLamp.description: A powerful advanced lamp for lighting up rooms effectively whilst utilising an integrated temperature regulation module to keep rooms warmer to a maximum temperature of 15C. Will not short circuit in rain.
LanguageData.Light_SpacerLamp.label: spacer lamp
LanguageData.Reinforced_WallAT.description: A reinforced impassable wall, created by layering materials over eachother. Capable of holding up a roof.
LanguageData.Reinforced_WallAT.label: reinforced wall
LanguageData.Shelf_RepairRack.description: A powered high-tech shelf that utilises mechanites to slowly heal any damage on any clothing, armour or weapons placed on it.
LanguageData.Shelf_RepairRack.label: repair shelf
LanguageData.Spacer_OutdoorLamp.description: A self sustained lamp for outdoor use, weaker than a normal industrial lamp but does not require any power, storing energy during the day to power itself 24/7. Will not short circuit in rain.
LanguageData.Spacer_OutdoorLamp.label: outdoor solar lamp
LanguageData.Spacer_SunLamp.description: A large sun lamp which lights a large area brightly enough to grow crops as well as providing heat for the area, whilst consuming only a moderate amount of power. Never turns off at night and will not short circuit in rain.
LanguageData.Spacer_SunLamp.label: biolab sun lamp
LanguageData.Seat_AdvChair.description: An advanced chair that automatically changes in response to the contours of the sitter, giving optimal back support at all times and vastly improving comfort. The ultimate luxury.
LanguageData.Seat_AdvChair.label: advanced chair
LanguageData.Table_interactive_1x1c.description: A table for eating off of with interactive display for watching shows, playing games or taking notes on whilst eating. Fulfills recreation need when a pawn eats at this table and the table is powered.
LanguageData.Table_interactive_1x1c.label: interactive table (1x1)
LanguageData.Table_interactive_2x2c.description: A table for eating off of with interactive display for watching shows, playing games or taking notes on whilst eating. Fulfills recreation need when a pawn eats at this table and the table is powered.
LanguageData.Table_interactive_2x2c.label: interactive table (2x2)
LanguageData.Chemshine.description: A dangerous alcohol usually consumed by rimworld prospectors and industrial settlers. Whilst it takes away the sadness and pain, chemshine intoxicates the blood of the drinker with chemfuel, resulting in a powerful explosion upon death.
LanguageData.Chemshine.label: chemshine
LanguageData.VFES_Headgear_Bandana.description: A warm and long piece of fabric protecting the jaw from exposure to wind. Makes one hard to remember.
LanguageData.VFES_Headgear_Bandana.label: bandana
LanguageData.VFES_Headgear_FlatCap.description: A flat and handy cap. Somewhat protecting from the sun. Worn by settlers and colonists during their daily occupations.
LanguageData.VFES_Headgear_FlatCap.label: flat cap
LanguageData.VFES_Headgear_Sombrero.description: Used to shield the wearer from the sun. Required for any kind of stand-off.
LanguageData.VFES_Headgear_Sombrero.label: sombrero
LanguageData.Apparel_GreatDress.description: A great dress, most often worn by ladies and suffragettes. Greatly enhances social interactions.
LanguageData.Apparel_GreatDress.label: great dress
LanguageData.Apparel_Vest.description: A simple vest, providing a decent layer of insulation from both heat and cold. Greatly enhances social interactions.
LanguageData.Apparel_Vest.label: vest
LanguageData.ChemBoiler.description: A device that converts chemfuel into heat. Simple machinery doesn't allow the temperature to be adjusted.
LanguageData.ChemBoiler.label: chemboiler
LanguageData.Chemlamp.description: A lamp fueled by chemfuel. Can be safely placed outside.
LanguageData.Chemlamp.label: chemlamp
LanguageData.ChemlampPost.description: A post with a pre-industrial chemfuel lamp. Can be safely placed outside.
LanguageData.ChemlampPost.label: chemlamp post
LanguageData.Plant_Chemroot.description: This highly volatile root is farmed for its chemfuel. It's difficult to harvest and only grows in extremely fertile soil. Despite the risk of a large, chain explosion, these plants are frequently farmed by desperate ranchers and imperial agro-companies alike.
LanguageData.Plant_Chemroot.label: chemroot
LanguageData.Building_ChemshineBarrel.label: chemshine barrel
LanguageData.DoorSaloon.description: A saloon door for your country needs. Whilst it doesn't provide much protection, it swings open nearly instantaneously.
LanguageData.DoorSaloon.label: saloon door
LanguageData.Post.description: An old-styled post to hold down a roof.
LanguageData.Post.label: post
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_DoubleActionRevolver.descriptio: An ancient pattern double-action revolver. It's not very accurate, but has a decent firing speed for a pistol and is quick on the draw.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_DoubleActionRevolver.label: double-action revolver
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_DoubleBarreledShotgun.descripti: An ancient design of shotgun with two individually loaded barrels, that emits a tight-packed spray of pellets.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_DoubleBarreledShotgun.label: double-barreled shotgun
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_HuntingRifle.description: An ancient pattern bolt-action rifle with a scope. With its exceptional range, and low fire rate, it is unlikely to drive animals to revenge, which makes it an excellent choice for hunting.
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_HuntingRifle.label: hunting rifle
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_HuntingRifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.VFES_Gun_HuntingRifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.VFES_Proj_Dynamite.label: frag grenade
LanguageData.VFES_Weapon_GrenadeDynamite.description: A makeshift explosive stick of chemfuel. They can be thrown a short distance, where it will explode after a random amount of time.
LanguageData.VFES_Weapon_GrenadeDynamite.label: dynamite
LanguageData.VFES_Tomahawk.description: A single-handed axe resembling of a hatchet. Light enough to be thrown accurately at medium range.
LanguageData.VFES_Tomahawk.label: tomahawk
LanguageData.VFES_Tomahawk.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VFES_Tomahawk.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.VFES_Tomahawk_Thrown.label: throwing tomahawk
LanguageData.StoolBar.label: bar stool
LanguageData.TableCircular.description: Simple, circular table that can be eaten off of.
LanguageData.TableCircular.label: circular table
LanguageData.TableFaro.description: A soft-topped bound table for playing faro. Allows up to two players at a time.
LanguageData.TableFaro.label: faro table
LanguageData.TableFiveFingerFilet.description: A wooden table for playing five finger fillet. Might lose a finger or two.\n\nWhilst this activity leads to cuts on the fingers of players, it also slowly trains melee skill.
LanguageData.TableFiveFingerFilet.label: five finger fillet table
LanguageData.Bullet_GatlingGun.label: gattling bullet
LanguageData.Gun_GatlingGun.description: A simple automatic gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.Gun_GatlingGun.label: gatling gun
LanguageData.Turret_GatlingGun.description: A portable, old time turret. Needs to be manned in order to be operated. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. Firing speed increases the longer this turret fires. May explode when damaged.
LanguageData.Turret_GatlingGun.label: gatling gun turret
LanguageData.Windmill.description: A wind-powered electrical generator of older make. Requires a large clear space in front and behind for optimal air flow.
LanguageData.Windmill.label: windmill
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedSolarGenerator.description: This spacertech solar generator is capable of extracting significantly more energy from sunlight. Does not work in the dark or under artificial light.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedSolarGenerator.label: advanced solar generator
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedWatermillGenerator.descripti: A spacertech building that produces electricity from a river. Must be placed with its wheel in moving water. If watermills are placed too close together, the turbulence they generate will interfere and reduce power generation.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedWatermillGenerator.label: advanced watermill generator
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedWindTurbine.description: A spacertech, advanced wind-powered electrical generator. Requires a large clear space in front and behind for optimal air flow.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedWindTurbine.label: advanced wind turbine
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedBattery.description: Stores electricity for later use. Due to technological advancements, this battery unit is significantly more efficient. Charged advanced batteries are waterproof and don't explode when exposed to rain.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedBattery.label: advanced battery
LanguageData.VFE_LargeAdvancedBattery.description: Stores large amounts of electricity for later use. Due to technological advancements, this battery unit is significantly more efficient. Charged large advanced batteries are waterproof and don't explode when exposed to rain.
LanguageData.VFE_LargeAdvancedBattery.label: large advanced battery
LanguageData.VFE_LargeBattery.description: Stores large amounts of electricity for later use. Charged large batteries explode when exposed to rain or fire.
LanguageData.VFE_LargeBattery.label: large battery
LanguageData.VFE_SmallBattery.description: Stores small amount of electricity for later use. Charged batteries explode when exposed to rain or fire.
LanguageData.VFE_SmallBattery.label: small battery
LanguageData.VPE_ChemfuelPump.description: An industrial style pump capable of extracting chemfuel from underground pockets. After the chemfuel is fully extracted, chemfuel pump can be safely deconstructed.
LanguageData.VPE_ChemfuelPump.label: chemfuel pump
LanguageData.VPE_GasCooler.description: An air-cooling machine that releases cooled air around itself. Can be used to create a walk-in freezer. Cannot be adjusted and will automatically lower temperature slightly below zero.
LanguageData.VPE_GasCooler.label: gas cooler
LanguageData.VPE_GasCrematorium.description: A huge stone crematorium which vaporizes corpses with extremely high temperatures. Operates on helixien gas.
LanguageData.VPE_GasCrematorium.label: helixien gas crematorium
LanguageData.VPE_GasDrill.description: A deep-crust drilling excavator for extracting minerals from deep under the surface. Use a ground-penetrating scanner to detect the resources. This drill will yield stone chunks if no resources are present. Can be repositioned freely.
LanguageData.VPE_GasDrill.label: gas powered excavator
LanguageData.VPE_GasHeater.description: A device that converts helixien gas into radiated heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature.
LanguageData.VPE_GasHeater.label: gas heater
LanguageData.VPE_GasPipe.description: A pipe that transmits helixien gas.
LanguageData.VPE_GasPipe.label: gas pipe
LanguageData.VPE_GasPipeSub.description: A pipe that transmits helixien gas. This pipe is hidden from view and is protected from gas explosions. Much more expensive to build than regular pipes
LanguageData.VPE_GasPipeSub.label: subterranean gas pipe
LanguageData.VPE_GasPipeValve.label: gas pipe valve
LanguageData.VPE_GasSmelter.description: Extracts usable metal from slag chunks and other mixed metal items. Operates on helixien gas.
LanguageData.VPE_GasSmelter.label: helixien gas smelter
LanguageData.VPE_GasStove.description: A gas-powered stove with an attached countertop for preparing meals.
LanguageData.VPE_GasStove.label: helixien gas stove
LanguageData.VPE_GasSunLamp.description: An industrial lamp which lights an area brightly enough to grow crops, but consumes a medium amount of helixien gas. Automatically turns itself off at night.
LanguageData.VPE_GasSunLamp.label: gas sun lamp
LanguageData.VPE_GasTank.description: A large steel tank for gas storage. Will explode if damaged.
LanguageData.VPE_GasTank.label: gas tank
LanguageData.VPE_HelixienGenerator.description: Produces power by consuming helixien gas. Must be connected to a gas pipe network.
LanguageData.VPE_HelixienGenerator.label: helixien gas powered generator
LanguageData.VPE_HelixienPump.description: An extractor machine mounted on helixien gas geyser. Self-powered, this machine pumps out valuable gas and needs to be connected to other gas-based utilities using the pipe network.
LanguageData.VPE_HelixienPump.label: helixien pump
LanguageData.VPE_IndustrialHelixienGenerator.descript: Produces a large amount of power by consuming helixien gas. Must be connected to a gas pipe network.
LanguageData.VPE_IndustrialHelixienGenerator.label: industrial helixien gas powered generator
LanguageData.VPE_LightningRod.description: An advanced technology allows this device to harness the power of lightning and place it as a ready-to-use charge in the batteries.
LanguageData.VPE_LightningRod.label: lightning rod
LanguageData.VPE_ChemfuelPond.description: A natural source of chemfuel, more common in arid biomes. A chemfuel pump can be installed here to extract the chemfuel. The pond will run out eventually.
LanguageData.VPE_ChemfuelPond.label: chemfuel pond
LanguageData.VPE_HelixienGeyser.description: A natural source of high-pressure gas. Helixien gas pumps can be built on top to extract the gas.
LanguageData.VPE_HelixienGeyser.label: helixien gas geyser
LanguageData.VPE_NuclearGenerator.description:
A large nuclear reactor repurposed from a ship power core. Consumes uranium to produce large amounts of power. Can be overloaded, resulting in even larger power output at the cost of local radiation.

Nuclear reactor will quickly overheat and should be cooled at all times.

Cannot be placed outdoors.
LanguageData.VPE_NuclearGenerator.label: nuclear reactor
LanguageData.VFE_IndustrialChemfuelPoweredGenerator.d: Produces a large amount of power by consuming chemfuel. Must be periodically refueled by hand.
LanguageData.VFE_IndustrialWoodFiredGenerator.descrip: Produces a large amount of power by consuming wood. Must be periodically loaded with wood fuel by hand.
LanguageData.VFE_IndustrialWoodFiredGenerator.label: industrial wood-fired generator
LanguageData.VFE_PortableChemfuelPoweredGenerator.des: Produces a small amount of power by consuming chemfuel. Must be periodically refueled by hand. This generator is light enough to be carried around.
LanguageData.VFE_PortableWoodFiredGenerator.descripti: Produces a small amount of power by consuming wood. Must be periodically loaded with wood fuel by hand. This generator is light enough to be carried around.
LanguageData.VFE_PortableWoodFiredGenerator.label: portable wood-fired generator
LanguageData.VFE_TidalGenerator.description: Produces electricity from moving masses of water, particularly tides. Must be placed on water.
LanguageData.VFE_TidalGenerator.label: tidal generator
LanguageData.VFE_LargeVanometricPowerCell.description: Generates a large amount of free energy, forever, without using fuel. This technology is developed by archotechs, and is beyond even most glitterworld societies. While nobody knows exactly how it works, scholars believe it somehow extracts energy directly from fluctuations in the quantum foam.
LanguageData.VFE_LargeVanometricPowerCell.label: large vanometric power cell
LanguageData.VFE_SmallVanometricPowerCell.description: Generates a very small amount of free energy, forever, without using fuel. This technology is developed by archotechs, and is beyond even most glitterworld societies. While nobody knows exactly how it works, scholars believe it somehow extracts energy directly from fluctuations in the quantum foam.
LanguageData.VFE_SmallVanometricPowerCell.label: small vanometric power cell
LanguageData.VPE_ArchotechViolenceGenerator.descripti: This device taps into psychic energy leaving the bodies of surrounding humanoids, changing it directly into usable energy. This technology is developed by archotechs, and is beyond even most glitterworld societies.
LanguageData.VPE_ArchotechViolenceGenerator.label: archotech violence generator
LanguageData.Gas_Helixien.label: helixien gas
LanguageData.VFEPD_Aaklac.description: A rare, huge flower which can be found in the deepest jungles. Its quite striking colour and nice smell makes it popular in gardening, if it can be extracted from the deep jungle, of course. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Aaklac.label: aaklac
LanguageData.VFEPD_AgaricusDomeCap.description: Everything about this fungus screams "I'm toxic, stay away from me". This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AgaricusDomeCap.label: agaricus domecap
LanguageData.VFEPD_AgariluxPrime.description: An unbelievably large exemplar of Agarilux. This myconic colony has adapted perfectly to its environment. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AgariluxPrime.label: agarilux prime
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienGrass.description: This grass is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based. Not very edible for terrestrial creatures. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienGrass.label: ocular grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienTree.description: This tree is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based, and it seems to be struggling to grow from exposure to a terrestrial environment. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienTree.label: ocular tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienTree_Polluted.description: This ocular tree has been affected by pollution and mutated in strange ways. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienTree_Polluted.label: mutated ocular tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArbuscularMycorrhiza.description: A mycorrhiza is a symbiotic association between a fungus and a plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArbuscularMycorrhiza.label: arbuscular mycorrhiza
LanguageData.VFEPD_BloodBouquet.description: A spiny plant with some kind of fruit hanging from its top. The fruit seems to be as hard as the trunk itself, and equally covered in spines. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BloodBouquet.label: blood bouquet
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrownBarrelCactus.description: The brown barrel cactus, Ferocactus Brunetus, is an extremophile plant that thrives in low-water and poor sunlight conditions. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrownBarrelCactus.label: brown barrel cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalFlower.description: A tall, translucent flower that seems to be partially inorganic. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalFlower.label: crystal flower
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalHorn.description: This strange flower seems to be only partially organic. Part of its structure is clearly crystalline, and it appears to be unaffected, or even bolstered, by the extremely cold climate. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalHorn.label: crystal horn
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeadBowerTree.description: Despite its common name, the dead bower tree is not truly dead, just exceptionally adapted to survival in arid weather. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeadBowerTree.label: dead bower tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_DribblingCap.description: A huge pink mushroom, constantly dribbling a pungent, resin-like substance. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DribblingCap.label: dribbling cap
LanguageData.VFEPD_DriedRavenNettle.description: Tangled, thorny, woody shoots covered with leaves. Raven nettle grows in clusters, and slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DriedRavenNettle.label: dried raven nettle
LanguageData.VFEPD_EuphorbiaDesiccata.description: A plant of the euphorbia genus, commonly called spurges. This plant is a variety of the Euphorbia Rimworldia plant that has adapted to polluted environments. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EuphorbiaDesiccata.label: euphorbia desiccata
LanguageData.VFEPD_EuphorbiaRimworldia.description: A plant of the euphorbia genus, commonly called spurges. This plant has adapted to arid climates and stores a lot of water inside their spine-covered leaves. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EuphorbiaRimworldia.label: euphorbia rimworldia
LanguageData.VFEPD_ExoticFlowers.description: A bunch of colourful flowers. These are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ExoticFlowers.label: exotic flowers
LanguageData.VFEPD_EyeGrass.label: flowering ocular grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_FanPalm.description: This exuberant palm grows in areas with a rich soil surrounding the tar pits. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FanPalm.label: fan palm
LanguageData.VFEPD_FirevineTree.description: Firevine trees are pyrophitic plants that are able to survive wildfires due to a clever layer of thermal insulation provided by their fire retardant bark. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FirevineTree.label: firevine tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FlashFrozenTree.description: This tree, which probably started growing in a rare period of summer heat, has been frozen in place by the extreme temperatures, its leaves crystallized by the toxic propane compounds. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FlashFrozenTree.label: flash frozen tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FrostLeaf.description: These translucent plants seem to be able to grow almost anywhere, even in some snow covered areas. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FrostLeaf.label: frost leaf
LanguageData.VFEPD_GargantuanLithops.description: Lithops is a genus of succulent plants often known as pebble plants or living stones, due to their stone-like appearance that allows them to avoid being eaten by blending in with surrounding rocks. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GargantuanLithops.label: gargantuan lithops
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantAgarilux.description: A colossal purple mushroom. Its size and glowing protrusions make this fungus beautiful to look at. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantAgarilux.label: giant agarilux
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantAgariTox.description: A giant mushroom that has adapted to growing in extremely polluted environments. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantAgariTox.label: agaritox
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantFlower.description: Giant flowers genetically modified by a long-forgotten genetics company using the genome of a hibiscus plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantFlower.label: giant mutant hibiscus
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantGamma.description: Like many other flora from the Forsakens native planet, this huge globular plant is bioluminescent. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantGamma.label: giant gamma
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantSeptimum.description: This Septimum plant has grown to an enormous size, with a flowering top as large as a person. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantSeptimum.label: giant septimum
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantStikehr.description: A giant alien mushroom that glows in the strange darkening mist. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantStikehr.label: giant stikehr
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantSunflower.description: Giant flowers genetically modified by a long-forgotten genetics company using the genome of the common sunflower plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantSunflower.label: giant sunflower.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantToxicFlower.description: A continously blooming giant flower with a dangerous, bright pink colour. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantToxicFlower.label: giant toxic flower
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantTulip.description: Giant flowers genetically modified by a long-forgotten genetics company using the genome of a tulip plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantTulip.label: giant tulips
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlobularPlant.description: A sickly pink orb supported by a network of gnarled branches. A reddish sap constantly drips from its wood, and seems to keep insects at bay. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlobularPlant.label: globular aberration
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlobularPlant_Polluted.description: This globular aberration has been affected by pollution and mutated in strange ways. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlobularPlant_Polluted.label: polluted globular aberration
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowingGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowingGrass.label: glowing grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gomphoeria.description: An unusually tall plant with bright, pink nodules. Its nodules are slightly toxic for humans, and it produces a strange, rotten fruit smell, so it is considered absolutely inedible. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gomphoeria.label: gomphoeria
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreenRockFern.description: A wild tall fern. Slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreenRockFern.label: green rock fern
LanguageData.VFEPD_HalfAlienTree.description: A strange infection seems to be transforming this regular oak into an ocular tree. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HalfAlienTree.label: half transformed ocular tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_HardyGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HardyGrass.label: hardy grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Iashiphus.description: This vivid green plant seem to be related to cacti. Though it's fleshy bark is not edible, it produces flowers than can be consumed by humans. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Iashiphus.label: iashiphus
LanguageData.VFEPD_JungleTree.description: This jungle tree is not of terrestrial origins, originating from the deepest crevices of an alien jungle. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JungleTree.label: deep jungle tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_JungleTree_Polluted.description: This jungle polux tree has adapted so perfectly to polluted soil and airborne toxins that it doesn't even need to remove pollution from its environment. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JungleTree_Polluted.label: deep jungle polux
LanguageData.VFEPD_KeeningCordax.description: The keening cordax is a carnivore plant so called for the high-pitched sound that it makes during the day. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_KeeningCordax.label: keening cordax
LanguageData.VFEPD_LandCoral.description: A very strange purple coloured fungus that resembles a coral. Grows only in polluted soil. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LandCoral.label: amethyst land coral fungus
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeSlimyTree.description: This tree doesn't seem to be entirely solid. Upon further examination, it isn't an independent entity, its roots fusing seamlessly with the hardened gelatinous ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeSlimyTree.label: large slimy tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_LilacBeacon.description: The lilac beacon is a tall mushroom with a bright purple cap. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LilacBeacon.label: lilac beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_MangrovePalm.description: A palm tree adapted to the mangrove conditions. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MangrovePalm.label: mangrove palm
LanguageData.VFEPD_MangroveTree.description: A tree that grows in saline or brackish water. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MangroveTree.label: mangrove tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ParasiticMangrove.description: A weird, colourful plant adapted to extract nutrients from mangrove trees. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ParasiticMangrove.label: parasitic mangrove
LanguageData.VFEPD_PollutedStikehr.description: A giant alien mushroom that glows in the strange darkening mist. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PollutedStikehr.label: polluted stikehr
LanguageData.VFEPD_RavenNettle.description: Tangled, thorny, woody shoots covered with leaves. Raven nettle grows in clusters, and slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RavenNettle.label: raven nettle
LanguageData.VFEPD_RecurvedStropharia.description: A big greyish mushroom. Its size and glowing protrusions make this fungus beautiful to look at. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RecurvedStropharia.label: recurved stropharia
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedBugloss.description: One of the weirdest plants from Earth, genetically modified to thrive in wet, warm environments. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedBugloss.label: red bugloss
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedLeaves.description: This grass is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based. Not very edible for terrestrial creatures. This one is fake.
