LanguageData.VFEPD_RedLeaves.label: ocular plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedPlantsTall.description: This grass is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based. Not very edible for terrestrial creatures. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedPlantsTall.label: ocular plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_RimeNodules.description: A very strange plant, partly inorganic, that seems to extract propane from the surrounding landscape and store it as an energy source in rime-bound chemical sacs. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RimeNodules.label: rime nodules
LanguageData.VFEPD_SessileMechanoid.description: This thing was once a tree. Mechanoids repurposed its cells into a half-tree, half-mechanoid abomination, serving an unknown purpose. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SessileMechanoid.label: sessile mechanoid tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Slimecasia.description: Although at first sight this seems to be an independent plant, its roots are intricately interconnected with the rest of the gelatinous superorganism. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Slimecasia.label: slimecasia
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyFern.description: Although at first sight this seems to be an independent plant, its roots are intricately interconnected with the rest of the gelatinous superorganism. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyFern.label: slimy fern
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyPholiota.description: A blueish-pink mushroom, secreting a slimy substance that attracts insects. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyPholiota.label: slimy pholiota
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyTree.description: This tree doesn't seem to be entirely solid. Upon further examination, it isn't an independent entity, its roots fusing seamlessly with the hardened gelatinous ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyTree.label: slimy tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_SugarFamewort.description: The sugar famewort grows in areas with a high concentration of pollinating insects. It generates a sweet nectar that attracts these insects, and they disperse its pollen when they feed on it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SugarFamewort.label: sugar famewort
LanguageData.VFEPD_TallSlimyGrass.description: Wild tall grass. Slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TallSlimyGrass.label: tall slimy grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_TangleTea.description: This strange plant seems to be of alien origins. It doesn't seem to be fit for human consumption. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TangleTea.label: tangle tea
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacularPlant.description: This plant is completely alien. The blue nodules at the end of each branch / tentacle produce an eerie rattling sound from time to time. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacularPlant.label: tentacular aberration
LanguageData.VFEPD_TinkleGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TinkleGrass.label: tinkle grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiBulb.description: This slimy bulb seems to be feeding on the polluted terrain like a parasite. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiBulb.label: toxibulb
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicGamma.description: A huge bioluminescent globular plant. Can be used as a natural sunlamp to grow regular plants, though the toxic environment it grows at might not be the best for cultivation. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicGamma.label: toxic gamma
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiGrass.label: toxi grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeepingToxberry.description: A short toxin-adapted shrub with berries so unbelievably toxic that no animal would ever dare consume them. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeepingToxberry.label: weeping toxberry
LanguageData.VFEPD_WildRadagast.description: This twisting alien plant grows small glowing berries. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WildRadagast.label: wild radagast
LanguageData.VFEPD_WitchesOyster.description: A small, ramified fungal colony with a pungent aroma. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WitchesOyster.label: witches' oyster
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBandNode.descript: A broken mechanoid-band signal amplifier. Its antennas are bent in weird angles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBandNode.label: ancient band node
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBasicRecharger.de: A broken mech recharger. The connecting pins are bent and chipped, making the whole machine useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientFaultyLamp.descri: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. It seems to have stopped producing light.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientFaultyLamp.label: ancient faulty lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneAssembler.des: A workbench for creating implantable xenogerms from genepacks stored in nearby gene banks. This device has collapsed in on itself, rendering it useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneBank.descript: This device was able to store genepacks and make them usable to create new xenogerms, when placed near a gene assembler. It has corroded beyond any repair, and the genepacks stored inside are far gone.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneBank.label: ancient gene bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneExtractor.des: An automated surgery machine that was able to extract a person's genes and create a genepack from them. Its internal machinery is completely fused and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneProcessor.des: A genetic analysis and processing system. Ruined and unuseable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGrowthVat.descrip: A vat of fluid which was able to gestate an embryo or accelerate a child's growth. Its transparent plasteel sheel has been smashed open, seemingly from the inside... Ominous.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGrowthVat.label: ancient growth vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientHugeBank.descript: A huge gene bank, much larger than the ones in use nowadays. Completely broken.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientHugeBank.label: ancient huge gene bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLamp.label: ancient broken lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLargeMechGestator: A tank used to create new mechanoids. The mechanite tank was punctured long ago, and all the fluid has long since evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLargeRecharger.de: A broken mech recharger. The connecting pins are bent and chipped, making the whole machine useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientMechGestator.desc: A tank used to create new mechanoids. The mechanite tank was punctured long ago, and all the fluid has long since evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientPollutionPump.des: This pump isn't going to pump anything at all anytime soon.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientShelf.label: ancient shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientSubcoreRipscanner: This thing is SO edgy. Like, SUPER edgy. Basically a medical bed with spikes. I bet it only worked if you played symphonic metal in the background. I blame Oskar.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientVitalsMonitor.des: A broken vitals monitor with a dead screen.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientWastepackAtomizer: This was just a fancy waste bin, and it is now just a broken waste bin.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHospitalBed.description: A bed specially designed for use in hospitals. The mattress has rotted away into nothingness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHospitalBed.label: ancient hospital bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabLamp.description: A metallic post with a glass cilinder filled with some bioluminescent compound. It seems to have stopped producing light.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabLamp.label: ancient lab lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atheism.description: This is a mote prop for "Atheism". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atheism.label: atheism
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJar.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJar.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarB.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarB.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarC.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarC.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarD.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarD.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CavePaintings.description: This is a mote prop for "Cave paintings". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CavePaintings.label: cave paintings
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cog.description: This is a mote prop for "Cog". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cog.label: cog
LanguageData.VFEPD_EmptyGrogBarrel.description: A huge, decorative grog barrel. This one is completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EmptyGrogBarrel.label: empty grog barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_EyeOfHorus.description: This is a mote prop for "Eye of Ra". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EyeOfHorus.label: eye of ra
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyFemale.description: A fake female mummy. The latest rage in decorating.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyFemale.label: fake mummy (f)
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyMale.description: A fake male mummy. The latest rage in decorating.

LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticPyramid.description: A truly colossal metallic structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticPyramid.label: futuristic great pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticStele.label: futuristic stele
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandGate.description: A huge entrance for a kemetic city.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandGate.label: grand gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreatPyramid.description: A truly colossal stone structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreatPyramid.label: great pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_JainSpire.description: This is a mote prop for "Jain spire". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.

LanguageData.VFEPD_Khanda.description: This is a mote prop for "Khanda". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Khanda.label: khanda
LanguageData.VFEPD_Megalith.description: A large stone used to construct a prehistoric structure or monument, either alone or together with other stones, often hewn in definite shapes for special purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Megalith.label: megalith
LanguageData.VFEPD_Obelisk.description: This is a mote prop for "Obelisk". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.

LanguageData.VFEPD_Skull.description: Arrrr, matey, this here be a mote prop for "Skull". Shiver me timber, this be intrinsically laggy, me lad, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation, ye scurvy sea dog.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Skull.label: skull
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallPyramid.description: A gigantic stone structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallPyramid.label: pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sphinx.description: A truly colossal statue of a sphinx, a mythical creature with the head of a human, and the body of a lion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sphinx.label: sphinx
LanguageData.VFEPD_Star.description: This is a mote prop for "Star". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Star.label: star
LanguageData.VFEPD_AV_Cog.description: A medieval sailing vessel characterized by a sturdy, broad-bottomed design with a single mast and a square-rigged sail. It was commonly used for trade, transportation, and exploration during the Middle Ages in Europe. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_AV_Cog.label: cog
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brig.description: A two-masted sailing vessel with square rigging on both masts, typically carrying a fore-and-aft sail on the aftermast. Brigs were widely used for both naval and merchant purposes due to their combination of maneuverability and relatively large cargo capacity. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brig.label: brig
LanguageData.VFEPD_Caravel.description: A caravel is a small, fast, and versatile sailing ship known for its narrow hull, multiple masts, and combination of square and lateen sails. It was widely used for exploration, trade, and naval activities during the Age of Discovery. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Caravel.label: caravel
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frigate.description: A warship with a sleek design, fast and maneuverable, originally developed for escort and protection duties in the Age of Sail. Frigates usually feature a single continuous gun deck, carrying a mix of cannons and other armaments. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frigate.label: frigate
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galleon.description: A large, multi-decked sailing ship primarily designed for transporting goods over long distances across oceans. It features a sturdy hull with ample cargo hold space, multiple masts rigged with square sails for propulsion, and a high stern and forecastle for additional cargo storage and crew quarters. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galleon.label: galleon
LanguageData.VFEPD_Junk.description: A junk ship is a traditional sailing vessel known for its unique design, featuring a high stern and a flat bottom. It often employs multiple sails and was historically used for various maritime activities such as trade, fishing, and transportation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Junk.label: junk
LanguageData.VFEPD_Longship.description: A type of narrow and relatively long boat with a sleek design, often equipped with sails for propulsion. It is commonly used for various purposes such as transportation, exploration, and warfare throughout history. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Longship.label: longship
LanguageData.VFEPD_PirateCaravel.description: A caravel is a small, fast, and versatile sailing ship known for its narrow hull, multiple masts, and combination of square and lateen sails. It was widely used for exploration, trade, and naval activities during the Age of Discovery. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_PirateCaravel.label: pirate caravel
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sloop.description: A single-masted sailing vessel with a fore-and-aft rig, typically equipped with a mainsail and one or more headsails. Sleek and agile, sloops are versatile vessels used for various purposes such as racing, cruising, fishing, and coastal patrols. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sloop.label: sloop
LanguageData.VFEPD_BenzPatentMotorwagen.description: The Benz Patent-Motorwagen, built in 1885 by Karl Benz, is widely regarded as the first practical automobile. It was a three-wheeled vehicle powered by a single-cylinder, four-stroke engine. Benz patented the design in 1886, marking the birth of the modern car. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BenzPatentMotorwagen.label: benz patent-motorwagen
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelA.description: The Ford Model A, produced from 1927 to 1931, was the successor to the Model T and marked a significant advancement in automotive design and technology. It featured a more modern look with improved styling, a more powerful 3.3-liter four-cylinder engine, and enhanced driving comfort. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelA.label: ford model a
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelAAmbulance.description: The Ford Model A, produced from 1927 to 1931, was the successor to the Model T and marked a significant advancement in automotive design and technology. It featured a more modern look with improved styling, a more powerful 3.3-liter four-cylinder engine, and enhanced driving comfort. This model has been converted into an ambulance. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelAAmbulance.label: ford model a ambulance
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelAFireTruck.description: The Ford Model A, produced from 1927 to 1931, was the successor to the Model T and marked a significant advancement in automotive design and technology. It featured a more modern look with improved styling, a more powerful 3.3-liter four-cylinder engine, and enhanced driving comfort. This model has been refitted as a fire truck. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelAFireTruck.label: ford model a firetruck
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelT.description: Produced from 1908 to 1927, the Ford Model T is one of the most iconic cars in automotive history. It was the first automobile mass-produced on moving assembly lines, making it affordable and accessible to a wide audience. Powered by a 2.9-liter, four-cylinder engine, the Model T revolutionized transportation and became a symbol of early 20th-century innovation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelT.label: ford model t
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelTVan.description: Produced from 1908 to 1927, the Ford Model T is one of the most iconic cars in automotive history. It was the first automobile mass-produced on moving assembly lines, making it affordable and accessible to a wide audience. Powered by a 2.9-liter, four-cylinder engine, the Model T revolutionized transportation and became a symbol of early 20th-century innovation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelTVan.label: ford model t
LanguageData.VFEPD_OldsmobileLightTonneau.description: The Oldsmobile Light Tonneau, introduced in 1905, was an early automobile featuring a larger, more powerful design compared to the earlier Curved Dash model. It had a four-seat, open-top body style known as a "tonneau," with a rear seating area that could be accessed via a side door. Powered by a two-cylinder engine, it offered more horsepower and improved performance. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OldsmobileLightTonneau.label: oldsmobile light tonneau
LanguageData.VFEPD_OldsmobileModelRCurvedDash.descrip: Produced from 1901 to 1907, the Oldsmobile Model R, "Curved Dash" was the first mass-produced car in the world. It featured a distinctive curved front dash (hence the name) and was powered by a single-cylinder engine, producing about 5 horsepower. Affordable and reliable, it became one of the most popular early automobiles, helping to establish Oldsmobile as a key player in the emerging car industry. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OldsmobileModelRCurvedDash.label: oldsmobile curved dash
LanguageData.VFEPD_RenaultTypeK.description: The Renault Type K, produced in 1902, was a significant early automobile that gained fame for its victory in the 1902 Paris-Vienna race. Designed by the Renault brothers, it featured a four-cylinder engine, which was advanced for its time, delivering more power and speed than many contemporary vehicles. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RenaultTypeK.label: renault type k
LanguageData.VFEPD_RollsRoyceSilverGhost.description: The Rolls-Royce Silver Ghost, introduced in 1906, is often regarded as one of the most iconic and luxurious cars of the early 20th century. Powered by a 7.0-liter six-cylinder engine, the Silver Ghost was renowned for its smooth performance, reliability, and quiet operation, earning it the nickname "the best car in the world." Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RollsRoyceSilverGhost.label: rolls royce silver ghost
LanguageData.VFEPD_Balloon.description: A lighter-than-air aircraft consisting of a bag, called an envelope, which contains heated air. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Balloon.label: balloon
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chariot.description: A simple horse-driven cart that provides fast transportation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the horse is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chariot.label: chariot
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoveredCarriage.description: A horse-drawn four-wheeled vehicle used to transport people. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the horses are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoveredCarriage.label: covered carriage
LanguageData.VFEPD_DogSled.description: A sled pulled by four trained dogs used to travel over ice and through snow. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the dogs are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DogSled.label: dog sled
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hwacha.description: A primitive type of artillery designed to fire multiple rocket-powered iron-tipped arrows at once. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hwacha.label: hwacha
LanguageData.VFEPD_OutriggerCanoe.description: A watercraft featuring a lateral support float known as an outrigger, which is fastened to one of the sides of the main hull. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OutriggerCanoe.label: outrigger canoe
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxCart.description: A two wheeled cart pulled by oxen. A means of transportation used since ancient times, the ox cart is generally used to carry goods, such as agrarian produce or lumber. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the oxen are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxCart.label: ox cart
LanguageData.VFEPD_Palanquin.description: A covered litter carried on poles on the shoulders of two bearers. A palanquin is not an efficient mode of transportation. Non-functional: its doors are sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Palanquin.label: palanquin
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rickshaw.description: A mode of human-powered transport by which a runner draws a two-wheeled cart which seats another person. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rickshaw.label: rickshaw
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarChariot.description: The war chariot is a mobile archery platform operated by two people, with the driver steering the chariot with his reins while the main archer aims his bow and arrow at any targets within range. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarChariot.label: war chariot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheelbarrow.description: The wheelbarrow: Your trusty sidekick for moving stuff from 'point A' to 'point B' with all the pizzazz of a one-wheel parade float. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheelbarrow.label: wheelbarrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientConcreteBarrier.description: A traffic management solution from long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientConcreteBarrier.label: ancient concrete barrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepPod.description: A single-use pod for preserving one person in a state of suspended animation. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepPod.label: ancient cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamp.description: An ancient self-powered lamp. Its internal power supply is completely depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamp.label: ancient lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamppost.description: Road lighting from long ago. No longer functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamppost.label: ancient lamppost
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScrapChunk.description: A chunk of a scrapped spacecraft. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScrapChunk.label: scrap ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk.description: A chunk of a spacecraft. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk.label: ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPart.description: An ancient ship part. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPart.label: ship part
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPartDefoliator.description: An ancient ship part. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPartDefoliator.label: defoliator ship part
LanguageData.VFEPD_Urn.label: urn
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDamagedSunlamp.description: An ancient self-powered sun lamp. Its internal power supply is completely depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDamagedSunlamp.label: damaged sun lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDualHydroponicsBasin.descri: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDualHydroponicsBasin.label: ancient dual hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientDispenser.descripti: An ancient nutrient solution dispenser that was used to process and convert nutrient ointments into nutrient solutions, and then transport nutrient solutions for hydroponic cultivation through a pipeline system. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientDispenser.label: ancient nutrient solution dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientPump.description: An ancient nutrient solution pump. This pump has been damaged.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientPump.label: ancient nutrient pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientSolutionFermenter.d: An ancient nutrient solution fermenter used to process a series of raw food or fertilizers in a fermentation tank and separate them to obtain nutrient solution. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientSolutionStorageTank: Ancient nutrient solution storage tanks. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSunlamp.description: An ancient self-powered sun lamp. Its shell is sturdy, and it was powered by a thermonuclear battery, now depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSunlamp.label: ancient sun lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClothCrate.description: Fake bolts of cloth stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClothCrate.label: cloth crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydro.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydro.label: damaged ancient hydroponics

LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroC.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DevilstrandCrate.description: Fake bolts of devilstrand stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DevilstrandCrate.label: devilstrand crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientDispenser.description: A nutrient solution dispenser used to process and convert nutrient ointments into nutrient solutions, and then transport nutrient solutions for hydroponic cultivation through a pipeline system. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientDispenser.label: nutrient solution dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientPipes.description: Steel nutrient pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientPipes.label: nutrient pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionCrate.description: Fake boxes of nutrient solution stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionCrate.label: nutrient solution crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionFermenter.descript: A nutrient solution fermenter used to process a series of raw food or fertilizers in a fermentation tank and separate them to obtain nutrient solution. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionFermenter.label: nutrient solution fermenter

LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutomaticDrillingRig.descri: The remains of what was an automatic drill designed for automatic ore extraction, once supported by a multitude of infrastructures. Missing most supporting infrastructures, and, most critically, its core components, it wouldn't function as of now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutomaticDrillingRig.label: ancient automatic drilling rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierGate.description: An ancient barrier gate that's no longer functioning properly.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierGate.label: ancient barrier gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenTurret.description: This large shotgun turret, badly damaged, is no longer usable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenTurret.label: ancient broken turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectricalEquipment.descrip: Weathered electrical appliances once used in an ancient tunnel boring machines. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectricalEquipment.label: ancient electrical appliances
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmptyMiningCar.label: ancient empty mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorBucketWheel.descri: A rusted bucket wheel of ancient giant rock excavator. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorBucketWheel.label: ancient excavator bucket wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorPowerFacilities.de: Torn power system of the ancient giant rock excavator. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantRockExcavator.descript: The gigantic husk of what was a mountain-devouring mechanical beast, larger than most conventional buildings. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantRockExcavator.label: ancient giant rock excavator chassis
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndoorFireHydrants.descript: An ancient fire hydrant with no water left inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndoorFireHydrants.label: ancient indoor fire hydrants
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralConveyor.description: A torn ancient mineral conveyor once used for transporting minerals. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralConveyor.label: ancient mineral conveyor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralExports.description: A piece of ancient mineral outlet. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralExports.label: ancient mineral outlet

LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMudCarriage.label: ancient mud carriage
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOreDressingMachine.descript: An ancient ore dressing machine. Non-functional
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOreDressingMachine.label: ancient ore dressing machine

LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRockMiningCar.label: ancient rock mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruckMining.descripti: An ancient truck stripped of any useful parts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruckMining.label: ancient rusted truck

LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSemiTrailer.label: ancient semi trailer

LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTruckCompartment.label: ancient truck compartment

LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelBoringMachine.label: ancient tunnel boring machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelStructuralSupport_a.d: A piece of ancient tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.

LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumMiningCars.label: ancient uranium mining car

Missing most supporting infrastructures, and, most critically, its core components, it wouldn't function as of now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AutomaticDrillingRig.label: automatic drilling rig

LanguageData.VFEPD_WarningBoard.label: warning board
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBattery.description: An old, large battery commonly found in vaults, capable of sustaining the entire compound for a nearly infinite amount of time. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBattery.label: ancient battery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBedTwo.description: An old-fashioned metal bed frame with a hard mattress and uncomfortable duvet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBedTwo.label: ancient bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBatteryTank.description: Produces a reliable stream of power by consuming biological material such as humans or animals. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBatteryTank.label: ancient bio-battery tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenDefensiveTurret.label: ancient broken defensive turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBustedTurretPlatform.descri: A destroyed platform for a turret.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBustedTurretPlatform.label: ancient busted turret platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemfuelPoweredGenerator.de: Produces a reliable stream of power by consuming chemfuel. Or it would, if it was working.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientComputerDesk.description: An old, no longer operational computer desk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientComputerDesk.label: ancient computer desk
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepSuspender.descri: An ancient medical pod that uses partial cryptosleep to slow down the degredation of wounds and help the body heal. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepSuspender.label: ancient cryptosleep suspender
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEducator.description: A very old interactive machine that’s commonly used in the vaults to pass the time. This one is just deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEducator.label: ancient educator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFoosballTable.description: An old relic of the times, foosball table allows players to engage in the long forgotten game of football without leaving the safety of the vault. Or it would, but its rods are soldered and immobile.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFoosballTable.label: ancient foosball table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelTank.description: A large fuel tank that could be deconstructed for fuel. If it still had any.

LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Poppy.label: poppy
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tent.description: A small, personal tent no larger than a single person bed. Purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tent.label: tent
LanguageData.VFEPD_TheatreStage.description: A lightly decorated wooden stage meant to provide area for props and actors both to create compelling scenes. Purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TheatreStage.label: theatre stage
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thermaebath.description: A very large, heated stone bath meant to be shared by several patrons. This one isn't heated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thermaebath.label: thermaebath

LanguageData.VFEPD_Aerodrone.description: Aerodrone is a spacer-tech, unmanned aerial vehicle equipped with advanced sensors and a missile payload. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Aerodrone.label: aerodrone
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneBatteryPack.description: A large, overcharged aerodrone battery. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneBatteryPack.label: aerodrone battery pack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.descriptio: A large military crate of aerodrone munitions. Upon closer inspection, all the missiles are fake plastic ones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.label: aerodrone munitions crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Autocannon.description: A small-sized box containing autocannon ammunition. Used by Palintone turrets to reload. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic slugs.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Autocannon.label: autocannon ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Missile.description: A small-sized box containing missiles. Used by Onager turrets to reload. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic missiles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Missile.label: missile ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_UraniumSlug.description: A small-sized box containing uranium slug ammunition. Used by Kontarion turrets to reload. May explode when damaged. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic slugs.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_UraniumSlug.label: uranium slug ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosecuredCrate.description: A small imperial crate containing extremely valuable items. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosecuredCrate.label: biosecured crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnoutIntelScraper.description: A deserter device capable of intercepting imperial communication. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnoutIntelScraper.label: burnout intel scraper
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeserterShuttle.description: A spacer-tech shuttle designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeserterShuttle.label: deserter shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelTank.description: A large fuel tank used to refuel Imperial shuttles. Completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelTank.label: fuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMaxpack.description: The Imperial maxpack is a formidable armored transport truck, known for its impressive cargo capacity. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMaxpack.label: imperial maxpack
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMegaHighShield.description: An advanced shielding apparatus. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMegaHighShield.label: imperial mega high-shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialUnderfarm.description: An underground hydroponics basic used by the empire to feed their subjects. Upon closer inspection it is disconnected from the water mains and all its plants are made of plastic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialUnderfarm.label: imperial underfarm
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupplyCrate.description: A small imperial crate containing valuables. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupplyCrate.label: supply crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceDisplayBank.descriptio: An imperial computer interface. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceDisplayBank.label: surveillance display bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillancePillar.description: A large pillar with a series of sensors, cameras and motion detectors. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillancePillar.label: surveillance pillar
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceStation.description: A large console designed to link to surrounding surveillance pillars. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceStation.label: surveillance console
LanguageData.VFEPD_TechiteDiscStack.description: A compact stack of discs crafted from the enigmatic element known as techite, produced exclusively by the Empire for knowledge transcribing. These are all blank.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TechiteDiscStack.label: techite disc stack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Techprinter.description: The Techprinter is a marvel of technological innovation, designed to capture and preserve the intricate knowledge residing within a techfriar’s mind. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Techprinter.label: techprinter
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterMain.description: A large node connecting all the nearby water mains. Upon closer inspection it is disconnected from the water grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterMain.label: water main
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.descriptio: A capacitor bank that transforms electricity into raw energy for the Zeus cannon. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.label: zeus cannon capacitor bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonControlStation.descripti: This terminal serves as the primary interface for operating the Zeus Cannon batteries. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonControlStation.label: zeus cannon control station
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonStatic.description: A relic of ancient Sophiamundan technology, the Zeus Cannon is a closely guarded secret of the Empire. Wait, what is this? It's... made of cardboard!
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonStatic.label: static zeus cannon
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigFalseFire.description: This is just smoke and mirrors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigFalseFire.label: big fake fire
LanguageData.VFEPD_BuryPawnEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Bury Pawn". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BuryPawnEffect.label: bury pawn

LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmoredImperialShuttle.label: armored imperial shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialBanner.description: A decorative banner hanging from a vertical wooden frame.

LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBattery.description: A very efficient ancient battery. Sadly out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBattery.label: ancient microbiobattery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateDouble.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateDouble.label: ancient ruined crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePile.description: Whatever these crates contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePile.label: pile of ancient ruined crates
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateTwo.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateTwo.label: ancient ruined crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryofreezer.description: A super-charged air-conditioning unit designed for its intended purpose of preventing genomes from breaking down entropically. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryofreezer.label: ancient cryofreezer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowomb.description: This device has collapsed in on itself, rendering it useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowomb.label: ancient electrowomb
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowombLarge.descriptio: The exterior shell has completely fallen apart, yet it seems that it exploded instead of imploded.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowombLarge.label: ancient large electrowomb
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGeneticsTinkeringTable.desc: Most of the useful and otherwise functional parts are missing, indicating intentional sabotage.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeExtractor.description: Lacking proper maintenance for so long, this machine is rusted shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeExtractor.label: ancient genome extractor table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeRecombinator.descript: A very old recombinator that somehow possesses an awful stench and excessive mould.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeRecombinator.label: ancient genome recombinator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomorpher.description: A Genomorpher that has fallen into complete disrepair, some salvage still remains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomorpher.label: ancient genomorpher
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTechCrate.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTechCrate.label: ancient mechanized crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTissueGrinder.description: The machinery and electronics are irreparable but could be broken down for scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTissueGrinder.label: ancient tissue grinder
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioLight.description: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. Seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioLight.label: ancient bioluminescent light
LanguageData.VFEPD_CommsTable.description: This was once a smart table. But now it's dumb.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CommsTable.label: ancient comms table
LanguageData.VFEPD_LabLockerBank.description: An ancient, rusted bank of lockers. All of the lockers have been forced open with nothing valuable left behind.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LabLockerBank.label: ancient lab locker bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_LooseCables.description: This tangle of decayed cables were probably once housed inside the ceiling panels.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LooseCables.label: loose cables
LanguageData.VFEPD_MonitorBank.description: These monitors will never show any information again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MonitorBank.label: ancient monitor banks
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rack.description: This server rack once housed a lot of genetic information, but all its data has now degraded completely.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rack.label: ancient server rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybrid_Antenna.descrip: A collapsed antenna that is completely unable of transmitting anything ever again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybrid_Antenna.label: ancient mechahybrid antenna
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybridizer.description: The broken maws of this ancient factory will never be able to close again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybridizer.label: ancient mechahybridizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientBioBattery.descriptio: This ancient tank once converted biological matter into an electrical current. It is now completely broken and useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientBioBattery.label: ancient ruined bio-battery tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientGeneTailoringPod.desc: This ancient structure was once used to inject nanomachines in a subject in an attempt to create the perfect soldier. It now lies rusted and unsalvageable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalControlHub.description: It seems that this structure was capable of emitting some kind of electromagnetic radiation used to control brain function of certain animals. This was crude and primitive technology prone to failure and instability, and as such it is completely useless now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalControlHub.label: ancient animal control hub
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalEnrichmentCenter.descr: Whatever was held inside this dank, rusted metal coffin has long since escaped. It is damaged beyond all repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalEnrichmentCenter.label: ancient animal enrichment center
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchotechPlatform.descriptio: This deteriorated platform seems to have been used to assemble some kind of machinery. It now lays bare and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchotechPlatform.label: ancient construction platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedBarrelDouble.description: Whatever this barrel held has long ago evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedBarrelDouble.label: ancient ruined lab barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneDuplicator.description: This semi-spherical vat seems to have held some kind of viscuous liquid inside, as evidenced by the rancid-smelling residue coating its insides. It is now completely ruined and only useful as metal scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneDuplicator.label: ancient gene duplicator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenePod.description: An ancient genepod that was used to combine genetic material. This machine is obsolete and damaged beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenePod.label: ancient ruined genepod
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneRecombinator.description: A completely obsolete model of gene recombinator, that is also deteriorated and rusted beyond and salvaging.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneRecombinator.label: ancient gene recombinator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticDatabase.description: This ancient computer was used to storage genetic information and feed genetic dataprints to other machines, but its components have deteriorated so far that all the data it contained has degraded to nothingness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticDatabase.label: ancient genetic database
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticExtractionTable.descr: Yet another workstation that has deteriorated beyond all recovery. A foul-smelling vial of stagnant liquid warns you to keep away from it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticExtractionTable.label: ancient genetic extraction table
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticStorage.description: This little wheeled table housed a small specialized computer and refrigerated trays to store genetic material, but it is now so damaged it can only be used as scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticStorage.label: ancient genetic storage
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenomeSequencer.description: A large centrifuge used in gene sequencing. Its corroded parts will never be of use to anyone again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenomeSequencer.label: ancient genome sequencer
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHexagelPlant.label: ancient hexagel core reactor
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedIncubator.description: This small canister has been smashed to pieces and whatever it contained has long evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedIncubator.label: ancient ruined incubator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabBarrel.description: Whatever this barrel held has long ago evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabBarrel.label: ancient ruined lab barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabShelf.description: Rusted shelving units coated in grime and dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabShelf.label: ancient lab shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMechanoidTinkeringTable.desc: This workbench appears to have been used to try and reverse engineer mechanoid components, but it is damaged to the point of uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMutaniteCentrifuge.descripti: A machine used to process mutagenic minerals, now completely broken and unsalvageable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMutaniteCentrifuge.label: ancient mutanite centrifuge
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedNutrientVat.description: A slurry of liquefied organic pulp filled this reinforced glass vat. It now lays broken and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedNutrientVat.label: ancient nutrient vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulper.description: A weird-looking machine that shredded wood into organic pulp. Broken beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulper.label: ancient pulper
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulpRecycler.description: An obsolete, ancient machine that recycled wood, corpses and bones into organic pulp. Broken beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulpRecycler.label: ancient pulp recycler
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedRefrigeratedCoils.descriptio: These structural cryofuel coils have been completely ruined by time and neglect. They can no longer function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedRefrigeratedCoils.label: ancient refrigerated coils
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedTissueGrowingVat.description: A metal sarcophagus used to grow bio-mechanic implants in a controlled manner. Its machinery has been gutted and has later decayed into rusted scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedTissueGrowingVat.label: ancient tissue growing vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedVials.description: Small canisters that once held some valuable liquids.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedVials.label: ancient ruined vials
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignA.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignA.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignB.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignB.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignC.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignC.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignD.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignD.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignE.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignE.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignF.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignF.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignG.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignG.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignH.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignH.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sink.description: Drinking from this will give you more than just a few rads...
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sink.label: ancient sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallBioLight.description: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. Seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallBioLight.label: ancient bioluminescent light
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toilet.description: Drinking from this will give you more than just a few rads...
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toilet.label: ancient toilet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAirConditioner.description: An ancient air conditioning machine. Its internals were smashed long ago and what wasn't looted has rusted away in the time since.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAirConditioner.label: ancient air conditioner
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAPC.description: The remains of an ancient armored troop carrier which was destroyed by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAPC.label: ancient ruined APC
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientATM.description: An ancient ATM. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientATM.label: ancient ATM
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrel.description: An ancient, broken barrel that looks like it once contained waste of some sort. The only thing it contains now is a smear of dried sludge.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrel.label: ancient barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBed.description: An old, rotted mattress on a rusty frame.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBed.label: ancient bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCommsConsole.description: An ancient console with an attached communications dish. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCommsConsole.label: ancient comms console
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientContainer.description: A large container from some ancient freight carrying vehicle. It has long since been looted and deteriorated into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientContainer.label: ancient container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrate.description: An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained have degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrate.label: ancient crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDisplayBank.description: An ancient computer interface. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDisplayBank.label: ancient display bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDropshipEngine.description: An ancient dropship engine. It probably came off a military troop carrier. Its delicate internals are rusted to uselessness, and the valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDropshipEngine.label: ancient dropship engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEnemyTerminal.label: ancient enemy terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEquipmentBlocks.description: A collection of ancient equipment blocks of unknown function. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEquipmentBlocks.label: ancient equipment blocks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFence.description: An ancient fence made of reinforced concrete posts joined by concrete panels.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFence.label: ancient fence
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelNode.description: An ancient, depleted fuel node once used to charge machines with fuel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelNode.label: ancient fuel node
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenerator.description: An ancient electrical generator. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago, and the rest has rusted into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenerator.label: ancient generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantWheel.description: A giant wheel which came off some large vehicle many ages ago. The rubber has disintegrated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantWheel.label: ancient giant wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHermetic.description: A self-powered hermetically-sealed crate for preserving valuable items. These can preserve their contents for a long time. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHermetic.label: ancient hermetic crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHydrant.description: An ancient hydrant. Heavily rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHydrant.label: ancient hydrant
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientJetEngine.description: An ancient jet engine, probably detached from a large airplane. Its delicate internals are rusted to uselessness, and the valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientJetEngine.label: ancient jet engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientKitchenSink.description: An ancient kitchen sink made of some non-metallic fiber-sheet material. It is badly deteriorated and there's no way to salvage anything from it.\n\nHow it got here must be a long story.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientKitchenSink.label: ancient kitchen sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeCrate.description: A large crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeCrate.label: ancient large crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeRustedEngineBlock.desc: A large, ancient engine block from some giant vehicle or power source. It's rusted through, and all the useful components are gone. No repair could salvage this.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockerBank.description: An ancient, rusted bank of lockers. All of the lockers have been forced open with nothing valuable left behind.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockerBank.label: ancient locker bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLongCrate.description: A long, empty crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLongCrate.label: ancient long crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachine.description: A large ancient machine case filled with unknown machinery. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachine.label: ancient machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDetritus.description: The remains of a smashed mechanoid. All the useful components and materials are ruined or missing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDetritus.label: mechanoid detritus
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDropBeacon.description: The broken shell of a mech drop beacon. Its useful components are missing and the shell has deteriorated after many years.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDropBeacon.label: ancient mech drop beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonBarrel.descriptio: A barrel from a long-range cannon for artillery or anti-ship use. When it was new, it must have been frighteningly powerful. Now, it's far beyond repair and every useful component has been looted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonBarrel.label: ancient mega-cannon barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonTripod.descriptio: A mounting platform that once held some sort of cannon. It has been broken for many years and every useful component was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonTripod.label: ancient mega-cannon platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMicrowave.description: An ancient device for heating food. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMicrowave.label: ancient microwave
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryCrate.description: An ancient, military-looking crate. It was broken long ago and any valuables it once contained were looted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryCrate.label: ancient military crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiniWarwalkerRemains.descri: The shattered remains of an ancient sub-scale warsprinter. Whatever parts weren't ruined when it was destroyed were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiniWarwalkerRemains.label: ancient warsprinter remains
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOperatingTable.description: A table once used for surgical operations. It has long since deteriorated into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOperatingTable.label: ancient operating table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOven.description: An ancient oven. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOven.label: ancient oven
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipelineSection.description: A section from an ancient pipeline. It once carried some valuable fluid over long distances. Now it's been looted and deteriorated to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipelineSection.label: ancient pipeline section
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes.description: A bunch of rusted old pipes. It is hard to say how these ended up here.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes.label: ancient pipes
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPodCar.description: An ancient pod car once capable of automated flight. Its valuable parts were looted long ago, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPodCar.label: ancient pod car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPostbox.description: An ancient postbox, smashed and deteriorated to uselessness. It seems to have been moved here long ago for some unknown reason.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPostbox.label: ancient postbox
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRazorWire.description: A piece of ancient razor wire. It has been deteriorating for many years and no longer poses any danger.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRazorWire.label: ancient razor wire
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRefrigerator.description: An ancient refrigerator. It was stripped of interesting parts long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRefrigerator.label: ancient refrigerator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCar.description: An ancient, broken car. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCar.label: ancient car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCarFrame.description: An ancient, rusted car frame. The body shell has long since rusted away to nothing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCarFrame.label: ancient car frame
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedDropship.description: The remains of an ancient dropship. The valuable parts were looted long ago and the rest has deteriorated to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedDropship.label: ancient dropship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedEngineBlock.descripti: An ancient engine block that is rusted through. No repair could salvage this.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedEngineBlock.label: ancient engine block
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedJeep.description: An ancient, broken troop carrier. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedJeep.label: ancient troop carrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruck.description: An ancient, broken truck. Everything useful either rusted away or was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruck.label: ancient truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityCrate.description: A large self-powered hermetically-sealed crate with built-in security alarms. These can preserve their contents for a long time. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityCrate.label: ancient security crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityTurret.description: An ancient, broken security turret. The valuable parts have all been looted or smashed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityTurret.label: ancient security turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShipBeacon.description: An ancient, broken ship navigation beacon. Every useful component was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShipBeacon.label: ancient nav beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShoppingCart.description: An ancient, rusted shopping cart. How exactly it got here is a mystery, but the story is long and probably quite sad.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShoppingCart.label: ancient shopping cart
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallCrate.description: A small, empty crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallCrate.label: ancient small crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSpacerCrate.description: An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained were taken long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSpacerCrate.label: ancient spacer crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStorageCylinder.description: An ancient device that looks like it once stored some kind of fluid. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStorageCylinder.label: ancient storage cylinder
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStove.description: An ancient stove. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStove.label: ancient stove
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSystemRack.description: An ancient rack unit packed with unidentifiable devices. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSystemRack.label: ancient system rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTank.description: The remains of an ancient tank which was destroyed by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTank.label: ancient ruined tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTankTrap.description: An defensive fortification for stopping vehicles. It's been deteriorating for many years.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTankTrap.label: ancient tank trap
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTerminal.label: ancient terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToilet.description: An ancient toilet. Smashed long ago, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToilet.label: ancient toilet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVendingMachine.description: An ancient vending machine. It was smashed ages ago and generations of looters have taken every conceivably useful part. How it ended up here is a mystery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVendingMachine.label: ancient vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarspiderRemains.descriptio: The ruined remains of an ancient mid-scale warspider. It has been picked over many times, and there is nothing valuable left to loot.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarspiderRemains.label: ancient warspider remains
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerClaw.description: The assault claw of an ancient mid-scale warwalker. This weapon specialized in tearing through heavy plasteel armor at close range. Its valuable components were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerClaw.label: ancient warwalker claw
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerFoot.description: A massive foot from an ancient warwalker. It seems to have been torn free from its owner by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerFoot.label: ancient warwalker foot
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerLeg.description: The shattered leg of a mid-scale warwalker that fell here long ago. It has been picked clean by looters, and no valuable components remain.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerLeg.label: ancient warwalker leg
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerShell.description: Most of the armored shell of a warwalker. It appears to have been torn off by some colossal weapon system. All the valuable parts were looted, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerShell.label: ancient warwalker shell
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerTorso.description: The torso of a mid-scale warwalker which fell here in ancient days. The valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerTorso.label: ancient warwalker torso
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWashingMachine.description: An ancient device used for washing textiles. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWashingMachine.label: ancient washing machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWheel.description: An ancient wheel from some kind of vehicle. The rubber has deteriorated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWheel.label: ancient wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchonexusCore.description: A cardboard imitation of the central core of an archonexus.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchonexusCore.label: archonexus core
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechTower.description: A cardboard imitation of a large archotech structure.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechTower.label: archotech tower
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosculpterPod_OperatingEffect.des: This is an effecter prop for "Biosculpter Pod Operating". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnbongSmokeEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Burnbong Smoke". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnbongSmokeEffect.label: burnbong smoke
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTree.description: A celebratory tree decorated with ornaments and lights traditionally made as part of Christmas celebrations. Made of plastic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTree.label: christmas tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTreeTwinkleEffect.descrip: This is an effecter prop for "Christmas Tree Twinkle". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTreeTwinkleEffect.label: christmas twinkle
LanguageData.VFEPD_DriedBlood.label: dried blood
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBonsaiPot.description: This fake pot is similar to those used for planting bonsai trees. Colonists will not plant anything here, so you can put a fake flower on top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBonsaiPot.label: bonsai pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenMoss.description: Plastic grass painted in the same colour as gauranlen moss. Probably terrible for the environment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenMoss.label: fake gauranlen moss
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenTree.description: Plastic tree imitating a gauranlen tree. No dryads here.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenTree.label: fake gauranlen tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGibbetCage.description: A fake gibbet cage with nothing inside. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGibbetCage.label: fake gibbet cage
LanguageData.VFEPD_FalseBlueFire.description: This is just smoke and mirrors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FalseBlueFire.label: fake darkfire
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fibercorn.description: A fake inedible, fibrous plant which usually produces a small amount of a wood-like substance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fibercorn.label: fibercorn
LanguageData.VFEPD_FireSmokeEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Fire Smoke". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FireSmokeEffect.label: fire smoke
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenDebrisEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Debris". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenDebrisEffect.label: gauranlen debris
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesBatchEffect.descrip: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Leaves, Batch". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesBatchEffect.label: gauranlen leaves, batch
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Leaves". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesEffect.label: gauranlen leaves
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandArchotechStructure.descriptio: A cardboard imitation of a grand archotech structure of towering height and impressive bulk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandArchotechStructure.label: grand archotech structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_HackingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Hacking". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HackingEffect.label: hacking
LanguageData.VFEPD_HairCuttingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Hair Cutting". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HairCuttingEffect.label: hair cutting
LanguageData.VFEPD_MajorArchotechStructure.descriptio: A cardboard imitation of a large archotech structure.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MajorArchotechStructure.label: major archotech structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_MakingSkylanternEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Making Skylantern". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MakingSkylanternEffect.label: making skylantern
LanguageData.VFEPD_MoldyUniform.description: This is NOT the latest fashion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MoldyUniform.label: ragged uniform
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowRays.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Glow Rays". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowRays.label: ritual glow rays
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowSingleRay.descripti: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Glow Single Ray". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowSingleRay.label: glow single ray
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineA.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line A". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineA.label: tech lines a
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineB.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line B". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineB.label: tech lines b
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineC.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line C". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineC.label: tech lines c
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePawnHighlight.description: This is a mote prop for "Role Pawn Highlight". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePawnHighlight.label: role pawn highlight
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePositionHighlight.descrip: This is a mote prop for "Role Position Highlight". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePositionHighlight.label: role position
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_SpikePipe.description: This is a mote prop for "Spike Pipe". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_SpikePipe.label: spike pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_TotemOutline.description: This is a mote prop for "Totem outline". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_TotemOutline.label: totem
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nutrifungus.description: A fake meaty bioengineered mushroom grown for its nutritious value.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nutrifungus.label: nutrifungus
LanguageData.VFEPD_OilSmear.description: If these appear under your car, take it to a mechanic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OilSmear.label: oil smear
LanguageData.VFEPD_PodSlime.description: I picture it tasting like Tang.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PodSlime.label: pod slime
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScatteredDocuments.description: Don't seem to contain any important information.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScatteredDocuments.label: scattered documents
LanguageData.VFEPD_SleepAcceleratorActiveEffect.descr: This is an effecter prop for "Sleep Accelerator Active". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SleepAcceleratorActiveEffect.label: sleep accelerator
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceDrone.label: space drone
LanguageData.VFEPD_Timbershroom.description: A fake tall brown mushroom with a long stem.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Timbershroom.label: timbershroom
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeBonsai.description: A fake tree, pruned and shaped to look visually pleasing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeBonsai.label: bonsai tree
