LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelGreen.label: green barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelGrey.label: grey barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelRed.label: red barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelYellow.label: yellow barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BinBag.description: A black bag containing various sort of rubbish.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BinBag.label: bin bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxLarge.description: A large wooden box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxLarge.label: large wooden box
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxSmall.description: A small wooden box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxSmall.label: small wooden box
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrickPile.label: brick pile
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxLarge.description: A large cardboard box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxLarge.label: large cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxSmall.description: A small cardboard box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxSmall.label: small cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConcreteBags.description: A large stack of concrete bags.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConcreteBags.label: concrete bags
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cone.label: cone
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerBlue.description: A blue metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerBlue.label: blue cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGreen.description: A green metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGreen.label: green cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGrey.description: A grey metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGrey.label: grey cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerRed.description: A red metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerRed.label: red cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerYellow.description: A yellow metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerYellow.label: yellow cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalCabinet.description: A small metal cabinet containing electrical circuits and fuses.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalCabinet.label: electrical cabinet
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasTank.label: gas tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lockers.description: A metal locker unit, allowing workers to store valuable belongings.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lockers.label: lockers
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet.label: pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelBlue.description: A blue metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelBlue.label: pallet with blue barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGreen.description: A green metal barrels on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGreen.label: pallet with green barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGrey.description: A grey metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGrey.label: pallet with grey barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelRed.description: A red metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelRed.label: pallet with red barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelYellow.description: A yellow metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelYellow.label: pallet with yellow barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBoxes.description: A large pallet with several wooden boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBoxes.label: pallet with wooden boxes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletCardboard.description: A large pallet with several cardboard boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletCardboard.label: pallet with cardboard boxes
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pipes.description: A large stack of industrial pipes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pipes.label: stack of pipes
LanguageData.VFEPD_Planks.description: A large stack of wooden planks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Planks.label: stack of planks
LanguageData.VFEPD_VentilationShaft.description: An exhaust to a ventilation system.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VentilationShaft.label: ventilation shaft
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterTank.label: water tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPod.description: This doesn't even glow! I want to speak with the manager!
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPod.label: fake glow pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hive.label: fake hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceHive.description: A decorative space hive. Won't produce any insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceHive.label: space hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_Creeper.description: A hive-like structure created by giant insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Creeper.label: creeper
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepHeater.description: A deep canal that connects to some underground steam caverns, dug up by giant insects. Sprays out superheated steam at random, similar to steam geysers. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepHeater.label: deep heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeHiveDoor.description: A non-functional door. It's just two painted plywood panels and won't open. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeHiveDoor.label: fake hive door
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoamPod.description: An organic, firefoam pod produced by giant insects. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoamPod.label: foampod
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPodFormation.description: A large cluster of bioluminescent pods produced by giant insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPodFormation.label: glow pod formation
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPodSpire.description: An incredibly tall spire of bioluminescent pods produced by giant insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPodSpire.label: glow pod spire
LanguageData.VFEPD_HeatPod.description: A bioluminescent pod produced by giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HeatPod.label: heat pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hivenode.description: A large, exotic goop spire created by giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hivenode.label: hivenode
LanguageData.VFEPD_InfestedShipChunk.description: A chunk of a spacecraft covered in biomass and insect jelly.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InfestedShipChunk.label: infested ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_JellyFarm.description: A deep organic bioreactor constantly generating insect jelly from nearby minerals and nutrition.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JellyFarm.label: jelly farm
LanguageData.VFEPD_JellyMorpher.description: An exotic, pulsating bioformation that forces attached insect jelly to undergo a chemical process that changes it into royal jelly. Produced by giant insects. Needs to be constructed on the creep and requires refueling with insect jelly in order to produce the royal variant. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JellyMorpher.label: jelly morpher
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeGlowPod.description: A large bioluminescent pod produced by giant insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeGlowPod.label: large glow pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Petroglypher.description: A hive-like structure created by giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Petroglypher.label: petroglypher
LanguageData.VFEPD_StaticPod.description: A medium-sized hive structure capable of generating small amounts of electricity, produced by giant insects. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StaticPod.label: staticpod
LanguageData.VFEPD_TendrilFarm.description: A pillar that slowly grows clusters of insectoid tendrilmoss.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TendrilFarm.label: tendril farm
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thornpod.description: A volatile pod covered in sharp chitin thorns, produced by giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thornpod.label: thornpod
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_ArtificialBasicHive.descript: An artificially constructed hive of giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_ArtificialBasicHive.label: fake basic hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_ChelisHive.description: A hive of giant insects of the Chelis geneline. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_ChelisHive.label: fake chelis hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InfestedShipModule.descripti: A mysterious segment of a long destroyed spaceship.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InfestedShipModule.label: infested ship module
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InfestedShipPart.description: An ancient ship part, torn off of a craft of unknown origin.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InfestedShipPart.label: infested ship part
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InsectoidCocoon.description: These jelly cocoons keep swarmlings safe from fire, extreme temperatures, and other threats while they undergo a metamorphosis process. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InsectoidCocoon.label: insectoid cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_KemianHive.description: A hive of giant insects of the Kemian geneline. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_KemianHive.label: fake kemian hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_LargeBurrow.description: A massive insectoid-made hole connecting to some unseen cave network deep under the surface. The walls are covered in insectoid goop and are too slippery to climb down. Insectoid chittering can be heard from the tunnels beneath. Seems to be empty inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_LargeBurrow.label: large insect burrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_MediumBurrow.description: A medium-sized insectoid-made hole connecting to some unseen cave network deep under the surface. The walls are covered in insectoid goop and are too slippery to climb down. Seems to be empty inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_MediumBurrow.label: insect burrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_NuchadusHive.description: A hive of giant insects of the Nuchadus geneline. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_NuchadusHive.label: fake nuchadus hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_SmallBurrow.description: A small insectoid-made hole connecting to some unseen cave network deep under the surface. The walls are covered in insectoid goop and are too slippery to climb down. Seems to be empty inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_SmallBurrow.label: small insect burrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_XanidesHive.description: A hive of giant insects of the Xanides geneline. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_XanidesHive.label: fake xanides hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrewingBarrel.label: brewing barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cooker.label: cooker
LanguageData.VFEPD_CookingAppliances.label: cooking appliances
LanguageData.VFEPD_CuttingBoard.label: cutting board
LanguageData.VFEPD_DinnerSet.description: A simple dinner set containing all the required utensils.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DinnerSet.label: dinner set
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoodTrolley.description: A four wheeled trolley for empty plates and food trays.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoodTrolley.label: food trolley
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fridge.description: A large fridge with an in-built freezer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fridge.label: fridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSink.label: kitchen sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurface.description: A simple kitchen surface with a cutting board.
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurface.label: kitchen surface
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurfaceEmpty.label: kitchen surface empty
LanguageData.VFEPD_Knives.label: knives
LanguageData.VFEPD_Microwave.label: microwave
LanguageData.VFEPD_MopBucket.description: A sterile mop bucket. Ideal for a mop.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MopBucket.label: mop bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_Oven.label: oven
LanguageData.VFEPD_Spices.description: A wide assortment of different spices
LanguageData.VFEPD_Spices.label: spices
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterDispenser.description: A large, standing fresh water dispenser.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterDispenser.label: water dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_WineRack.label: wine rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Activator.description: A timed mechanoid activation unit. After counting down, it will... do nothing... Welp.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Activator.label: activator
LanguageData.VFEPD_ActivatorProx.description: A proximity alarm for dormant mechanoids. If it detects a human-like threat nearby, it will... do nothing... Welp.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ActivatorProx.label: activator proximity
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClimateAdjuster.description: An ultratech device for controlling climate. Using chemicals and exotic fields to manipulate the atmosphere, it shifts the temperature in this region of the world. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClimateAdjuster.label: climate adjuster
LanguageData.VFEPD_Defoliator.description: An area-denial device which annihilates nearby plants without affecting animals. Permanently out of order.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Defoliator.label: inactive defoliator
LanguageData.VFEPD_EMIDynamo.description: A massive electromagnetic interference generator. It interferes with or shuts down electrical devices in nearby regions. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EMIDynamo.label: EMI dynamo
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gloomlight.description: A self-powered mechanoid node of unknown function. Deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gloomlight.label: deactivated gloomlight
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechAssembler.description: An automated mechanoid factory. Deactivated and sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechAssembler.label: mech assembler
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsule.description: A mechanoid storage and deployment capsule. Sealed shut and inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsule.label: mech capsule
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsuleOpen.description: A mechanoid storage and deployment capsule. Open and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsuleOpen.label: mech capsule, open
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechDropBeacon.description: A mechanoid reinforcement drop beacon. When activated, it does nothing, because it's not real. Imaginary mechanoids can't hurt you.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechDropBeacon.label: drop beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicDroner.description: An archotech device transmitting the thoughts of a mad superintelligence. It generates a massive psychic drone tuned to one gender and affecting a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicDroner.label: psychic droner
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicSuppressor.description: An archotech device that generates a massive psychic suppression field tuned to a particular gender. People of that gender have their psychic activity suppressed, reducing their consciousness. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicSuppressor.label: psychic suppressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGenerator.description: A shielding device which projects a momentum repulsor field. Or it would, it it wasn't so fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGenerator.label: fake shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGeneratorLow.description: A shielding device which projects a momentum repulsor field. Or it would, it it wasn't so fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGeneratorLow.label: fake low-shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmokeSpewer.description: An ultratech weapon of mass destruction designed for area denial. By harvesting available compounds and converting them into self-reproducing opaque molecules, it can spew enough smoke to block the sun in a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmokeSpewer.label: smoke spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_SunBlocker.description: An ultratech machine that generates a sheet of exotic fields at high altitude, turning the sky opaque and blocking the sun. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SunBlocker.label: sun blocker
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicSpewer.description: An ultratech weapon of mass destruction designed for area denial. This device harvests available compounds and converts them into self-reproducing poisons. By spewing these into the atmosphere, it can poison a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicSpewer.label: toxic spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnstablePowerCell.description: A fake mechanoid power generation unit. It won't output any power.
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnstablePowerCell.label: fake power cell
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeatherController.description: An ultratech device for controlling weather. Using chemicals and exotic fields, it forces the weather into a particular configuration. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeatherController.label: weather controller
LanguageData.VFEPD_Anvil.label: anvil
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandEmpty.description: An armor stand. There is currently no armor mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandEmpty.label: empty armor stand
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandFull.description: An armor stand. There is a suit of plate armor mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandFull.label: full armor stand
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArrowCage.label: arrow cage
LanguageData.VFEPD_Banner.description: A decorative banner hanging from a vertical wooden frame.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Banner.label: banner
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrazierEmpty.description: A bowl-shaped furnishing used to hold a fire.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrazierEmpty.label: empty brazier
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketEmpty.label: empty bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketwithWater.description: A wooden bucket filled with water.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketwithWater.label: water bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_CageBrazier.description: A metal cage shaped empty brazier.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CageBrazier.label: cage brazier
LanguageData.VFEPD_CagePlatform.description: A cage platform to walk on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CagePlatform.label: cage platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_TanningRack.description: A tanning rack with a pelt mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TanningRack.label: tanning rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackEmpty.description: A long weapon rack. There aren't any weapons on it at the moment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackEmpty.label: empty weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSpears.description: A long weapon rack. There is a selection of spears mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSpears.label: spears weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSwords.description: A long weapon rack. There is a selection of swords mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSwords.label: sword weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenChest.label: wooden chest
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenChestLarge.label: large wooden chest
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenPlatform.description: A wooden platform to walk on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenPlatform.label: wooden platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenSign.description: A tall post with signs pointing in different directions.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenSign.label: wooden sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBridge.description: This is a false bridge support that won't hold any bridge above it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBridge.label: fake bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSnowman.description: This is not made of snow, but a very fake looking polyurethane foam.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSnowman.label: fake snowman
LanguageData.VFEPD_Geyser.description: This is just a shallow hole with a tiny device spewing tepid, misted water. Provides no heat or energy, but looks cool.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Geyser.label: fake steam geyser
LanguageData.VFEPD_Present.description: A festive present. Actually just a painted cardboard box. Booooh.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Present.label: present
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAmmoStack.description: A container of ancient ammunition. It's empty and any remaining rounds are corroded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAmmoStack.label: ancient ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAntenna.description: A rusted antenna used to transmit long-forgotten communications.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAntenna.label: ancient antenna
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientArmchair.description: A faded and torn armchair. It's unusable in its current state.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientArmchair.label: ancient armchair
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutocannonTurret.descriptio: An autocannon turret with a shattered barrel. The targeting system is missing and all the components are rusted and bent to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutocannonTurret.label: broken autocannon turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierLong.description: A concrete barrier used to block the path of vehicles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierLong.label: large concrete barrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBathtub.description: A bathtub with deep cracks and rust stains. It's completely unusable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBathtub.label: cracked bathtub
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBlastDoor.description: A heavily-reinforced door made of an ultratech polymer, sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBlastDoor.label: ancient blast door, closed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBlastDoor_Frame.description: A heavily-reinforced door frame made of an ultratech polymer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBlastDoor_Frame.label: ancient blast door, frame
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_ComponentIndustrial.des: A box filled with fake components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_ComponentSpacer.descrip: A box of fake advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_ComponentSpacer.label: advanced component box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_SteelSlag.description: A box filled with fake steel scrap. It's heavy.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_SteelSlag.label: steel scrap box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCardboardBox.description: An soggy cardboard box filled with old detritus.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCardboardBox.label: old cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChembarrel.description: A rusted barrel that once stored chemfuel. It's empty and corroded.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChembarrel.label: ancient chembarrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChembarrelPallet.descriptio: A stack of rusted barrels on a decayed pallet. Any valuable fuel leaked out long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChembarrelPallet.label: ancient chembarrel pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemfuelCanister.descriptio: A sealed canister of chemfuel. It is empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemfuelCanister.label: chemfuel canister
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemtruck.description: An abandoned chemfuel transport truck. Any usable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemtruck.label: ancient chemtruck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientColdStorage.description: An old refrigeration unit, now rusted shut. Any contents have long since decayed to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientColdStorage.label: ancient cold storage
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneArm.description: A rusted crane arm, twisted and broken.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneArm.label: ruined crane arm
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneArmSmall.description: A smaller chunk of a crane arm, snapped and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneArmSmall.label: ruined crane arm
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneBase.description: The base of a large industrial crane.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneBase.label: ruined crane base
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneColumn.description: A vertical support column from a ruined crane. It's rusted and no longer stable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneColumn.label: ruined crane column
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePallet.description: A pallet for stacking and transporting crates. The contents have been scavenged long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePallet.label: ancient crate pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDestroyedConsole.descriptio: A ruined console. It is now completely inoperable. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDestroyedConsole.label: ancient destroyed console
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDestroyedConsoleLarge.descr: A ruined console. It is now completely inoperable. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDestroyedConsoleLarge.label: ancient destroyed console
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDoubleBed.description: A double bed with broken springs and a tattered mattress. It barely offers comfort, but two can sleep here if desperate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDoubleBed.label: rusted double bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDrillPlatform.description: A device meant for drilling deep into the earth. Any valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDrillPlatform.label: ancient drill rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmergencyLight_Red.descript: An ancient light containing a long-lasting battery. Inactive
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmergencyLight_Red.label: ancient emergency light
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavator.description: The remains of a mining vehicle. The valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavator.label: ancient excavator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExplosivesCrate.description: A container of ancient mining charges. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExplosivesCrate.label: ancient explosives crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFilingCabinet.description: A corroded filing cabinet. There's nothing useful left inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFilingCabinet.label: rusted filing cabinet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientForklift.description: A broken forklift, rusted and missing parts. It's far too damaged to be repaired.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientForklift.label: ruined forklift
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGravEngine.description: An ultratech engine used to bring large structures and ships into orbit. Nonfunctional for many years.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGravEngine.label: ancient grav engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGravReactor.description: An ancient generator powered by a gravcore. Once capable of producing massive amounts of power, it has now fallen into disrepair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGravReactor.label: ancient grav reactor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHatch.description: The entrance to a long-abandoned subterranean facility. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHatch.label: ancient stockpile entrance
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHeatVent.description: A massive duct that drops endlessly into the ground. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHeatVent.label: ancient heat vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndustrialShelf.description: An industrial shelf covered in rust. It offers nothing of value.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndustrialShelf.label: ancient industrial shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndustrialTruck.description: An industrial truck, heavily rusted and abandoned. The engine is beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndustrialTruck.label: rusted industrial truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockers.description: A set of metal lockers, heavily rusted and bent. They've been thoroughly looted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockers.label: rusted lockers
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMediumContainer.description: A rusted shipping container. It's completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMediumContainer.label: ancient container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMetalCrate.description: A metal crate, now rusted shut. It's empty and worthless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMetalCrate.label: rusted metal crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryBarrier.description: A concrete barrier once used for military roadblocks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryBarrier.label: ancient military barrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryGeneratorSmall.desc: A small rusted generator. The fuel tank is empty and the engine is beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiningCharge.description: An explosive device used to quickly blast through rock. It is made from refined chemfuel. The explosive is old and inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiningCharge.label: ancient mining charge
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMortar.description: A shattered mortar emplacement. It's smashed and will never work again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMortar.label: busted mortar
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOpenContainer.description: A rusted shipping container. Its contents are worthless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOpenContainer.label: rusted open container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPallet_SteelSlag.descriptio: A pallet stacked with fake steel scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPallet_SteelSlag.label: steel scrap pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes_Odyssey.description: Steel pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes_Odyssey.label: ancient pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPlantPot.description: A large cracked pot with dead soil. Nothing can grow here any more.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPlantPot.label: ancient plant pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedMicrowave.description: An ancient microwave covered in rust. It's beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedMicrowave.label: rusted microwave
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSafe.description: A locked safe. It's heavily rusted, and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSafe.label: rusted safe
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedContainer.description: A small container that's still sealed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedContainer.label: sealed container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedContainer_Open.label: open container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedCrate.description: A small crate that's still sealed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedCrate.label: sealed crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedCrate_Open.label: open crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShelf.description: An ancient shelf. It holds nothing of interest.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShelf.label: ancient shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShower.description: A broken shower stall. The plumbing is corroded and the ceramics are shattered.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShower.label: cracked shower
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSimpleResearchBench.descrip: An old, rudimentary research bench with corroded tools and faded notes. Nothing of value remains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSimpleResearchBench.label: ancient research bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSingleBed.description: A single bed frame with rusted metal and a torn mattress. It's better than sleeping on the ground, but just barely.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSingleBed.label: rusted bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallContainer.description: A rusted shipping container. It's completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallContainer.label: ancient container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallShelf.description: An ancient shelf. There's nothing useful left on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallShelf.label: ancient small shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmokeVent.description: The exhaust vent of some long forgotten underground megastructure. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmokeVent.label: ancient smoke vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableBrewery.description: A dilapidated brewing table once used for fermentation. The equipment is rusted beyond use.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableBrewery.label: ancient brewery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableButcher.description: A broken butcher's table littered with old stains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableButcher.label: ancient butcher table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableDrugLab.description: A crumbling lab table with shattered glassware. The equipment is useless and contaminated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableDrugLab.label: ancient drug lab
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableMachining.description: A rusted machining table covered in debris. All useful parts have been scavenged.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableMachining.label: ancient machining table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableSmithingElectric.descr: A ruined electric smithy with frayed wires and scorched surfaces. It's beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableSmithingElectric.label: ancient electric smithy
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableSmithingFueled.descrip: An ancient smithy that once burned fuel for crafting. Now, it's covered in soot and rust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableSmithingFueled.label: ancient fueled smithy
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableStoveElectric.descript: An old electric stove with shattered heating elements. It's far too damaged to use.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableStoveElectric.label: ancient electric stove
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableStoveFueled.descriptio: A rusted cooking stove. It's beyond unusable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableStoveFueled.label: ancient fueled stove
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableTailorElectric.descrip: A ruined tailor's bench with torn fabric and broken tools. It's beyond salvage.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableTailorElectric.label: ancient electric tailor bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableTailorHand.description: A simple tailor's bench with splintered wood and rusted needles. Nothing useful remains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableTailorHand.label: ancient hand tailor bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTerraformer.description: An ancient terraforming device powered by a gravcore. It is inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTerraformer.label: ancient terraformer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToxVent.description: A massive duct that vents toxic fumes from an underground megastructure. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToxVent.label: ancient toxic vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTransportPod.description: An ancient cargo pod capable of carrying people, animals, and items. Not in working condition.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTransportPod.label: ancient transport pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelerClaw.description: The claw of an ancient mining mechanoid. All the parts are degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelerClaw.label: ancient tunneler claw
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelerHusk.description: The remains of an ancient mining mechanoid. Its complex parts are all degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelerHusk.label: ancient tunneler husk
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTV.description: A shattered television set. The screen is broken and the electronics are stripped out.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTV.label: busted television
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUplink.description: An ancient transmitter used for secure communications between the surface and orbit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUplink.label: ancient uplink
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumSlugTurret.descripti: A heavy turret designed to fire uranium slugs. The mechanism is smashed and the ammo is depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumSlugTurret.label: broken uranium slug turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWindTurbineBody.description: A toppled wind turbine with broken blades. It's been scavenged for parts long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWindTurbineBody.label: ancient wind turbine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWoodenCrate.description: A weathered wooden crate. It's empty, and the wood is brittle.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWoodenCrate.label: old wooden crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AnticraftBeam.description: A massive anti-ship beam weapon. Pew pew.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AnticraftBeam.label: anticraft beam
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArcheanTree.description: A tree imitating those bioengineered to terraform deadworlds and early-stage rimworlds. This is a non-functional fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArcheanTree.label: archean tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Boomshroom.description:
These mushrooms produce volatile chemicals as a defensive measure. They can be harvested for chemfuel. However, this must be done with extreme caution, as the mushrooms can explode if they're destroyed.

Glitterworld researchers have used genetic material from boomshrooms to bioengineer a number of chemfuel-producing animals.

This object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Boomshroom.label: boomshroom
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexCore.description: The thinking mind of the mechanoid swarm. Powered by Linux.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexCore.label: cerebrex core
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexCore_Destroyed.description: The smashed neural nexus of the mechanoid swarm that once commanded mechanoids around the planet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexCore_Destroyed.label: destroyed cerebrex core
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexStabilizer.description: A remote shield generator that makes the nearby cerebrex core nearly invincible. Or it would, if it wasn't fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexStabilizer.label: cerebrex stabilizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_Prop.description: A chemfuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship. This tank seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_Prop.label: small chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonLocust.description: A stasis cocoon containing a locust. This one is empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonLocust.label: locust cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_EggSac.description: A slimy sac containing an insect larva. This one is empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EggSac.label: egg sac
LanguageData.VFEPD_Filth_ChippedIce.label: chipped ice
LanguageData.VFEPD_Filth_VolcanicAsh.label: volcanic ash
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelOptimizer_Prop.description: A gravtech unit that reduces the fuel needed for gravship flight. This unit seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelOptimizer_Prop.label: fuel optimizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_GaussCannon.description: A massive anti-ship cannon that uses electromagnets to launch large metallic darts at extreme velocities. Pew pew.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GaussCannon.label: gauss cannon
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeothermalVent.description: A naturally-occurring break in the ground from which volcanic gases escape. These vents bring nutrients to the surface from deep underground. Collectively, the fumes they spew are enough to block out the sun.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeothermalVent.label: sulfur spout
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravAnchor_Prop.description: Prevents the local map from being destroyed during a gravship launch. This anchor seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravAnchor_Prop.label: grav anchor
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravcorePowerCell_Prop.description: A power generator that draws energy from gravitational waves passing through the gravship. This generator seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravcorePowerCell_Prop.label: gravcore power cell
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravEngine_Prop.description: The ultratech heart of a gravship. Generates lift by inverting and intensifying gravity in a field around itself. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made out of cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravEngine_Prop.label: grav engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravFieldExtender_Prop.description: Extends the area in which substructure can be built and increases support capacity. This extender seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravFieldExtender_Prop.label: grav field extender
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravshipShieldGenerator_Prop.descr: Creates a short-lived momentum repulsor surface to block projectiles. This generator seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravshipShieldGenerator_Prop.label: gravship shield generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_HunterDroneTrap.description: A dormant and inactive hunter drone trap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HunterDroneTrap.label: hunter trap
LanguageData.VFEPD_InsectLairEntrance.description: The entrance to a cave network. Seems to be just painted on the floor.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InsectLairEntrance.label: cave entrance
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeChemfuelTank_Prop.description: A massive chemfuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship. This tank seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeChemfuelTank_Prop.label: large chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeThruster_Prop.description: An advanced chemfuel thruster that greatly increases the range of a gravship. This thruster seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeThruster_Prop.label: large thruster
LanguageData.VFEPD_LifeSupportUnit.description: A unit connected to the orbital platform's larger life support network. It keeps rooms heated and pressurized.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LifeSupportUnit.label: life support unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_MalfunctioningTransportPod.descrip: A cargo pod with a faulty release mechanism. It's still sealed, and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MalfunctioningTransportPod.label: malfunctioning transport pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanoidDropPod.description: A launchable cargo pod intended to carry mechanoids. Not in working condition.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanoidDropPod.label: mechanoid drop pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanoidProcessor.description: A powerful mechanoid computer running Windows 98.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanoidProcessor.label: mechanoid processor
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechhiveAssembler.description: An automated mechanoid factory. It periodically births fresh mechanoids.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechhiveAssembler.label: mechhive birther
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechPylon.description: A node in a distributed mechanoid computation network.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechPylon.label: mech pylon
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRelay.description: A node that coordinates signals across a planet-wide mechanoid communication network. This one is completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRelay.label: mechanoid relay
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRelay_Crashed.description: A node that coordinates signals across a planet-wide mechanoid communication network. Wrecked.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRelay_Crashed.label: crashed mechanoid relay
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechStabilizer.description: A shield projecter that protects a nearby mechanoid relay. This one is completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechStabilizer.label: relay stabilizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_OrbitalScanner.description: A sensor unit that passively scans for irregular objects orbiting the planet. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OrbitalScanner.label: orbital scanner
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxygenPump.description: A small wall-mounted unit that does nothing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxygenPump.label: oxygen pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet_Medicine.description: A pallet containing fake medical supplies.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet_Medicine.label: medicine pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet_SurvivalMeals.description: A pallet containing fake survival meals.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet_SurvivalMeals.label: survival meal pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_PassengerShuttle.description: A chemfuel-powered shuttle designed for long-distance travel. This one refuses to start.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PassengerShuttle.label: passenger shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotConsole_Prop.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravship. This console seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotConsole_Prop.label: pilot console
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotSubpersonaCore_Prop.descripti: A low-grade subpersona specialized in gravship flight. This one only has access to chatGPT and is therefore dumber than a Steam mod commenter.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotSubpersonaCore_Prop.label: pilot subpersona core
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Bulrush.description: A fake plant commonly found in swamps, recognizable for its brown cigar-shaped top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Bulrush.label: bulrush
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Fireweed.description: A low-lying plant that produces clusters of purple flowers. It is common in alpine environments.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Fireweed.label: fireweed
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_LilyPad.description: A fake water plant with a broad floating leaf.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_LilyPad.label: lily pad
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Lotus.description: A fake aquatic plant known for its fragrant flowers.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Lotus.label: lotus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_MagmaCactus.description: A fake resilient species of cactus notable for its ability to survive extreme heat.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_MagmaCactus.label: magma cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Nightgrass.description: A fake grass-like fungus that grows as part of a massive mycelium network.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Nightgrass.label: night grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_NightRafflesia.description: A distant cousin of the giant rafflesia, this plant has adapted to thrive in dark locations. Its beauty is tempered by a strong stench of musk and rotten eggs.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_NightRafflesia.label: night rafflesia
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Psilocap.description: A fungus that gives off hallucinogenic spores. Standing next to them is enough to produce mild hallucinations. Psilocaps can be harvested and ingested to produce a vivid sensory experience that increases the user's mood.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Psilocap.label: psilocap
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Reeds.description: A fake tall slender plant that grows in water.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Reeds.label: reeds
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Thornvine.description: A fake prickly vine adapted to living in harsh conditions.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Thornvine.label: thornvine
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_TreeSnagroot.description: A fake gnarled slow-growing tree, adapted to live in toxic scarlands.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_TreeSnagroot.label: snagroot tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Willowgill.description: A tall spindly slow-growing mushroom with gills that droop like a willow tree. It gives off a soft light.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Willowgill.label: willowgill
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_YellowGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_YellowGrass.label: yellow grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_YellowTallGrass.description: Wild tall grass that grows in tough thickets. It slows down anyone moving over it.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_YellowTallGrass.label: tall yellow grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_RubblePile.description: The crumbled remains of an ancient structure.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RubblePile.label: rubble pile
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk_Mech.description: A chunk of mechanoid spacecraft made of steel and gravlite panels. It seems to have been torn off either by uncontrolled re-entry forces or some kind of weapon.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk_Mech.label: mechanoid ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignalJammer_Prop.description: A signal emitter that disguises the electromagnetic signature of your gravship. This emitter seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignalJammer_Prop.label: signal jammer
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallThruster_Prop.description: A chemfuel thruster that increases the range of a gravship. This thruster seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallThruster_Prop.label: small thruster
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveyScanner.description: A wideband sensor unit that can detect and map various features in a local area.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveyScanner.label: surveying scanner
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaspDroneTrap.description: Several dormant and inactive wasp drones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaspDroneTrap.label: wasp trap
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agarilux.description: A fake, enormous purple mushroom. Its size and glowing protrusions make this fungus beautiful to look at.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agarilux.label: agarilux
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agave.description: A fake, large-leafed desert plant with edible flowers and stalks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agave.label: agave
LanguageData.VFEPD_Alocasia.description: A fake tropical plant. Its extremely broad leaves are a commonly-recognized signifier of tropical forests.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Alocasia.label: alocasia
LanguageData.VFEPD_BambooTree.description: A fake, fast-growing tree-like plant that grows in dense groves. Bamboo can be harvested for a wood-like material. The plant itself is not beautiful.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BambooTree.label: bamboo tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_BerryBush.description: A fake bushy wild plant which yields delicious berries. Berries can be cooked, but they're also good to eat even when raw.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BerryBush.label: berry bush
LanguageData.VFEPD_BirchTree.description: A fake temperate-biome tree known for its thin, white, paper-like bark.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BirchTree.label: birch tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brambles.description: Fake, tangled, thorny, woody shoots covered with leaves. Brambles grow in clusters, and slow down anyone moving over them.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brambles.label: brambles
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bryolux.description: A fake blue moss typically found in deep, dark caves. It is sticky, with tangled fibers, which slows anyone walking over it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bryolux.label: bryolux
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnedTree.description: A fake burned tree stump. It's ugly and yields no usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnedTree.label: burned tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bush.description: A fake, short shrub. Does not typically talk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bush.label: bush
LanguageData.VFEPD_CecropiaTree.description: One of the most common rainforest trees. Cecropia grows very fast, but yields little usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CecropiaTree.label: cecropia tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chokevine.description: A fake, tangled masses of cord-like, spiky vines which coil in great masses along the ground. Chokevine greatky slows down anyone who moves over it. Multiple tribes have independently generated stories of chokevine strangling children to death in the night, as a way to scare kids into coming home before dark.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chokevine.label: chokevine
LanguageData.VFEPD_Clivia.description: An unusual plant with tall, pretty flowers. Some call it the 'bush lily'.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Clivia.label: clivia
LanguageData.VFEPD_Corn.description: A fake tall grain plant which produces ears of soft, edible seeds. While corn takes a long time to grow, it yields lots of food compared to other crops. Harvested corn takes a long time to spoil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Corn.label: corn plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cotton.description: A fake mid-size crop that yields fine white cotton fibers. These are used to make cloth.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cotton.label: cotton plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_CypressTree.description: A fake, tall coniferous tree often found in swamps. Despite its slow growth, planting these trees can be profitable as a low-effort, long-term investment because they yield so much usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CypressTree.label: cypress tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Daylily.description: A cultivated fake flower with wide petals and a short lifespan. Daylilies are very beautiful, but must be replanted often.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Daylily.label: daylily
LanguageData.VFEPD_Devilstrand.description: This fake fragile mushroom was genetically engineered to produce a silk net that is both difficult to tear and soft to the touch. While the mushroom takes a very long time to grow, only exotic ultra-tech fabrics outperform its devilstrand fibers.\n\nSome say it's called devilstrand because of its red color. Others think it owes its name to the greed it inspires in people.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Devilstrand.label: devilstrand
LanguageData.VFEPD_DragoTree.description: A fake, hardy desert tree topped with thick, pointed leaves.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DragoTree.label: drago tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Glowstool.description: A fake small brown mushroom typically found in caves. It smells like an old, dirty rag pulled from the stomach of a rotting muffalo - but it tastes surprisingly good when cooked.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Glowstool.label: glowstool
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassLong.description: Fake wild tall grass. Slows down anyone moving over it..
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassLong.label: long grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassShort.description: Fake wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassShort.label: short grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Haygrass.description: A fake mixture of nutrient-rich grasses which yield large amounts of hay. Hay is edible for animals, but not humans.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Haygrass.label: haygrass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healroot.description: A fake, slow-growing plant which yields herbal medicine when harvested. Sowing and harvesting healroot are both very labor-intensive tasks because of its delicate shoots.\n\nHealroot was selectively bred for centuries by settlers. It is sometimes also called "healer's hand" by tribespeople - a nickname it owes to its five major medicinal virtues.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healroot.label: healroot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hops.description: A fake flowering crop that yields hops, an essential ingredient in beer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hops.label: hop plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_MapleTree.description: A fake, common medium-sized tree, easily identifiable by its distinct three-pointed leaf.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MapleTree.label: maple tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_OakTree.description: A fake hardwood tree. Oaks take a long time to grow, but their wood is so strong that 'oak' is used as a metaphor for strength across many cultures.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OakTree.label: oak tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalmTree.description: A fake tropical tree with a tall, naked trunk topped by a cluster of very broad leaves. Unfortunately, this variety doesn't produce any edible coconuts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalmTree.label: palm tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionCactus.description: A fake short cactus. It is so named because it resembles a pincushion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionCactus.label: pincushion cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_PineTree.description: A fake large conifer covered with prickly pine cones. It grows in a distinctive conical shape.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PineTree.label: pine tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PoplarTree.description: A fake softwood tree that grows very fast. Unfortunately, its wood is weak and so it yields less useful material than hardwood trees.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PoplarTree.label: poplar tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Potato.description: A fake, highly nutritious tuber. Potatoes grow well even in somewhat poor soil, and form a delicious crispy outer coating when fried in oil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Potato.label: potato plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Psychoid.description: A fake leafy plant which generates the chemical compound psychite. Originally evolved as a defense mechanism to ward off plant-eating animals by overstimulating and sickening them, the psychite drug can be extracted and refined into various forms for recreational use. It is addictive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Psychoid.label: psychoid plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rafflesia.description: A rare, giant flower which can be found deep in steaming jungles. You would think a giant flower would be beautiful, but this one looks and smells like rotting flesh.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rafflesia.label: giant rafflesia
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rice.description: A fake, short, fast-growing crop that yields small edible grains. Its great nutritional ouput and ease of cultivation has made it the economic core of many great civilizations. While rice grows quickly, it is sensitive to soil fertility and will not fare well in poor soil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rice.label: rice plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rose.description: A fake beautiful cultivated flower, the rose has been a symbol of love since Earth's ancient era.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rose.label: rose
LanguageData.VFEPD_SaguaroCactus.description: A fake, large cactus native to arid Earth environments. Though it is not a tree, it yields a small amount of fibrous material that can be used like wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SaguaroCactus.label: saguaro cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smokeleaf.description: A fake leafy crop grown for the psychological effects of chemicals in its leaves. Smokeleaf leaves can be prepared into joints at the crafting spot. Smokeleaf makes a user feel relaxed, but reduces motivation, and can be addictive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smokeleaf.label: smokeleaf plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Strawberry.description: A fake, low bush-like plant that yields fragile but delicious strawberries. While it isn't quite as productive calorie-for-calorie as other crops, strawberries are delicious even when raw.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Strawberry.label: strawberry plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_TeakTree.description: A fake, exceptionally strong hardwood tree that grows in warm climates. Because teak wood is so durable and water-resistant, it was used to form the keel of wooden sailing ships in ancient times.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TeakTree.label: teak tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_WillowTree.description: One of the fastest growing shade trees, fake willows provide a beautiful, leafy canopy. It doesn't yield much usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WillowTree.label: willow tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AdvancedRotor.label: advanced rotor
LanguageData.VFEPD_Battery.description: A simple device that stores power. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Battery.label: battery
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank.description: A large tank filled with explosive chemfuel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank.label: large chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoalBurner.label: coal burner
LanguageData.VFEPD_Exhaust.description: An exhaust port for the fumes of industrialism.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Exhaust.label: exhaust
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasStorageUnit.description: An industrial style gas storage unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasStorageUnit.label: gas storage unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_Generator.label: generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitLarge.description: A large part of an industrial generator unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitLarge.label: generator unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitSmall.description: A small part of an industrial generator unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitSmall.label: small generator unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_IndustrialGenerator.label: industrial generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_LiquidTank.description: A large tank filled with water-based liquid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LiquidTank.label: large liquid tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerConverter.label: power converter
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerPole.description: A tall post to mount cables on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerPole.label: power pole
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rotor.label: rotor
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallExhaust.description: A small exhaust port for the fumes of industrialism.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallExhaust.label: small exhaust
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelTank.label: large steel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicWasteBarrel.description: A small barrel of toxic waste.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicWasteBarrel.label: toxic waste barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrapeProp.description: A decorative drape. This will not satisfy any noble requirements, as it is just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrapeProp.label: decorative drape
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaGrass.description: Plastic grass painted in the same colour as anima grass. Probably terrible for the environment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaGrass.label: fake anima grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaTree.description: Plastic tree imitating an anima tree. Doesn't provide any sort of psychic powers.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaTree.label: fake anima tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipLandingBeacon.description: Marks the corner of a landing area. Shuttles will ignore this one as it is inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipLandingBeacon.label: landing beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_Shuttle.label: shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShuttleCrashed.label: crashed shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConsole.description: An advanced data console accepting several different types of file formatting.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConsole.label: data console
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConveyor.description: A large box holding cables and pipes for data transfer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConveyor.label: data conveyor
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayScreen.label: display screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayTable.description: A large size display screen mounted on a large table.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayTable.label: display table
LanguageData.VFEPD_LongCommandConsole.description: A long console with several different command modules.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LongCommandConsole.label: long command console
LanguageData.VFEPD_PersonalConsole.description: A small, futuristic personal communications console.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PersonalConsole.label: personal console
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningScreen.description: A glass screen, ideal for planning out combat scenarios.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningScreen.label: planning screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningTable.description: A large size planning screen mounted on a large table.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningTable.label: planning table
LanguageData.VFEPD_SensorPlatform.description: A small platform containing a variety of sensors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SensorPlatform.label: sensor platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRack.description: A large server rack, containing multiple hard drives and advanced computer components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRack.label: server rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainer.description: A medium sized, triple sealed, password protected box.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainer.label: spacer container
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerLarge.description: A large sized, triple sealed, password protected box.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerLarge.label: spacer container large
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerStack.description: A large stack of different sized, triple sealed, password protected boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerStack.label: spacer container stack
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerStorage.description: A large, multi-chamber advanced storage device.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerStorage.label: advanced storage device
LanguageData.VFEPD_SwitchPanel.description: A medium sized panel containing varius levers and switches.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SwitchPanel.label: switch panel
LanguageData.VFEPD_TripleDisplay.description: A large dashboard with several display screens, for up-to-date information on all mod releases.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TripleDisplay.label: triple display dashboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlack.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlack.label: black gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlue.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlue.label: blue gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossRed.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossRed.label: red gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossSilver.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossSilver.label: silver gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossWhite.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossWhite.label: white gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlack.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlack.label: black skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlue.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlue.label: blue skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipRed.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipRed.label: red skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipSilver.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipSilver.label: silver skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipWhite.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipWhite.label: white skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_Superpod.description: A large, out-of-service, multi use drop pod.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Superpod.label: superpod
LanguageData.VCHE_FakeDucts.description: An air duct used by the AC network to transport air between the AC units and compressors. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VCHE_FakeDucts.label: fake ducts
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACCompressor.description: An air conditioning compressor that needs to be connected to an AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be placed outside. When powered, it allows the AC network to operate two additional AC devices without losing efficiency. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACCompressor.label: AC compressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACControlUnit.description: A main air conditioning control unit. Connects to compressors to allow AC units to generate cool or hot air. Needs to be connected to compressors by air ducts. AC control unit dictates the desired temperature for all AC units in the same network. Installing too many AC units may decrease the efficiency of the network, increasing the power drain of all devices. Constructing additional compressors will improve the efficiency of the network. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACControlUnit.label: AC control unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACUnit.description: An air-conditioning machine that fits into a wall. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACUnit.label: AC unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACUnitWall.description: A wall-mounted air-conditioning machine. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be constructed on a wall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACUnitWall.label: wall-mounted AC unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_IndustrialCooler.description: A large, industrial-type air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Cool air comes out one side, while hot exhaust comes out the other. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer. It’s capable of cooling the room to much lower temperature than the standard cooler. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_IndustrialCooler.label: industrial cooler
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_IndustrialHeater.description: A large, industrial-type heater machine that fits into a wall. It converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. It is capable of heating up the room to a much higher temperature than the standard heaters. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_IndustrialHeater.label: industrial heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_LargeACCompressor.description: A large air conditioning compressor that needs to be connected to an AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be placed outside. When powered, it allows the AC network to operate six additional AC devices without losing efficiency. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_LargeACCompressor.label: large AC compressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_StandingCooler.description: A free standing air-cooling machine. Cool air comes out of a fan and spreads over surrounding area. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer. Not efficient enough to refrigerate food. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_StandingCooler.label: standing cooler
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_VentValve.description: Switches air flow on/off. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_VentValve.label: air duct valve
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallHeater.description: A heating machine that fits into a wall. It converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. Can be used to heat up rooms during winter. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallHeater.label: wall heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedCooler.description: A wall-mounted air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Cool air comes out one side, while hot exhaust comes out the other. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer. Can only be constructed on a wall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedCooler.label: wall-mounted cooler
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedHeater.description: A wall-mounted device that converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. Can only be constructed on a wall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedHeater.label: wall-mounted heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedVent.description: A simple, wall-mounted vent for equalizing the temperature between two rooms without allowing people to walk between them. Can only be constructed on a wall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedVent.label: wall-mounted vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmbrandyDistillery.description: A gilded distillery of very delicate craftsmanship meant for aging ambrosia must into a drinkable form. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmbrandyDistillery.label: ambrandy distillery
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bar.description: A somewhat ornate countertop stocked to the brim with different vessels and devices for making a variety of drinks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bar.label: decorative bar
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeSodaFountain.description: An all-in-one soda manufacturing unit. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeSodaFountain.label: soda fountain
LanguageData.VFEPD_GinStill.description: A fully metal industrial distilling device, meant to purify and ferment gin into a drinkable form. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GinStill.label: gin still
LanguageData.VFEPD_TequilaBarrel.description: A small still and fermenter combo unit. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TequilaBarrel.label: tequila barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_VodkaDrum.description: A cheap container meant for storing water retrofitted to be air tight for short-term fermenting. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VodkaDrum.label: vodka drum
LanguageData.VFEPD_WhiskeyCask.description: A huge barrel meant for aging a high volume of whiskey at once. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WhiskeyCask.label: whiskey cask
LanguageData.VFEPD_EspressoMachine.description: An espresso machine brews coffee by forcing pressurized water near boiling point through a "puck" of ground coffee and a filter in order to produce a thick, concentrated coffee called espresso. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EspressoMachine.label: espresso machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_VCE.description: An industrial liquid storage tank meant for storing chemfuel. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_VCE.label: chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepchemTank.description: A heavy industrial sludge storage tank meant for storing deepchem delivered via deepchem pipe network. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepchemTank.label: deepchem tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_Allspice.description: A fake, anomalous, leafy vine bearing tiny unpalatable green fruits. When ground finely during cooking the fruits release a complex, peppery flavor, perfect for spicing dishes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Allspice.label: allspice
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanningMachine.description: A canning machine is an appliance to store preserved food inside metallic cans. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanningMachine.label: canning machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_CheesePress.description: A cheese press is a device for pressing whey from curds when making cheese. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CheesePress.label: cheese press
LanguageData.VFEPD_CondimentPrepTable.description: A working table to cut, slice and prepare condiments used in gourmet recipes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CondimentPrepTable.label: decorative condiment table
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepFrier.description: A deep fryer is a kitchen appliance used for deep frying. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepFrier.label: deep fryer
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricPot.description: An electric pot, also called a thermo pot, is a small appliance used for boiling water and maintaining it at a constant temperature. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricPot.label: electric pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grill.description: A grill is a device that cooks food by applying heat from below. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grill.label: grill
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sugarcane.description: A fake, thick, tall, tropical grass with jointed stems. While not exactly the most nutritious thing to eat on its own, this genetically modified sugarcane is easily milled into sugar and then used for a variety of culinary creations - Particularly desserts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sugarcane.label: sugarcane
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheat.description: A fake, amber cereal plant that takes almost an entire growing season to come to fruition. While fragile and time-consuming, this wheat has been genetically engineered to gently break into flour with a mere touch.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheat.label: wheat
LanguageData.VFEPD_StewPot.description: A wood-fired stove with a top side perfectly indented for a large pot. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StewPot.label: stew pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_SoyFermenter.description: A soy fermenter is a cilindrical, metallic drum where soybeans are pressed, mixed with aspergillus bacteria and grain, and aged for long time periods. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SoyFermenter.label: soy sauce fermenter
LanguageData.VFEPD_SushiPrepTable.description: A working table to cut, slice and prepare all kinds of sushi.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SushiPrepTable.label: sushi prep table
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Electric.descriptio: An electric oven designed for baking cookies, pastries, and cakes with reliable, consistent heat distribution for perfect results every time. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Electric.label: electric bakery oven
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Fueled.description: A wood-fueled oven designed for baking cookies, pastries, and cakes. Its steady heat ensures even cooking and sweet results. Non-functional.
