This building can be manually used. Sick and/or injured pawns that are capable of moving on their own should be directed to use the spring once a day. Pawns incapable of moving cannot safely use the spring's waters without undue risk of drowning, and are thus forbidden.
LanguageData.SmallHotSpring.label: hot spring
LanguageData.VTE_ACCompressor.description: An air conditioning compressor that needs to be connected to an AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be placed outside. When powered, it allows the AC network to operate two additional AC devices without losing efficiency.
LanguageData.VTE_ACCompressor.label: AC compressor
LanguageData.VTE_ACControlUnit.description: A main air conditioning control unit. Connects to compressors to allow AC units to generate cool or hot air. Needs to be connected to compressors by air ducts. AC control unit dictates the desired temperature for all AC units in the same network. Installing too many AC units may decrease the efficiency of the network, increasing the power drain of all devices. Constructing additional compressors will improve the efficiency of the network.
LanguageData.VTE_ACControlUnit.label: AC control unit
LanguageData.VTE_ACUnit.description: An air-conditioning machine that fits into a wall. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts.
LanguageData.VTE_ACUnit.label: AC unit
LanguageData.VTE_ACUnitWall.description: A wall-mounted air-conditioning machine. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be constructed on a wall.
LanguageData.VTE_ACUnitWall.label: wall-mounted AC unit
LanguageData.VTE_AirDuct.description: An air duct used by the AC network to transport air between the AC units and compressors.
LanguageData.VTE_AirDuct.label: air duct
LanguageData.VTE_LargeACCompressor.description: A large air conditioning compressor that needs to be connected to an AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be placed outside. When powered, it allows the AC network to operate six additional AC devices without losing efficiency.
LanguageData.VTE_LargeACCompressor.label: large AC compressor
LanguageData.VTE_UndergroundAirDuct.description: A subterranean air duct used by the AC network to transport air between the AC units and compressors.
LanguageData.VTE_UndergroundAirDuct.label: subterranean air duct
LanguageData.VTE_VentValve.label: air duct valve
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialCooler.description: A large, industrial-type air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Cool air comes out one side, while hot exhaust comes out the other. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer. It’s capable of cooling the room to much lower temperature than the standard cooler.
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialCooler.label: industrial cooler
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialHeater.description: A large, industrial-type heater machine that fits into a wall. It converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. It is capable of heating up the room to a much higher temperature than the standard heaters.
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialHeater.label: industrial heater
LanguageData.VTE_LargeCeilingFan.description: A large, ceiling-mounted fan. Can be used to quickly cool down rooms during the summer. Not efficient enough to refrigerate food, it will aim to reach a room temperature of 17C.
LanguageData.VTE_LargeCeilingFan.label: large ceiling fan
LanguageData.VTE_SmallCeilingFan.description: A ceiling-mounted fan. Can be used to slowly cool down rooms during the summer. Not efficient enough to refrigerate food, it will aim to reach a room temperature of 17C.
LanguageData.VTE_SmallCeilingFan.label: small ceiling fan
LanguageData.VTE_StandingCooler.description: A free standing air-cooling machine. Cool air comes out of a fan and spreads over surrounding area. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer. Not efficient enough to refrigerate food.
LanguageData.VTE_StandingCooler.label: standing cooler
LanguageData.VTE_WallHeater.description: A heating machine that fits into a wall. It converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. Can be used to heat up rooms during winter.
LanguageData.VTE_WallHeater.label: wall heater
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedCooler.description: A wall-mounted air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Cool air comes out one side, while hot exhaust comes out the other. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer. Can only be constructed on a wall.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedCooler.label: wall-mounted cooler
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedHeater.description: A wall-mounted device that converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. Can only be constructed on a wall.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedHeater.label: wall-mounted heater
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedVent.description: A simple, wall-mounted vent for equalizing the temperature between two rooms without allowing people to walk between them. Can only be constructed on a wall.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedVent.label: wall-mounted vent
LanguageData.Apparel_ArchoShuttle.description: A mysterious wearable archotech device that creates shuttles from thin air at will. This must be the technology Voyager used.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArchoShuttle.label: archotech shuttle creator
LanguageData.Apparel_ArchoShuttle.verbs.0.label: generate shuttle
LanguageData.Apparel_ShuttleComm.description: A single-use communications unit to request dustoff by shuttlecraft.
LanguageData.Apparel_ShuttleComm.label: shuttle comm
LanguageData.Apparel_ShuttleComm.verbs.0.label: call for dustoff
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelDispenser.description: A terminal used to purchase fusion fuel for small shuttlecraft. Must be placed adjacent to a landing pad to work; once payment has been verified, pumps inside the pad will draw fuel from fuel tanks on the same powernet.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelDispenser.label: fusion fuel terminal
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelProcessor.description: A spacer-tech fuel processor. Must be placed in shallow water to operate; once activated, volatiles from supplied chemfuel are combined with siphoned water in its massive reaction tank and energized, setting off a complex chain of chemical reactions that ultimately resolve into a common variety of liquid fusion fuel.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelProcessor.label: fusion fuel processor
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelTank.description: A spacer-tech tank designed to hold liquid fusion fuel. Its integrated cooling systems must run at all times, or the fuel inside will begin to evaporate away.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelTank.label: fusion fuel tank
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleLandingPad.description: An automated landing pad for shuttlecraft. An integrated deep-field transmitter broadcasts the pad's availability and status across the local solar system, bringing in visitors from across the world and beyond.
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleLandingPad.label: shuttle landing pad
LanguageData.Spaceports_Beacon.description: A combination deep-field transmitter and over-the-horizon radar station used throughout the Rim to broadcast the presence and availability of a spaceport.
LanguageData.Spaceports_Beacon.label: spaceport beacon
LanguageData.Spaceports_VisitorSpot.description: Designates a configurable spot for spaceport visitors to linger at.\n\nArriving spaceport visitors will pick the closest valid spot to their shuttle pad or landing position; if no valid spot is found, they will instead linger around their shuttle. Multiple parties can linger at the same spot simultaneously.
LanguageData.Spaceports_VisitorSpot.label: spaceport visitor spot
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleInert.description: An ancient shuttle, scarred and worn out by endless centuries spent trawling between stars. Its reactor has been rendered useless, making it only good for scrap.
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleInert.label: inert shuttle
LanguageData.Spaceports_SurpriseShuttle.description: A mysterious shuttlecraft. Its transponder has been disabled, and all attempts at remote communication have failed. Approach with caution.
LanguageData.Spaceports_SurpriseShuttle.label: mysterious shuttle
LanguageData.ShuttleIncoming.label: shuttle (incoming)
LanguageData.ShuttleLeaving.label: shuttle (leaving)
LanguageData.Spaceports_Shrapnel.label: shrapnel (incoming)
LanguageData.Ammo_556x45mmNATO_SSAAP.label: 5.56x45mm NATO (SSAAP)
LanguageData.Bullet_556x45mmNATO_SSAAP.label: 5.56mm NATO bullet (SSAAP)
LanguageData.AM_AScompFD.description: Four bulletproof plates firmly protect the dress. Use four fourth level PE plates for protection, keeping its weight within an acceptable range. Due to being too bulky, flak vests cannot be worn anymore. Integrated with some tactical vest features, providing a bulletproof level of power armor.
LanguageData.AM_AScompFD.label: composite assault dress
LanguageData.AM_MK4aConcealed.description: A rig equipped with bulletproof armor plates. Its lightweight model can be concealed underneath an outer garment, providing effective protection for the entire upper body.
LanguageData.AM_MK4aConcealed.label: armored concealed rig
LanguageData.AM_MK4aDefensive.description: A rig equipped with bulletproof armor plates. Its heavy-duty structure can provide effective protection but does not protect the legs.
LanguageData.AM_MK4aDefensive.label: armored defensive rig
LanguageData.AM_CataphractHelmetFashion.description: A cataphract helmet, which was secretly modified by a fashionable person, was painted with the logo of a famous ancient clothing store.
LanguageData.AM_CataphractHelmetFashion.label: cataphract helmet “fashion”
LanguageData.AM_CataphractHelmetSlaughter.description: A cataphract helmet, which was secretly modified by a deranged killer, was adorned with a skull and the word 'Slaughter'.
LanguageData.AM_CataphractHelmetSlaughter.label: cataphract helmet “slaughter”
LanguageData.AM_ClosedOxygenCylinder.description: The sealed oxygen cylinder, designed for combat in severe environments, contains a minor amount of doping gas, enhancing the user's combat effectiveness.
LanguageData.AM_ClosedOxygenCylinder.label: closed oxygen cylinder
LanguageData.AM_CompFlakSuit.description: Combat clothing made of aramid material, when paired with a composite bulletproof vest, offers the benefits of lightweight mobility and significant protection. This type of attire was frequently worn by ancient soldiers.
LanguageData.AM_CompFlakSuit.label: composite flak suit
LanguageData.AM_FullyEnclosedHelmet.description: An aramid bulletproof helmet, paired with a fully enclosed polyurethane gas mask, effectively mitigates the dangers of toxic environments and offers superior protection,often equipped by ancient soldiers.
LanguageData.AM_FullyEnclosedHelmet.label: fully enclosed helmet
LanguageData.AM_NightVisionHelmet.description: An aramid bulletproof helmet, used in conjunction with night vision goggles, enhances the wearer's shooting accuracy. It was commonly worn by ancient soldiers.
LanguageData.AM_NightVisionHelmet.label: night vision helmet
LanguageData.AM_BulletproofMask.description: A fully protected bulletproof mask made of aramid fiber. Its build is lightweight and has considerable armoring.
LanguageData.AM_BulletproofMask.label: bulletproof mask
LanguageData.AM_Budweiser.description: A once popular ancient beer brand, canned for its ancient customers.
LanguageData.AM_Budweiser.label: budweiser
LanguageData.AM_CannedBraisedPorkbelly.description: An ancient can of braised pork. Its a great source of happiness despite the dust.
LanguageData.AM_CannedBraisedPorkbelly.label: canned braised pork
LanguageData.AM_CannedHerring.description: An ancient can of herring. Quite salty, but the freshness is appealing.
LanguageData.AM_CannedHerring.label: canned herring
LanguageData.AM_CannedPeas.description: An ancient can of soft, sweet peas.
LanguageData.AM_CannedPeas.label: canned peas
LanguageData.AM_CannedStewedBeef.description: An ancient can of muffalo meat stewed with potatoes and tomatoes. Very delicious.
LanguageData.AM_CannedStewedBeef.label: canned stewed muffalo
LanguageData.AM_Coca.description: An ancient sparkling beverage with high sugar content. Just a sip could make someone happy for an entire day.
LanguageData.AM_Coca.label: coca-cola
LanguageData.AM_DeliciousCannedBeef.description: An ancient can of pure muffalo meat stew. Has a very strong buttery aroma.
LanguageData.AM_DeliciousCannedBeef.label: deluxe canned muffalo
LanguageData.AM_Fanta.description: An ancient carbonated orange-flavored soft drink, sweet and delicious.
LanguageData.AM_Fanta.label: fanta
LanguageData.AM_MilkBeer.description: An ancient concoction of milk and beer mixed with canned drinks. It can even fill the stomach!
LanguageData.AM_MilkBeer.label: milk beer
LanguageData.AM_MRE.description: A pack of ancient military rations. It's intact and won't spoil, but it doesn't look very appetizing.
LanguageData.AM_MRE.label: military ration
LanguageData.AM_Pepsi.description: An ancient, slightly inferior carbonated soft drink. Seems sweeter than the others.
LanguageData.AM_Pepsi.label: pepsi
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsA.description: An ancient bag of classic thin cut salted potato chips. and packaged with nitrogen gas making it difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsA.label: classic potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsB.description: An ancient bag of tomato flavored potato chips. It's sweet and sour, delicious, and packaged with nitrogen gas making it difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsB.label: tomato potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsC.description: An ancient bag of potato chips with a unique cucumber flavor，packaged with nitrogen gas making it difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsC.label: cucumber potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsD.description: An ancient bag of steak flavored potato chips. Eating them feels like enjoying a feast. Packaged with nitrogen gas making it difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsD.label: steak potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsE.description: An ancient bag of lemon flavored potato chips. Bursting with that summer flavor, and packaged with a nitrogen gas, making difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsE.label: lemon potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsF.description: An ancient bag of Italian braised potato chips. Its taste is like eating a strong and fragrant tomato minced meat stew. Packaged with a nitrogen gas, making difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsF.label: italian red stew potato chips
LanguageData.AM_Sprite.description: An ancient lemon-lime flavored soft drink with a strong sour taste.
LanguageData.AM_Sprite.label: sprite
LanguageData.AM_TsingtaoBeer.description: An ancient canned beer with a lovely aftertaste.
LanguageData.AM_TsingtaoBeer.label: tsingtao
LanguageData.AM_IntegratedTorsoArmor.description: An ancient, specialized implant involved introducing carefully selected parasites into the body, endowing the subject with a body akin to bulletproof fibers and enhancing muscular strength. However, the technology behind it has been entirely lost and cannot be replicated.
LanguageData.AM_IntegratedTorsoArmor.label: integrated parasite armor
LanguageData.AM_RampageParasite.description: An unsuccessful outcome of ancient parasitic experiments, though it greatly enhances combat effectiveness, the victim lacks any semblance of intelligence and is utterly uncontrollable..
LanguageData.AM_RampageParasite.label: rampage parasite

LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_AcientConcrete.description: A structure with waterproof layers, commonly found in underground facilities or old buildings.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_AcientConcrete.label: ancient facility wall
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_AcientConcrete_HP.descript: A long-aged wall that seems to be destroyed easily.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_AcientConcrete_HP.label: ancient facility wall (weathered)
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Concrete.description: A long-aged reinforced concrete structure, sturdy and nearly indestructible.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Concrete.label: ancient concrete wall
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Concrete_HP.description: A long-aged structure, can be destroyed with force.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Concrete_HP.label: ancient concrete wall(weathered)
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Glass.description: A long-aged wall composed of fragile glass and metal frames.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Glass.label: ancient glass curtain wall
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_LoadBearing.description: A long-aged concrete load-bearing wall with thick structural steel reinforcement.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_LoadBearing.label: ancient load-bearing concrete walls
LanguageData.AM_AncientDismantlingWorkbench.descripti: An ancient dismantling table that integrates machinery and sewing.
LanguageData.AM_AncientDismantlingWorkbench.label: ancient dismantling table
LanguageData.AM_DiningChair.description: A comfortable and attractive chair. Can be used at tables, work stations, and elsewhere.
LanguageData.AM_DiningChair.label: dining chair
LanguageData.AM_DownwardStairs.description: A staircase descends into the basement, where it is quite dark.
LanguageData.AM_DownwardStairs.label: ancient construction site staircase
LanguageData.AM_ElectricalBox.description: A electrical box used to supply power to multi story building facilities, which can adjust the output power of each floor freely.
LanguageData.AM_ElectricalBox.label: electrical box
LanguageData.AM_Exit_L.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation.
LanguageData.AM_Exit_L.label: ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_Exit_S.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation.
LanguageData.AM_Exit_S.label: ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_LargeScreenTelevision.description: A super large ancient television capable of displaying 3D images, providing an entertainment experience akin to a 3D cinema.
LanguageData.AM_LargeScreenTelevision.label: large-screen television
LanguageData.AM_SmallGenerator.label: small fuel generator
LanguageData.AM_Trader.description: Ancient logistics terminal, this is part of the ancient underground automatic logistics system.You can purchase goods from ancient material storage stations through the interactive panel, which constitutes a logistics system within an ancient city.
LanguageData.AM_Trader.label: ancient logistics terminal
LanguageData.AM_TransportPod.description: A launchable sub-orbital cargo pod capable of carrying people, items, or animals. Can be used for sending gifts, transporting people or supplies, surprise attacks, or reinforcing battles.
LanguageData.AM_TransportPod.label: transport pod
LanguageData.AM_VirutalMiner.description: A computing center pieced together from ancient high-performance computer components, with parallel computing power from multiple GPUs, automatically analyzes intelligence locations, meteorological data, mechanical swarm data, and even writes books from known information.
LanguageData.AM_VirutalMiner.label: computation center
LanguageData.AM_BlockedLargeElevator.description: Large elevators that have been abandoned and buried underground facilities are ready to be dismantled at any time.
LanguageData.AM_BlockedLargeElevator.label: abandoned large elevator

LanguageData.AM_Exit_Staircase_LargeElevator.label: large facility elevator

LanguageData.AM_AncientHydrant.description: An ancient hydrant. Heavily rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.

LanguageData.AM_AncientKitchenSink.description: An ancient kitchen sink made of some non-metallic fiber-sheet material. It is badly deteriorated and there's no way to salvage anything from it.\n\nHow it got here must be a long story.

LanguageData.VCEV_CookingBook.description: A book detailing different recipes and concepts related to new ingredients and culinary techniques.\n\nOnce read, it will provide a new favourite ingredient or meal to the reader, and then it will be destroyed (why is it destroyed? I see you haven't spent much time around a kitchen...)

LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_Parka.description: A thick, ancient parka for staying warm even in the coldest of temperatures. Somehow it seems resistant to deterioration, but the way to tailor one of these has been lost to history.
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_Parka.label: ancient tight parka
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Basic.description: Advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Must be placed on a steam geyser.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Basic.label: ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ChemfuelBoosted.description: Chemfuel-boosted advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and chemfuel burned in a gigantic engine. The engine requires regular maintenance, and lack of it can result in a critical breakdown of the ARC components. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. It can also be tuned to increase the power generation even further. A power surge function allows it to instantly vaporize a large quantity of fuel to refill batteries in the network. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ChemfuelBoosted.label: chemfuel-boosted ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ChemfuelCharged.description: Chemfuel-charged advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and chemfuel burned in a gigantic engine. The engine requires regular maintenance, and lack of it can result in a critical breakdown of the ARC components. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. It can also be fine-tuned to increase the power generation even further or reduce maintenance loss if the strain on the components is too high. A power surge function allows it to instantly vaporize a large quantity of fuel to refill batteries in the network. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ChemfuelCharged.label: chemfuel-charged ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ChemfuelFortified.descripti: Chemfuel-fortified advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and chemfuel burned in a gigantic engine. The engine requires regular maintenance, and lack of it can result in a critical breakdown of the ARC components. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. It can also be fine-tuned to increase the power generation even further or reduce maintenance loss if the strain on the components is too high. A power surge function allows it to instantly vaporize a large quantity of fuel to refill batteries in the network. It is possible to calibrate the efficiency of the ARC to permanently increase the power generated from each burnt unit of fuel. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ChemfuelFortified.label: chemfuel-fortified ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ChemfuelPowered.description: Chemfuel-powered advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and chemfuel burned in a gigantic engine. The engine requires regular maintenance, and lack of it can result in a critical breakdown of the ARC components. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. It can also be tuned to increase the power generation even further. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ChemfuelPowered.label: chemfuel-powered ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Geothermal.description: Geothermal advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers. The engine requires regular maintenance, and lack of it can result in a critical breakdown of the ARC components. Unlike other ARCs, however, this variant can be maintained by anyone, even those who haven’t studied the ancient generators. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Pressure can be tuned to reduce the maintenance need at the cost of lower power consumption. It is possible to calibrate the efficiency of the ARC to permanently increase the power generated. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Geothermal.label: geothermal ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_HeatPowered.description: Heat-powered advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers. The engine requires regular maintenance, and lack of it can result in a minor breakdown that requires just regular components to fix. Unlike other ARCs, however, this variant can be maintained by anyone, even those who haven’t studied the ancient generators. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Pressure can be tuned to reduce the maintenance need at the cost of lower power consumption. It is possible to calibrate the efficiency of the ARC to permanently increase the power generated. The steam boost ability can be used to temporarily increase the power output, but requires a lengthy cool down period afterwards. This generator will continue generating power even during a solar flare. It is also possible to calibrate the internal components, permanently lowering the maintenance need of the device. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_HeatPowered.label: heat-powered ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_SteamPowered.description: Steam-powered advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers. The engine requires regular maintenance, and lack of it can result in a critical breakdown of the ARC components. Unlike other ARCs, however, this variant can be maintained by anyone, even those who haven’t studied the ancient generators. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Pressure can be tuned to reduce the maintenance need at the cost of lower power consumption. It is possible to calibrate the efficiency of the ARC to permanently increase the power generated. The steam boost ability can be used to temporarily increase the power output, but requires a lengthy cool down period afterwards. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_SteamPowered.label: steam-powered ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ThermalVent.description: Thermal-vent advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers. The engine requires regular maintenance, and lack of it can result in a minor breakdown that requires just regular components to fix. Unlike other ARCs, however, this variant can be maintained by anyone, even those who haven’t studied the ancient generators. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Pressure can be tuned to reduce the maintenance need at the cost of lower power consumption. It is possible to calibrate the efficiency of the ARC to permanently increase the power generated. The steam boost ability can be used to temporarily increase the power output, but requires a lengthy cool down period afterwards. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ThermalVent.label: thermal-vent ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.description: An old, rusted fragment of an ARC. It was probably abandoned when the construction project was halted. It might be possible to disassemble it to obtain some valuable ARC components.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.label: ancient ARC part
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_One.description: A rusted frame of an old power generator, incomplete and barely holding together. Most of its parts are long gone, scavenged or destroyed by time. What’s left is little more than scrap, with no hope of restoration. Perhaps investigating the area could allow you to find the location of another prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_One.label: prototype
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Three.descriptio: An almost-complete generator, abandoned before it could ever work. The structure is more solid, but its insides are wrecked—rust, missing pieces, and heavy overgrowth make it useless. Only a few materials can still be salvaged, but among them it is possible to find some ARC components. Perhaps investigating the area could allow you to find the location of another prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Three.label: prototype
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Two.description: An abandoned generator. Its machinery slightly more intact but still useless. Broken panels, snapped wires, and heavy rust show it was never finished. It’s overgrown and forgotten, offering only a few parts to salvage. Perhaps investigating the area could allow you to find the location of another prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Two.label: prototype
LanguageData.VQE_AncientChainlinkFence.description: An ancient fence made of reinforced metal posts connected by rusted chainlink.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientChainlinkFence.label: ancient chainlink fence
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionCrane.description: A rusted, overgrown wreck of a large construction crane. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Cranes like that could have been used to construct the large ARC generators, but this wreck can no longer be utilised for anything due to broken down machinery.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionCrane.label: ancient construction crane
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionTruck.description: A rusted, overgrown wreck of a large construction truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. It was most likely used in construction of an ARC generator, judging by the still present shells of a large generator unit strapped on the back.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionTruck.label: ancient construction truck
LanguageData.VQE_AncientDigger.description: A rusted, overgrown wreck of a large digger. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. A digger of that size could’ve been used to prepare the area for the construction of an ARC generator, but this one is in a very bad state.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientDigger.label: ancient digger
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGenetron.description: An ancient prototype of an ARC, ruined by time and lack of maintenance. Most of the critical machinery has been looted long ago, thwarting any restatoration attempts, however deconstructing it may still yield valuable components, useful in constructing a brand new ARC. This ancient ruin can be studied to learn how to construct and maintain an ARC.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGenetron.label: ancient ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGeothermalGenetron.descriptio: An ancient geothermal ARC, ruined by time and lack of maintenance. Most of the critical machinery has been looted long ago, thwarting any restatoration attempts, however deconstructing it may still yield valuable components, useful in constructing a brand new ARC. This ancient ruin can be studied to learn how to construct a geothermal ARC.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGeothermalGenetron.label: ancient geothermal ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientOvergrownGenetron.description: A mysterious, ancient, overgrown ARC. It seems to look more like a working prototype than a finished product, now fully covered in brambles and signs of aging. Somehow, despite its age, it’s still operating, generating sufficient power for nearby electrical networks. Any tampering with it is bound to irreversibly damage it, but it may be possible to extract some ARC components from it.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientOvergrownGenetron.label: experimental ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles.description: An ancient, rusted filing cabinet containing folders with research notes regarding the construction of an ARC generator.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles.label: ancient research files
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles_Off.description: An ancient, rusted filing cabinet. It’s completely empty.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles_Off.label: ancient filing cabinet
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal.description: An ancient computer terminal. It can be used to access research notes related to an ARC generator unit.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal.label: research terminal
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Cracked.desc: An ancient computer terminal. The screen is cracked and any components of value have been removed.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Off.descript: An ancient computer terminal. It’s disconnected from power, or simply not working.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Off.label: ancient research terminal
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Boxes.description: A rusted construction pallet with a stack of old, rusted steel boxes. Anything of value has been removed a long time ago.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Boxes.label: construction pallet with boxes
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Chemfuel.descript: A rusted construction pallet with a stack of unused chemfuel jerrycans. Can be salvaged through to recover some chemfuel.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Chemfuel.label: construction pallet with jerrycans
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Components.descri: A rusted construction pallet with a large container of scrapped components on it. Can be rummaged through to recover some industrial components.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Components.label: construction pallet with components
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Scrap.description: A rusted construction pallet with a large container of scrap on it. Can be rummaged through to recover some steel.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Scrap.label: construction pallet with scrap
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Wood.description: A rusted construction pallet with a large stack of rotting wood. It is possible to recover some drier wood from it.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Wood.label: construction pallet with wood
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyConstructionPallet.description: A rusted construction pallet. It’s empty.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyConstructionPallet.label: empty construction pallet
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart.description: A bizarre piece of machinery that was designed for a large generator. Since it was covered with a tarp, it’s relatively intact. It can be studied to gain some knowledge about the ARC generator unit that may help decipher the ancient research data left by the inventor. It might be possible to disassemble it to obtain some valuable ARC components.
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart.label: experimental ARC part
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart_Studied.descript: A bizarre piece of machinery that was designed for a large generator. As you have already studied it, it can be disassembled for parts.
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart_Studied.label: studied experimental ARC part
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.description: A twisted chunk of an ARC. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.label: ARC junk
LanguageData.VQE_NuclearGenetronHusk.description: A ruined husk of a nuclear ARC. Lack of maintenance or other unforeseen crisis has resulted in a devastating detonation that has twisted the metal into something quite unusable. This husk can be studied to learn how to construct and maintain a nuclear ARC, but can also be deconstructed to yield some resources back.
LanguageData.VQE_NuclearGenetronHusk.label: nuclear ARC husk
LanguageData.VQE_OvergrownCryptosleepCasket.descripti: This cryptosleep casket is overgrown with brambles and looks like it has been here for a very long time. Who knows what it might contain?
LanguageData.VQE_OvergrownCryptosleepCasket.label: cryptosleep casket
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Atomic.description: Atomic advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from a reaction that occurs when uranium breaks down inside the core. The more uranium is present in the core, the faster it breaks down, but it also generates more power. If uranium ever runs out, the reactor will shut down and will need to be refilled with a large quantity of uranium to restart. The core suffers wear and tear with each uranium unit broken down, and will require continuous maintenance, as lack of it will result in a catastrophic nuclear detonation. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. Fuel rods can also be calibrated to permanently reduce the rate at which uranium decays. This reactor can operate in one of two modes: basic safe mode, or hazard mode, in which maintenance does not lower when uranium is broken down, but radiation leaks out of the core affecting everyone in a large radius. Emergency shut-down systems are also in place, allowing the reactor to stop at any point in order to prevent a critical meltdown. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied a husk of a nuclear ARC generator.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Atomic.label: atomic ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Isotopic.description: Isotopic advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from a reaction that occurs when uranium breaks down inside the core. The more uranium is present in the core, the faster it breaks down, but it also generates more power. If uranium ever runs out, the reactor will shut down and will need to be refilled with a large quantity of uranium to restart. The core suffers wear and tear with each uranium unit broken down, and will require continuous maintenance, as lack of it will result in a catastrophic nuclear detonation. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. Fuel rods can also be calibrated to permanently reduce the rate at which uranium decays. This reactor can operate in one of two modes: basic safe mode, or hazard mode, in which maintenance does not lower when uranium is broken down, but radiation leaks out of the core affecting everyone in a large radius. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied a husk of a nuclear ARC generator.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Isotopic.label: isotopic ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Nuclear.description: Nuclear advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from a reaction that occurs when uranium breaks down inside the core. The more uranium is present in the core, the faster it breaks down, but it also generates more power. If uranium ever runs out, the reactor will shut down and will need to be refilled with a large quantity of uranium to restart. The core suffers wear and tear with each uranium unit broken down, and will require continuous maintenance, as lack of it will result in a catastrophic nuclear detonation. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. Fuel rods can also be calibrated to permanently reduce the rate at which uranium decays. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied a husk of a nuclear ARC generator.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Nuclear.label: nuclear ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_UraniumPowered.description: Uranium-powered advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from a reaction that occurs when uranium breaks down inside the core. The more uranium is present in the core, the faster it breaks down, but it also generates more power. If uranium ever runs out, the reactor will shut down and will need to be refilled with a large quantity of uranium to restart. The core suffers wear and tear with each uranium unit broken down, and will require continuous maintenance, as lack of it will result in a catastrophic nuclear detonation. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied a husk of a nuclear ARC generator.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_UraniumPowered.label: uranium-powered ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodBlasting.description: Wood-blasting advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and wood burned in a set of large furnaces. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. It can also be tuned to increase the power generation even further. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodBlasting.label: wood-blasting ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFired.description: Wood-fired advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and wood burned in a set of large furnaces. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFired.label: wood-fired ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFueled.description: Wood-fired advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and wood burned in a set of large furnaces. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFueled.label: wood-fueled ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodPowered.description: Wood-powered advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and wood burned in a set of large furnaces. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodPowered.label: wood-powered ARC
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronComponent.description: Complex lump of ancient mechanical systems, engineered with precision and knowledge that surpasses current technological understanding. The ability to replicate these components has been lost over generations, making them rare and essential for construction of the ARCs.
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronComponent.label: ARC component
LanguageData.VFEM2_Mead.description: A drink akin to wine, made of fermented honey and water, aged in a simple barrel. This sweet, crisp drink is known be nursed over time and has a reputation of being particularly comforting. Consuming mead lowers psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Mead.label: mead
LanguageData.VFEM2_Wine.description: A large bottle of a strong alcoholic beverage that is made from fermented grapes. Excessive consumption can lead to alcohol blackouts and, over time, addiction. Consuming wine increases psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Wine.label: wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Cap.description: A sleek, feathered cap worn by skilled archers and woodland hunters. Its lightweight design keeps vision clear and focus sharp, making it easier to land precise shots.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Cap.label: cap
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Chaperon.description: A stylish and versatile hood with a wrapped tail, favored by diplomats and merchants. It lends an air of authority, subtly improving negotiation skills.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Chaperon.label: chaperon
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_DameHat.description: A beautiful long cone hat for a dame.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_DameHat.label: dame hat
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_HeavyLeatherHelmet.descrip: A strong medieval helmet that provides full-head coverage. While it offers fantastic protection, one's vision is greatly obscured, thus it is only recommended for front line infantry, particularly those foregoing shields.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_HeavyLeatherHelmet.label: heavy leather helmet
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_JesterHat.description: A hat worthy of a jester. Each half is different from the other one in color.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_JesterHat.label: jester hat
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_KingsCrown.description: A beautiful metal crown. The wearer becomes very influential, but at the same time they will refuse to do any work.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_KingsCrown.label: king's crown
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_LeatherHelmet.description: A simple leather helmet designed to not block ones communication during combat. Often worn by front line, shield-wielding infantry to soak damage.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_LeatherHelmet.label: leather helmet
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PaddedHelmet.description: A simple leather helmet designed to not block one's communication during combat. Often worn by front line, shield-wielding infantry to soak damage.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PaddedHelmet.label: padded helmet
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlagueMask.description: A mask with a long ‘beak’ filled with herbal medicine that keeps infected pawns at a distance.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlagueMask.label: plague mask
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlateHelmetHeavy.descripti: A bulky medieval helmet that provides full-head coverage. Offers a considerable amount of protection but restricts the wearer's field of vision.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlateHelmetHeavy.label: heavy plate helmet
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_TorchBelt.description: A belt with a number of wooden torches strapped to it. They can be lit up and thrown to set things ablaze. Can be refueled with wood.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_TorchBelt.label: torch belt
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_TorchBelt.verbs.0.label: throw torch
LanguageData.VFEM2_Proj_GrenadeTorch.label: thrown torch
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_DameDress.description: A beautiful full body dress for a dame. Wearing such clothes will inevitably lead to getting used to luxury, so the user will not be capable of dumb labor.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_DameDress.label: dame dress
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_HeavyLeatherArmor.descript: A heavy leather breastplate meant to provide warmth and protection to heavy infantry during battles in frigid tundras. Unfortunately, this armor leaves one slowed and more vulnerable to melee attacks.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_HeavyLeatherArmor.label: heavy leather armor
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_JesterOutfit.description: A colorful jester outfit. It predisposes to conversation, but it's impossible to learn anything in such a suit.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_JesterOutfit.label: jester outfit
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_KingsRobes.description: A long robe with golden chestplate, worthy of a king. Extremely beautiful.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_KingsRobes.label: king’s robes
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_LeatherArmor.description: This armor is made much more carefully and tightly out of processed leathers, sacrificing some insulation in favor of extra protection against damage. Intended to be worn by front-line troops and often accompanied by a shield.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_LeatherArmor.label: leather armor
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Mantle.description: A light cloak covering shoulders and neck, providing some protection from the elements.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Mantle.label: mantle
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PaddedArmor.description: A thick, quilted garment designed to absorb impacts and provide moderate protection. Often used by foot soldiers or worn under heavier armor.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PaddedArmor.label: padded armor
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlateArmorHeavy.descriptio: Overlapping solid plates of armor covering the entire body from neck to feet. The plates have been reinforced which offers significantly more protection, but at the cost of mobility.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlateArmorHeavy.label: heavy plate armor
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Tabard.description: A sleeveless cloth overgarment worn over armor or clothing, designed to display the wearer's heraldry. Though it provides no protection, it proudly showcases the colors and symbol of their allegiance.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Tabard.label: tabard
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apiary.description: A wooden box-like structure with a series of shelves, lattices, and chambers. When placed near flowers the apiary will naturally attract wild bees which will make it their new home. Over time these bees will produce honey which can be harvested and eaten directly, or later fermented into mead.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apiary.label: apiary
LanguageData.VFEM2_2x1CastleDoor.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VFEM2_2x1CastleDoor.label: castle door (medium)
LanguageData.VFEM2_2x1CastleGate.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks, with a latticed grille protecting the passage. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function. Castle gates take a long time to open.
LanguageData.VFEM2_2x1CastleGate.label: castle gate (medium)
LanguageData.VFEM2_3x1CastleDoor.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VFEM2_3x1CastleDoor.label: castle door (large)
LanguageData.VFEM2_3x1CastleGate.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks, with a latticed grille protecting the passage. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function. Castle gates take a long time to open.
LanguageData.VFEM2_3x1CastleGate.label: castle gate (large)
LanguageData.VFEM2_4x1CastleDoor.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VFEM2_4x1CastleDoor.label: castle door (grand)
LanguageData.VFEM2_4x1CastleGate.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks, with a latticed grille protecting the passage. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function. Castle gates take a long time to open.
LanguageData.VFEM2_4x1CastleGate.label: castle gate (grand)
LanguageData.VFEM2_AutofillShelf.description: A triple-stack shelf that holds three times as much as empty ground. Items stored inside will never deteriorate and don't affect the beauty of their surroundings.\n\nSince shelf space is limited, shelves cannot hold chunks, buildings, plants and large corpses.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AutofillShelf.label: shelf
LanguageData.VFEM2_DoubleFurBed.description: A two-person, wood-framed bed stuffed with dried grasses and covered in a variety of pelts and furs to provide extra insulation during frigid nights. The warmth of this bed counters hypothermia.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DoubleFurBed.label: double fur bed
LanguageData.VFEM2_FurBed.description: A wood-framed bed stuffed with dried grasses and covered in a variety of pelts and furs to provide extra insulation during frigid nights. The warmth of this bed counters hypothermia.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FurBed.label: fur bed
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hearth.description: A large, tightly packed fire pit capable of holding high amounts of wood at once. Provides hefty warmth and light to thronerooms and halls alike and acts as a gathering spot for idle colonists.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hearth.label: hearth
LanguageData.VFEM2_StandingBanner.description: A tall fabric banner mounted on a sturdy wooden frame, proudly displaying the heraldry of the faction.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StandingBanner.label: heraldic standing banner
LanguageData.VFEM2_HearthDarklight.description: A large, tightly packed fire pit capable of holding high amounts of wood at once. Provides hefty warmth and light to thronerooms and halls alike and acts as a gathering spot for idle colonists.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HearthDarklight.label: darklight hearth
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArcheryTarget.description: A simple archery target mounted on a wooden stand. It's relaxing, and allows oneself to test their accuracy and train over time without risking fatal confrontation.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArcheryTarget.label: archery target
LanguageData.VFEM2_TrainingDummy.description: A target dummy made out of wood, soil, and dried plant matter. Surprisingly durable, allows oneself to test their swordsmanship and train over time without risking fatal confrontation.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TrainingDummy.label: training dummy
LanguageData.VFEM2_LeatherBoilpot.description: A wood-fueled metal pot used to boil patchleather. Consumes wood when working.
LanguageData.VFEM2_LeatherBoilpot.label: leather boilpot
LanguageData.VFEM2_AilmentsShelf.description: A small wooden cabinet that can be stocked with herbal remedies, tinctures, and basic medicinal tools. Items stored inside will never deteriorate and don't affect the beauty of their surroundings.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AilmentsShelf.label: ailment's shelf
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArtToolStand.description: A rack with chisels, hammers, and other carving tools. Increases work speed when placed near an art bench. One workbench can only use one tool stand.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArtToolStand.label: art tool stand
LanguageData.VFEM2_CarvingBoard.description: A thick, well-worn wooden board that allows for precision cuts. Increases work speed when placed near a butchering table. The sharp blades allow the butcher to extract 10% more meat and leather from any butchered creature. One workbench can only use one carving board.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CarvingBoard.label: carving board
LanguageData.VFEM2_ChiselRack.description: A small rack filled with various chisels. Increases work speed when placed near a stonecutter’s table. One workbench can only use one chisel rack.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ChiselRack.label: chisel rack
LanguageData.VFEM2_CleaverRack.description: A sturdy rack holding sharp cleavers and knives. Increases work speed when placed near a butchering table. One workbench can only use one cleaver rack.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CleaverRack.label: cleaver rack
LanguageData.VFEM2_ForgeBellows.description: A manually operated bellows that boosts airflow to the smithy. Increases work speed when placed near a smithy. Bellows reduce the fuel consumption of the linked workbench by 20%. One workbench can only use one bellows.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ForgeBellows.label: forge bellows
LanguageData.VFEM2_MannequinStand.description: A basic mannequin used to measure and shape garments for more refined results. Increases work speed when placed near a tailoring bench. Mannequin stand allows for more precise measurements, reducing the cost of crafting apparel by 10%. One workbench can only use one mannequin.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MannequinStand.label: mannequin stand
LanguageData.VFEM2_NotesStack.description: A small desk stocked with numerous notes and pieces of paper. Increases work speed when placed near a research bench. One workbench can only use one notes stack.
LanguageData.VFEM2_NotesStack.label: notes stack
LanguageData.VFEM2_ResearchBoard.description: A slate or chalkboard for sketching diagrams and sharing ideas. Increases work speed when placed near a research bench. Up to two research benches can be linked to one chalkboard.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ResearchBoard.label: research board
LanguageData.VFEM2_SmithingAnvil.description: A heavy steel anvil used to shape metalwork with greater precision. Increases work speed when placed near a smithy. Items of awful and poor quality crafted on the linked workbench have a chance of being upgraded by one quality level. One workbench can only use one anvil.
LanguageData.VFEM2_SmithingAnvil.label: smithing anvil
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneClamp.description: A simple clamp for holding large stones in place. Increases work speed when placed near a stonecutter’s table. The clamp allows higher productivity, increasing resource yield from all recipes by 10%. One workbench can only use one stone clamp.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneClamp.label: stone clamp
LanguageData.VFEM2_StonePolisher.description: A polishing wheel that ensures sculptures have a smooth and refined finish. Increases work speed when placed near an art bench. Stone sculptures of awful and poor quality crafted on the linked art bench have a high chance of being upgraded by one quality level One workbench can only use one stone polisher.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StonePolisher.label: stone polisher
LanguageData.VFEM2_SurgicalTools.description: A small stand holding scalpels, clamps, and bone saws. Increases work speed when placed near a bed of any kind, including sleeping spots and hospital beds. One bed can only use one set of surgical tools.
LanguageData.VFEM2_SurgicalTools.label: surgical tools
LanguageData.VFEM2_TailoringLoom.description: A small loom for weaving thread. Increases work speed when placed near a tailoring bench. One workbench can only use one tailoring loom.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TailoringLoom.label: tailoring loom
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadFermentingBarrel.description: A very simple barrel, held together with a series of mortise and tenon joints. Can turn honey into mead.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadFermentingBarrel.label: mead fermenting barrel
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench.description: A wood-fueled station for brewing various alchemical draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench.label: fueled draught lab
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench_Electric.descr: An electrically-powered station for brewing various alchemical draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench_Electric.label: electric draught lab
LanguageData.VFEM2_Bolt_ArbalestTurret.label: arbalest bolt
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_ArbalestTurret.description: A stationary heavy arbalest mounted on a low castle wall to grant cover. While reload speed leaves a lot to be desired, arbalest has an extremely long range, provided there is line of sight on the target.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_ArbalestTurret.label: arbalest
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_ArquebusTurret.description: A stationary arquebus mounted on a low castle wall to grant cover. Because of the added stability, the wall-mounted arquebus can fire much further than normal. The lead balls lose velocity and damage with distance, and are extremely ineffective against armor. Due to the chempowder reaction when firing the arquebus, plumes of blindsmoke are ejected from the barrel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_ArquebusTurret.label: arquebus
LanguageData.VFEM2_Turret_WallMountedArbalest.descrip: A stationary heavy arbalest mounted on a low castle wall to grant cover. While reload speed leaves a lot to be desired, arbalest has an extremely long range, provided there is line of sight on the target.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Turret_WallMountedArbalest.label: wall-mounted arbalest
LanguageData.VFEM2_Turret_WallMountedArquebus.descrip: A stationary arquebus mounted on a low castle wall to grant cover. Because of the added stability, the wall-mounted arquebus can fire much further than normal. The lead balls lose velocity and damage with distance, and are extremely ineffective against armor. Due to the chempowder reaction when firing the arquebus, plumes of blindsmoke are ejected from the barrel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Turret_WallMountedArquebus.label: wall-mounted arquebus
LanguageData.VFEM2_CastleWall.description: An incredibly resistant impassable wall made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. Capable of holding a roof. If castle wall sustains enough damage, it becomes a chest-high passable cover that when repaired, turns into an impassable wall again.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CastleWall.label: castle wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClothWall.description: An impassable wall made out of thick overlapping strips of fabric or leather stitched together. Quick to build, but extremely flammable. When deconstructed, returns all of the cloth used.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClothWall.label: cloth wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_DamagedCastleWall.description: An incredibly resistant impassable wall made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. Capable of holding a roof. If castle wall sustains enough damage, it becomes a chest-high passable cover that when repaired, turns into an impassable wall again.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DamagedCastleWall.label: damaged castle wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_DamagedLowCastleWall.description: An incredibly resistant chest-high wall made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. Incapable of holding a roof. If low castle wall sustains enough damage, it becomes a very low but standable cover that when repaired, turns into the chest-high wall again.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DamagedLowCastleWall.label: damaged low castle wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_LowCastleWall.description: An incredibly resistant chest-high wall made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. Incapable of holding a roof. If low castle wall sustains enough damage, it becomes a very low but standable cover that when repaired, turns into the chest-high wall again.
LanguageData.VFEM2_LowCastleWall.label: low castle wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_Palisade.description: An impassable fence made out of vertically-standing wooden stakes. Slow to build but requires little resources. Incapable of holding a roof.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Palisade.label: palisade
LanguageData.VFEM2_TimberedWall.description: An impassable wall made out of stone blocks and heavy, carefully fitted timbers forming a box frame. Slow to build but much more resistant to damage. Flammable, but less so than ordinary wooden walls. Capable of holding a roof.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TimberedWall.label: timbered wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineBarrel.description: A barrel for fermenting raw must into wine.
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineBarrel.label: wine barrel
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugBroad.description: A large decorative rug featuring a bold heraldic design, perfect for displaying allegiance or family pride in any room.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugBroad.label: heraldic rug (broad)
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugGrand.description: A massive decorative rug featuring a bold heraldic design, perfect for displaying allegiance or family pride in any room.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugGrand.label: heraldic rug (grand)
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugNarrow.description: A narrow decorative rug featuring a bold heraldic design, perfect for displaying allegiance or family pride in any room.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugNarrow.label: heraldic rug (narrow)
LanguageData.VFEM2_Viking_Slab_Broad.description: A stone bas relief of viking imagery for decorating a floor.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Viking_Slab_Broad.label: viking slab (broad)
LanguageData.VFEM2_Viking_Slab_Medium.description: A stone bas relief of viking imagery for decorating a floor.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Viking_Slab_Medium.label: viking slab (medium)
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.description: A crystal-clear, white liquid. When the user drinks it, it causes them to rapidly lose their memory. This effect makes both negative and positive memories fade much quicker than normal, leading to a transient experience of life's events. While this can alleviate the burden of painful memories, it also diminishes the joy and learning gained from positive experiences.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.label: amnesia draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_AntitoxDraught.description: A clear, vibrant teal liquid. When the user drinks it, it enhances their resistance to toxins, fortifying their body against harmful substances. Additionally, this draught actively works to remove any existing toxic buildup within the user’s system, purifying their body and preventing the detrimental effects of toxins.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AntitoxDraught.label: antitox draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.description: A deep indigo liquid. When the user drinks it, it induces a chemically controlled coma, significantly slowing down their metabolism. This state allows the body to conserve energy and potentially aid in healing processes under controlled conditions.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.label: coma draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.description: A slate-gray liquid that when drunk, enhances the user’s global work speed and reduces their energy depletion, allowing them to work faster and longer without feeling tired. However, the intense boost in productivity comes at a significant risk, increasing the chance of a heart attack due to the strain on the body. After the potion's effects diminish, the user experiences a sharp increase in the rate at which they become sleepy, necessitating immediate rest to recover.
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.label: efficiency draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.description: A gentle, rose-pink liquid. When the user drinks it, it artificially boosts their fertility, giving even those who are infertile a chance to conceive. This slight increase in fertility opens the possibility for individuals or couples struggling with infertility to become parents, focusing on enhancing natural reproductive processes.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.label: fertility draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.description: A crisp, energizing turquoise liquid that when drank, significantly enhances learning abilities of the user, enabling them to absorb and retain more information rapidly. Additionally, the draught increases the efficiency of eating and resting, allowing quicker nourishment and recovery. It also boosts the accumulation of psyfocus, enhancing mental clarity and psychic abilities. However, once the effects of the draught begin to fade, these enhancements reverse, leading to decreased learning capacity, slower eating and resting rates, and diminished psyfocus.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.label: focus draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.description: A vibrant red liquid. When the user drinks it, it greatly enhances their injury healing rate, speeding up the process of wound closure and tissue repair. This potion works by boosting the body’s natural healing mechanisms, making recovery from injuries much quicker.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.label: healing draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.description: An amber-colored drink with tiny particles floating in it that bolsters the immune system of anyone that drinks it. While it helps them fight off sickness better, the downside is that it makes the user feel much more tired after drinking it, as well as overall makes the user get sleepy much faster than usual. The effects of the draught are strongest immediately after consumption, and then slowly fade away over the following days.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.label: immunization draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.description: A radiant, golden-colored liquid. When the user drinks it, it provides them with mental clarity, sharpening their focus specifically on acquiring new knowledge in areas they are passionate about. However, the draught comes at the cost of diminished combat capabilities, as the user's attention is diverted away from physical prowess and towards intellectual pursuits.
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.label: inspiration draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.description: A pale blue liquid known as Painkiller Draught. When the user drinks it, it effectively reduces their sensation of pain, providing relief from discomfort and injuries. However, the sedative components of the draught also diminish the user's productivity and focus, making it harder to concentrate and complete tasks efficiently. This makes it suitable for recovery periods but less ideal when active mental or physical effort is required.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.label: painkiller draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.description: A dark, ominous green liquid. When consumed, it drastically reduces the user's consciousness, inducing a chemically forced coma. This state not only incapacitates the individual but also initiates a rapid decay of their organs. The effects of this draught are severe and irreversible, leading inevitably to death.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.label: poison draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.description: A deep, slate-gray liquid. When the user drinks it, their skin undergoes a dramatic transformation, thickening and hardening to resemble a built-in suit of armor. The entire epidermis becomes tough enough to resist burns, while jointed exterior keratin plates form over the body, including the head and face, providing additional protection. This formidable physical shield makes it extremely difficult to inflict physical harm on the user. However, the appearance of the plates and hardened skin significantly reduces the user's physical attractiveness, impacting their social interactions.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.label: stoneskin draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.description: A bold, deep red liquid. When the user drinks it, it significantly increases their physical strength, giving them the power to perform feats they normally couldn't. However, the potion also raises the user's mental break threshold, making them more prone to psychological stress. Additionally, the intense surge of strength increases the likelihood of conflicts, leading to a higher chance of social fights.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.label: strength draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.description: A dark, foreboding purple liquid. When the user drinks it, it induces severe pain, incapacitating them to the point where movement becomes impossible. For prisoners, this intense agony causes a rapid decline in their will to resist, breaking down any mental barriers they may have. In the case of slaves, the draught completely suppresses their spirit, leaving them entirely subdued. This potion is used with caution due to its extreme effects.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.label: torturer draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraught.description: A rich, crimson liquid crafted from concentrated hemogen packs. When the user drinks it, it enhances all traits and abilities tied to their hemogenic nature, boosting physical and mental capacities. Additionally, this draught replenishes the user's hemogen supply over time, maintaining their vitality and enhancing their overall function.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraught.label: hemogen draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_RoyalJellyDraught.description: A shimmering golden liquid. When the user drinks it, it significantly improves their immunity gain speed, enhancing their body's natural defenses against diseases and infections. Additionally, this draught boosts the user's consciousness and movement speed, sharpening their mental alertness and enhancing their physical agility. Upon consumption, it also lowers the progress of any ongoing infections by 5%.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RoyalJellyDraught.label: royal jelly draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.description: A light blue liquid that’s sparkling with a subtle effervescence. When the user drinks it, it restores some of their psychic focus and enhances their psychic sensitivity, allowing for clearer mental processing and heightened awareness. However, this increased mental activity significantly raises the user's hunger rate, making them need to eat more often. Additionally, the relentless mental buzz from the draught leads to a noticeable drop in mood due to the overwhelming flow of thoughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.label: clarity draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_Sweetroll.description: A baked treat made of an eggy bread base drizzled with a thick, sweetened glaze. Any trader selling these should be immediately concerned, as sweetrolls have a knack for being stolen.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Sweetroll.label: sweetroll
LanguageData.VFEM2_Must.description: Un-fermented wine. This substance needs to ferment in a wine barrel before it becomes drinkable wine.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Must.label: grape must
LanguageData.VFEM2_Honey.description: Raw, unprocessed honey harvested from an apiary, very sugary and fun to eat while also extremely long-lasting, perfect for taking on caravan trips, fermenting into mead, or baking into desserts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Honey.label: raw honey
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlocasiaLeaves.description: Extremely broad leaves of a plant that’s a commonly-recognized signifier of tropical forests. Alocasia leaves have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlocasiaLeaves.label: alocasia leaves
LanguageData.VFEM2_AstragalusFlowers.description: Small perennial wildflowers that grow in alpine climates. Astragalus flowers have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AstragalusFlowers.label: astragalus flowers
LanguageData.VFEM2_CliviaPetals.description: Petals of an unusual plant with tall, pretty flowers, called ‘bush lily’ by some. Clivia petals have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CliviaPetals.label: clivia petals
LanguageData.VFEM2_RafflesiaLeaves.description: Giant petals of the rafflesia flower. Smell like rotting flesh and are very likely to cause food poisoning when consumed raw. Rafflesia petals have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RafflesiaLeaves.label: rafflesia petals
LanguageData.VFEM2_RawGlowstool.description: Raw glowstool fungus obtained by harvesting glowstools growing in caves. Raw glowstool have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RawGlowstool.label: raw glowstool
LanguageData.VFEM2_RawGrapes.description: Raw grapes. Nice to eat, even when raw. Grapes can also be made into must which can then be used to make wine.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RawGrapes.label: grapes
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hardweave.description: Woven from smokeleaf, hardweave, sometimes called canvas, has threads alternated over and under adjacent threads to create a strong and even surface. Whilst not as insulating as cloth, it’s much more resistant to damage.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hardweave.label: hardweave
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hayweave.description: Made from woven haygrass, hayweave is a coarse and rough material, often used in desperate times for crafting rudimentary items. It provides minimal insulation and durability, making it a poor substitute for cloth, but it’s readily available and easy to produce.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hayweave.label: hayweave
LanguageData.VFEM2_HardLeather.description: A hardened textile created from patchleather via the leather hardening process. It’s significantly harder and stronger than patchleather, but it’s still lacking in comparison to proper hard leather, such as rhinoceros or elephant hide.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HardLeather.label: hardleather
LanguageData.VFEM2_UnfinishedApparelNoStuff.descripti: An unfinished piece of an apparel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_UnfinishedApparelNoStuff.label: unfinished apparel
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.description: A brutal, ancient weapon of heavy knights, the claymore can be used cleave through enemies with ease.\n\nThis weapon has a chance to deal a critical strike, stunning the opponent.
