LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.label: claymore
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.tools.2.label: edge
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_DaneAxe.description: A mighty weapon on the battlefield in the right kind of hands. Made to cut through flesh and bones alike. The axe edge extends into what's called horns, ideal for cutting through light armor and flesh alike.\n\nThis weapon has a chance to deal a critical strike, stunning the opponent.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_DaneAxe.label: dane axe
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_DaneAxe.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_DaneAxe.tools.1.label: edge
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Flail.description: A refined mace, with a spiked head connected to the handle with a chain, engineered for efficient swinging and deadly impacts. The randomness of the chain movement means that damage may fluctuate greatly.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Flail.label: flail
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Flail.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Flail.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.description: A long, unwieldy polearm with a sharp edge and a sharp point. The simple, ancient design concentrates cutting power generated from strong overhead swings. The reach of the halberd allows to strike enemies much further away.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.label: halberd
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.tools.1.label: shaft
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.tools.2.label: point
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.tools.3.label: edge
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_HeavyMace.description: A heavy mace consisting of a shaft and a heavy ball adorned with spikes. Very effective at piercing plate armor, this weapon is often used by more vicious knights and mercenaries.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_HeavyMace.label: heavy mace
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.description: A long, unwieldy polearm tipped with a sharp point for stabbing opponents. The reach of the pike allows to strike enemies much further away.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.label: pike
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.tools.1.label: shaft
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.tools.2.label: point
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Shortsword.description: A versatile and compact blade designed for both thrusting and slashing. Its nimble design makes it effective in close-quarters combat, where quick strikes can overwhelm slower foes.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Shortsword.label: shortsword
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Standard.description: A long wooden pole adorned with a flag bearing the heraldry of its bearer. While it inspires unity and bolsters morale as a rallying point for soldiers, the standard itself is poorly suited for combat, offering little in terms of offense or defense.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Standard.label: heraldic standard
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Standard.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Standard.tools.1.label: shaft
LanguageData.VFEM2_Plant_Grape.description: A medium-sized vine that yields grapes when harvested - an essential ingredient in the production of wine that also tastes nice when eaten raw. Takes a long time to initially grow but can be harvested repeatedly in a single lifespan.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Plant_Grape.label: grape plant
LanguageData.VFEM2_Arbalest.description: A powerful crossbow. Fires a heavy bolt over extreme distances, but takes a long time to cock it due to the need to use the cranequin.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Arbalest.label: arbalest
LanguageData.VFEM2_Arbalest.tools.0.label: limb
LanguageData.VFEM2_Arrow_Warbow.label: warbow arrow
LanguageData.VFEM2_Bolt_Arbalest.label: arbalest bolt
LanguageData.VFEM2_Bullet_Arquebus.label: arquebus grapeshot
LanguageData.VFEM2_Bullet_HandCannon.label: handcannon grapeshot
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_Arquebus.description: An ancient firearm with a smoothbore barrel, the arquebus delivers powerful shots at decent range. The lead balls lose velocity and damage with distance, and are extremely ineffective against armor. Due to the chempowder reaction when firing the arquebus, plumes of blindsmoke are ejected from the barrel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_Arquebus.label: arquebus
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_Arquebus.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_Arquebus.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_HandCannon.description: An ancient crude but deadly firearm, the hand cannon fires a devastating grapeshot over a short distance. The lead balls lose velocity and damage with distance, and are extremely ineffective against armor. Due to the chempowder reaction when firing the arquebus, plumes of blindsmoke are ejected from the barrel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_HandCannon.label: hand cannon
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_HandCannon.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_HandCannon.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.VFEM2_ThrowingAxe.description: A single-handed axe made for throwing. Light enough to be thrown accurately at medium range, it's also a great melee weapon in the hands of a capable warrior.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ThrowingAxe.label: throwing axe
LanguageData.VFEM2_ThrowingAxe.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VFEM2_ThrowingAxe.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.VFEM2_Warbow.description: A powerful, long variant of the greatbow. While it doesn’t excel at hitting nearby enemies, arrows fired from the warbow curve over walls and can be fired without requiring line of sight.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Warbow.label: warbow
LanguageData.VFEM2_Warbow.tools.0.label: limb
LanguageData.VFEM2V_ThrowingAxe_Thrown.label: thrown axe
LanguageData.VFEM2_Shield_Heater.description: A heavy medium-sized steel shield. Offers a significant amount of protection against melee and ranged attacks.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Shield_Heater.label: heater shield
LanguageData.VFEM2_Shield_Round.description: A wooden shield held together with a metal band. A leather strap and metal handle are also present on the back to allow for easy one-handed maneuvering during combat.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Shield_Round.label: round shield
LanguageData.VCE_ElectricHauteSection.description: An electrically-powered state-of-the-art culinary station, designed for precision cooking and artful meal presentation.
LanguageData.VCE_ElectricHauteSection.label: electric haute section
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.0.name: Tray
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.1.name: Cuttlery
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.2.name: Plate
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.3.name: Drizzle
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.4.name: Ingredient1
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.5.name: Ingredient2
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.6.name: Ingredient3
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.description: An opulent symphony of flavor and form, where the finest ingredients and masterful technique unite in a transcendent culinary masterpiece. Provides exquisite mood when eaten, and ensures that colonists eating it together will form strong opinions of each other.
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.label: haute meal
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoHeavyHelmet.descriptio: A heavy, high-powered helmet complete with an embedded HUD system and diagnostics display. It's theorized that either a long-lost or far-advanced civilizations shock troopers would adorn this helmet before strike missions during the mechanoid wars. The helmet itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoHeavyHelmet.label: heavy crypto helmet
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoLightHelmet.descriptio: A lower-powered helmet with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth hood. It's theorized that either a long-lost or far-advanced civilizations scout troopers would adorn this helmet before recon missions during the mechanoid wars. The helmet itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoLightHelmet.label: crypto helmet
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoArmor.description: Low-powered plasteel carapace armor draped with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth sash affixed over one shoulder, the armor emits a low electrical hum and feels smooth to the touch. The power supply itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow one's bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoArmor.label: crypto armor
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoHeavyArmor.description: Heavy, high-powered plasteel plate armor affixed with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth cowl, the armor emits a low electrical hum and feels smooth to the touch. The power supply itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoHeavyArmor.label: heavy crypto armor
LanguageData.VQE_UnfinishedCryptoArmor.description: An unfinished piece of metal armor.
LanguageData.VQE_UnfinishedCryptoArmor.label: unfinished crypto armor
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenEmptyCryptosleepPod.descriptio: An old cryptosleep pod that has been opened. Whatever was inside is long gone.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenEmptyCryptosleepPod.label: empty ancient cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFadingCryptosleepPod.descripti: A heavily damaged cryptosleep pod that is barely functioning. The occupant inside is still alive but in danger.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFadingCryptosleepPod.label: fading cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFailedCryptosleepPod.descripti: A cryptosleep pod that suffered a critical failure. The occupant inside is long dead and most likely turned into dust.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFailedCryptosleepPod.label: failed cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShipLandingBeacon.description: A rusted ship landing beacon, still flickering with an ancient, failing signal. No ship will ever respond.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShipLandingBeacon.label: ancient ship landing beacon
LanguageData.VQE_AncientTransmitterBeacon.description: A long-dead transmission beacon. Any components of value have long been removed.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientTransmitterBeacon.label: acient transmitter beacon
LanguageData.VQE_BustedShieldedTurret.description: An old, busted turret equipped with its own ballistic shield capable of deflecting some shots. Now, it’s little more than scrap metal.
LanguageData.VQE_BustedShieldedTurret.label: busted shielded turret
LanguageData.VQE_BustedSpacerAutocannon.description: An ancient autocannon designed for ship-to-ship combat. Its barrel is shattered, and its targeting systems are fried.
LanguageData.VQE_BustedSpacerAutocannon.label: busted spacer autocannon
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoAncientTerminal.description: An ancient computer terminal. It’s disconnected from power, or simply not working.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoAncientTerminal.label: ancient terminal
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoAncientTerminalBank.descriptio: An ancient set of computer terminals. It’s disconnected from power, or simply not working.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoAncientTerminalBank.label: ancient terminal bank
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCapacitor.description: A small, frost-covered energy capacitor. It no longer holds any residual charge.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCapacitor.label: frozen capacitor
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCapacitorLarge.description: A large, frost-covered energy capacitor. It no longer holds any residual charge.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCapacitorLarge.label: large frozen capacitor
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptoRailcannon.description: A cutting-edge railcannon encased in ice. It has been salvaged beyond usefulness.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptoRailcannon.label: frozen crypto railcannon
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFuelTank.description: A frozen-over fuel tank, potentially filled with cryptofuel back in the day, now cracked and empty.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFuelTank.label: frozen fuel tank
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLifeSupport.description: A collapsed life support module, its systems dead and displays shattered. No air will flow through it again.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLifeSupport.label: frozen life support
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMachinery.description: A tangle of ancient machinery, too damaged by frost and impact to be of any use.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMachinery.label: frozen machinery
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMechanoidShell.description: A frozen shell from a smashed mechanoid. It has been frozen for generations and the useful components have disintegrated.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMechanoidShell.label: frozen mechanoid shell
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMinefieldSign.description: A half-buried warning sign, encased in ice. It reads: "DANGER - ACTIVE MINEFIELD," but no mines can be seen.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMinefieldSign.label: frozen minefield sign
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipConsole.description: A standard ship control console, now frozen and non-functional.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipConsole.label: frozen ship console
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenSkyripper.description: A high-altitude fighter jet, frozen and rusted beyond repair. Whatever battles it once fought are long forgotten.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenSkyripper.label: frozen skyripper
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenSmallShipConsole.description: A compact ship control panel, now frozen and non-functional.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenSmallShipConsole.label: frozen small ship console
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenThrusters.description: A set of smaller ship thrusters, now frozen solid and useless.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenThrusters.label: frozen thrusters
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoBay.description: A torpedo storage bay, frozen shut. Its launch systems are irreparably damaged.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoBay.label: frozen torpedo bay
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoCrate.description: A sealed crate containing volatile torpedoes. A single shot could turn it into a catastrophic explosion.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoCrate.label: frozen torpedo crate
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoLauncher.description: A large torpedo launcher, its firing mechanisms locked under a thick layer of ice.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoLauncher.label: frozen torpedo launcher
LanguageData.VQE_LargeFrozenThrusters.description: A colossal set of frozen thrusters from the cryptoforge ship. They will never fire again.
LanguageData.VQE_LargeFrozenThrusters.label: large frozen thrusters
LanguageData.VQE_RuinedHospitalBed.description: A rusted-out bedframe, with a decently intact bedsheet. It offers little comfort.
LanguageData.VQE_RuinedHospitalBed.label: rusted ancient bed
LanguageData.VQE_SpentCryptofusionCoil.description: A depleted cryptofuel coil. Completely spent, it’s just another useless relic.
LanguageData.VQE_SpentCryptofusionCoil.label: spent cryptofusion coil
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenHive.description: A hive of giant insects, twisted by exposure to the crypto particles. If activated, it will spawn additional insects and hives over time, as well as valuable insect jelly.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenHive.label: frozen hive
LanguageData.VQE_BlueprintsBench.description: An old bench covered in pristine blueprints. Studying them could provide a rare burst of crafting inspiration.
LanguageData.VQE_BlueprintsBench.label: ancient blueprints bench
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyBlueprintsBench.description: A pile of faded and illegible blueprints. Whatever knowledge they once held has long since faded away.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyBlueprintsBench.label: useless blueprints bench
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyFrozenCrate.description: An empty crate, rusted and frozen solid. Its contents are long gone.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyFrozenCrate.label: empty frozen crate
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyFrozenCrate_Small.description: A frost-covered box that once contained something valuable. Now, it’s just junk.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyFrozenCrate_Small.label: frozen box
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCrateOfMedicine.description: A frozen crate containing medical supplies. The subzero temperatures have kept them well-preserved.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCrateOfMedicine.label: frozen crate of medicine
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCrateOfRations.description: A supply crate filled with survival rations, flash-frozen in the wreckage. The food inside should still be edible.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCrateOfRations.label: frozen crate of rations
LanguageData.VQE_GoldPile.description: A scattered pile of ancient gold coins, each stamped with cryptic serial codes. Their value is entirely theoretical - until someone decides otherwise.
LanguageData.VQE_GoldPile.label: gold pile
LanguageData.VQE_HugeTwistedMetal.description: A huge mangled piece of metal, twisted from the sheer force of the cryptoforge spaceship crash. Some steel can still be salvaged.
LanguageData.VQE_HugeTwistedMetal.label: huge twisted metal
LanguageData.VQE_LargeTwistedMetal.description: A large mangled piece of metal, twisted from the sheer force of the cryptoforge spaceship crash. Some steel can still be salvaged.
LanguageData.VQE_LargeTwistedMetal.label: large twisted metal
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedAdvancedComponents.descriptio: A pile of severely damaged high-tech components. While the original function is lost, some usable advanced components can still be extracted.
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedAdvancedComponents.label: twisted advanced components
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedComponents.description: A warped collection of machinery and circuits. While the original function is lost, some usable components can still be extracted.
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedComponents.label: twisted components
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedMetal.description: A mangled piece of metal, twisted from the sheer force of the cryptoforge spaceship crash. Some steel can still be salvaged.
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedMetal.label: twisted metal
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedPlasteel.description: A crumpled sheet of plasteel, scorched and bent beyond recognition. With enough effort, some of it could be salvaged.
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedPlasteel.label: twisted plasteel
LanguageData.VQE_CryptofusionCoil.description: A small coil that converts cryptofuel into power. Despite its age, it still operates at minimal capacity.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptofusionCoil.label: cryptofusion coil
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptogenerator.label: frozen cryptogenerator
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptogenerator_Off.descriptio: An advanced generator that once powered cryptotech devices. Now, it hums faintly with dying energy. It can be restarted to once again provide power to the various subsystems, but the permanent damage to the critical component will cause the generator to become more and more unstable, eventually detonating in a devastating cryptoexplosion.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptogenerator_Off.label: frozen cryptogenerator
LanguageData.VQE_AetherPressureTubes.description: A network of reinforced tubes that once regulated high-density ether coolant, allowing the cryptoforge to function at peak efficiency. The technology behind it is now lost.
LanguageData.VQE_AetherPressureTubes.label: aether pressure tubes
LanguageData.VQE_AncientCryptoforge.description: An ancient workbench designed for crafting advanced crypto-technology weapons and armor. It features intricate mechanisms and a forging process that seems to defy conventional metallurgy. The tools and technology integrated into it are beyond modern understanding, utilizing encrypted blueprints and precision-tuned nano-assembly techniques.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientCryptoforge.label: ancient cryptoforge
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoInfusionCoils.description: These coils once channeled encrypted energy pulses to refine and enhance crypto-tech materials. Without a working power source, they are just intricate, useless relics.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoInfusionCoils.label: crypto infusion coils
LanguageData.VQE_CryptotechPrototypeBench.description: A specialized workbench used to design and iterate new crypto-tech blueprints. The trial and error carefully documented in the blueprints and prototypes is bound to speed up the work done on the cryptoforge greatly.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptotechPrototypeBench.label: cryptotech prototype bench
LanguageData.VQE_SubZeroHammer.description: A massive forging hammer designed to shape materials at near absolute zero, strengthening them beyond conventional limits. Now, it’s little more than an oversized chunk of frozen scrap.
LanguageData.VQE_SubZeroHammer.label: sub-zero hammer
LanguageData.VQE_AncientBlackBox.description: A ship's black box recorder, filled with encrypted data. Given enough time, a skilled hacker may be able to extract critical information about what transpired.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientBlackBox.label: ancient black box
LanguageData.VQE_AncientBlackBox_Off.description: A ship's black box recorder. Any important information has already been downloaded, and the black box is nothing but junk.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientBlackBox_Off.label: disabled ancient black box
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScanningRelay.description: A long-range scanning relay with some old alerts about an important event. If one was to initiate a scan, the location of a ship crash will be revealed. Initiating the scan will generate a strong enough power signature to attract a mechanoid hive.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScanningRelay.label: frozen scanning relay
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScanningRelay_Off.description: A long-range scanning relay. Any notifications and data has been removed, and it’s nothing but a big hunk of junk.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScanningRelay_Off.label: disabled frozen scanning relay
LanguageData.VQE_AncientWargamingTable.description: An ancient, slightly rusted, sturdy table designed for strategic miniature wargames, featuring a spacious surface for terrain, armies, and battle plans. The diplomacy required by the rules trains social skill.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientWargamingTable.label: ancient wargaming table
LanguageData.VQE_AncientLandmine.description: An ancient, high-explosive payload connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. It’s impossible to detect it until triggered.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientLandmine.label: ancient landmine
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret.description: A portable automatic turret with a ballistic shield in front of it. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire. The ballistic shield is capable of deflecting some shots.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret.label: ancient shielded turret
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Bullet.label: mini-turret bullet
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Gun.descriptio: A simple automatic gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Gun.label: ancient shielded turret
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon.description: An ancient autocannon designed for ship-to-ship combat. It still appears to be functional. Its large-caliber shells do heavy damage over significant ranges.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon.label: ancient spacer autocannon
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon_Bullet.label: ancient spacer autocannon shell
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon_Gun.label: ancient spacer autocannon
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCentipede.description: A frozen shell containing a centipede.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years. Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCentipede.label: frozen centipede
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLancer.description: A frozen shell containing a lancer.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years. Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLancer.label: frozen lancer
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScyther.description: A frozen shell containing a scyther.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years. Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScyther.label: frozen scyther
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock.label: ancient airlock
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock_Large.description: A large, heavily reinforced airlock door. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock_Large.label: ancient large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. It has been forced open and cannot be closed again.
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock.label: forced ancient airlock
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock_Large.descripti: A heavily reinforced large airlock door. It has been forced open and cannot be closed again.
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock_Large.label: forced ancient large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_FragileFrozenShipHull.description: An impassable ship hull wall. The cracks and damage from the crash allow it to be destroyed. Capable of holding up a roof.
LanguageData.VQE_FragileFrozenShipHull.label: fragile frozen ship hull
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipHull.description: An impassable, indestructible ship hull wall. Capable of holding up a roof.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipHull.label: frozen ship hull
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. Due to malfunction or damage, it needs to be forced open. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock.label: stuck ancient airlock
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.comps.0.j: Force this ancient large airlock open
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.descripti: A large, heavily reinforced airlock door. Due to malfunction or damage, it needs to be forced open. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.label: stuck ancient large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_AncientFloorHeater.description: A large, outdated floor heater. If power is restored, it might still provide warmth.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientFloorHeater.label: ancient floor heater
LanguageData.VQE_SmallFlashfreezer.description: A floor-mounted vent that continuously releases near-absolute-zero air. It could freeze anything given enough time.
LanguageData.VQE_SmallFlashfreezer.label: small flashfreezer
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawler.description: A medium-sized bioengineered insectoid adapted for extreme cold. In frigid temperatures, razor-sharp blades emerge from its limbs, turning it into a swift and deadly predator. However, when exposed to warmth, the blades retract, and the creature becomes sluggish, its movements slow and cumbersome. Highly dangerous in icy environments but far less threatening when overheated.
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawler.label: ice crawler
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawler.tools.0.label: head claw
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawler.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.VQE_Megamidge.description: Not actually a midge, the megamidge is a genetically-engineered giant insectoid adapted for extreme cold. In freezing temperatures, deadly cryogenic blades extend from its limbs, allowing it to deliver devastating slashes that inflict deep wounds and crippling crypto slowdown. However, when exposed to warmth, its blades retract, and it becomes sluggish and far less dangerous. Agile and lethal in the cold, but vulnerable in heat.
LanguageData.VQE_Megamidge.label: megamidge
LanguageData.VQE_Megamidge.tools.0.label: head
LanguageData.VQE_Cryptofreeze.label: cryptofreeze
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSpark.label: cryptospark
LanguageData.VQE_Bullet_Cryptobolter.label: cryptobolter shot
LanguageData.VQE_MeleeWeapon_Cryptoaxe.description: A heavy, high-tech axe with a cryogenic-coated edge that delivers crushing strikes. On impact, it inflicts deep frostburns, flash-freezing flesh and lacing wounds with cryptofreeze, slowing movement and dealing substantial hypothermic damage over time.
LanguageData.VQE_MeleeWeapon_Cryptoaxe.label: cryptoaxe
LanguageData.VQE_MeleeWeapon_Cryptoaxe.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VQE_MeleeWeapon_Cryptoaxe.tools.1.label: edge
LanguageData.VQE_UnfinishedCryptoWeapon.label: unfinished crypto weapon
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.description: A high-tech crossbow rifle that fires cryogenic-coated bolts with devastating impact. On penetration, the bolts inflict deep frostburns, flash-freezing flesh and lacing wounds with cryptofreeze, drastically slowing movement and causing severe hypothermic damage over time.
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.label: cryptobolter
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.tools.2.label: barrel
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_Autopistol_Ancient.description: A battered, iron-framed sidearm from a long-forgotten army. Though its slide rattles and the finish is gone, it still fires reliably. Low stopping power and short range, but quick on the draw. Due to severe deterioration, this weapon can only fire a limited number of shots before breaking beyond repair.
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_Autopistol_Ancient.label: ancient autopistol
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_LMG_Ancient.description: An aging belt-fed light machine gun, covered in grime and stamped with the markings of a bygone military. Its recoil is harsh, and its accuracy poor, but the sheer volume of fire can pin down or shred groups of enemies when it holds together long enough to do so. Due to severe deterioration, this weapon can only fire a limited number of shots before breaking beyond repair.
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_LMG_Ancient.label: ancient LMG
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_LMG_Ancient.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_LMG_Ancient.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_MachinePistol_Ancient.descripti: A relic of early automatic handgun design, once issued to infantry officers. Its crude construction and worn parts limit accuracy, but its compact size and high fire rate give it surprising lethality in close quarters. Due to severe deterioration, this weapon can only fire a limited number of shots before breaking beyond repair.
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_MachinePistol_Ancient.label: ancient machine pistol
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_PumpShotgun_Ancient.description: A heavy, rust-pitted combat shotgun built for trench warfare. Fires a brutal spread of pellets at short range. Though cumbersome and slow to cycle, it remains deadly in confined spaces. Due to severe deterioration, this weapon can only fire a limited number of shots before breaking beyond repair.
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_PumpShotgun_Ancient.label: ancient shotgun
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsCap.description: A distinguished peaked cap with a stiff brim, adorned with embroidered insignia and a gilded band. While it offers little physical protection, its commanding design enhances the wearer's presence, greatly improving negotiation ability.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsCap.label: general’s cap
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsInsignia.descriptio: Decorative golden epaulettes adorned with braided aiguillette cord and a polished ceremonial clasp. Once worn by high-ranking officers, these insignia instill a sense of duty and composure, making the wearer less prone to mental breaks.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsInsignia.label: general's insignia
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_MilitaryCoat.description: A heavy military coat designed for harsh conditions, offering protection from cold, wind, and debris on the battlefield. Makes the wearer more confident. Since the coat has been mass-produced, individual items do not vary in quality at all.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_MilitaryCoat.label: military coat
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloDoor.description: A heavily reinforced door. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloDoor.label: ancient silo door
LanguageData.VQED_LockedSiloHatch.description: A sealed entrance to the deeper facility. Still structurally sound, but heavily pressurized. Can be forced open to allow access.
LanguageData.VQED_LockedSiloHatch.label: locked silo hatch
LanguageData.VQED_SiloExitStaircase.description: A vertical return route to the surface. Rarely used, but still passable.
LanguageData.VQED_SiloExitStaircase.label: silo exit staircase
LanguageData.VQED_SiloStaircase.description: A reinforced accessway to the lower levels. Coated in dust and stale air.
LanguageData.VQED_SiloStaircase.label: silo staircase
LanguageData.VQED_StuckAncientSiloDoor.comps.0.jobStr: Force this ancient silo door open
LanguageData.VQED_StuckAncientSiloDoor.description: A heavily reinforced door. Due to malfunction or damage, it needs to be forced open. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQED_StuckAncientSiloDoor.label: stuck ancient silo door
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPassiveLamp.description: A passive illumination device. Emits a faint glow thanks to decaying long-life cells.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPassiveLamp.label: ancient passive lamp
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloFloodlight.description: A high-output floodlight installed for emergency lighting. Dims rapidly without reliable power.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloFloodlight.label: ancient silo floodlight
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloLamp.description: A hard-wired light source installed in the facility. Still capable of emitting weak light.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloLamp.label: ancient silo lamp
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyAncientWeaponBox.description: A long, rotting wooden box that usually stores weapons. This one is empty.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyAncientWeaponBox.label: opened weapon box
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyMilitaryCrate.description: An empty, rusted military crate. Its contents are long gone.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyMilitaryCrate.label: empty military crate
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyMilitaryPallet.description: An empty military pallet. If it held anything of value, it’s gone now.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyMilitaryPallet.label: empty military pallet
LanguageData.VQED_EmptySmallMilitaryCrate.description: A small, rusted and empty military box. Anything of value is gone.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptySmallMilitaryCrate.label: empty military box
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfBioferrite.descripti: A rusted military crate, packed to the brim with bioferrite, extracted from some mysterious source by the ancient military.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfBioferrite.label: military crate of bioferrite
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfDeadlifeShells.descr: A rusted military crate with deadlife shells. These artillery shells are packed with a dust-like substance that, after exploding into a cloud, will settle on nearby human and animal corpses and raise them as shamblers. Many of those shells have lost their potency, but some may still work.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfDeadlifeShells.label: military crate of deadlife shells
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfGold.description: A rusted, military crate containing gold. The fact that the silo has been sealed for generations prevented it from being stolen.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfGold.label: military crate of gold
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfHemogen.description: A rusted military crate containing some old hemogen packs, mostly expired. With the right mindset, it’s possible to extract some hemogen packs from it.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfHemogen.label: military crate of hemogen
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfMedicine.description: A rusted military crate containing advanced glitterworld medicine. While some of it may no longer be usable, it’s possible to recover a few intact boxes from the crate.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfMedicine.label: military crate of medicine
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfSilver.description: A rusted, military crate containing silver. The fact that the silo has been sealed for generations prevented it from being stolen.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfSilver.label: military crate of silver
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfAdvancedCarParts.de: Precision vehicle parts, packed with extreme care. These components were never meant to be used lightly.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfAdvancedCarParts.la: military pallet of advanced car parts
A rare cache of precision-engineered components, carefully preserved for use in high-tech systems. Remarkably intact.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfApparel.description: A crate of old military coats. Despite torn fabric and weird smell, they seem usable.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfApparel.label: military pallet of apparel
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfBasicCarParts.descr: A stack of labeled vehicle components, built for standard-issue transport units. Light corrosion on outer frames.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfBasicCarParts.label: military pallet of basic car parts
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfBooks.description: A crate of old books, many military-issue. Pages are slightly warped but readable, filled with technical and tactical data.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfBooks.label: military pallet of books
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfChemfuel.descriptio: A heavily marked pallet of sealed chemfuel containers. The liquid inside sloshes with worrying consistency.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfChemfuel.label: military pallet of chemfuel
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfComponents.descript: A reinforced pallet of industrial-grade components. Each part seems to be untouched since storage.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfComponents.label: military pallet of industrial components
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfHEShells.descriptio: An ammunition pallet loaded with high-explosive artillery shells. Armed and dangerous.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfHEShells.label: military pallet of high-explosive shells
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfHyperweave.descript: A high-security fabric pallet containing rolls of hyperweave. The dense weave still resists tearing or decay.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfHyperweave.label: military pallet of hyperweave
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfIncendiaryShells.de: A cache of incendiary shells packed in insulated cases. Volatile, even after years of storage.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfMedicine.descriptio: Boxes of standard-issue medical supplies, sealed against decay. Some packaging shows wear, but the contents remain viable.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfMedicine.label: military pallet of medicine
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfPlasteel.descriptio: A tightly packed pallet of dense, lightweight plasteel. Still in usable condition.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfPlasteel.label: military pallet of plasteel
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfRations.description: Stacks of packaged survival meals, labeled for long-term emergency use. Still sealed, still edible. Probably.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfRations.label: military pallet of rations
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfSteel.description: A storage pallet stacked with steel beams. The metal shows signs of surface oxidation but remains structurally sound.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfSteel.label: military pallet of steel
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfSynthread.descripti: Rolls of synthetic fiber cloth wrapped and labeled for logistics. Faint chemical odor suggests it’s been stored for decades.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfSynthread.label: military pallet of synthread
LanguageData.VQED_MysteriousAncientWeaponBox.descript: A long, rotting wooden box that usually stores weapons. Can be opened, but there’s no way to tell what weapon is inside.
LanguageData.VQED_MysteriousAncientWeaponBox.label: mysterious weapon crate
LanguageData.VQED_SmallMilitaryCrateOfFlares.descript: A small, rusted military box. It seems to contain some valuable disruptor flares.
LanguageData.VQED_SmallMilitaryCrateOfFlares.label: military box of flares
LanguageData.VQED_SmallMilitaryCrateWithATome.descrip: A small, rusted military box. It seems to hold some creepy, ancient knowledge in the form of a tome.
LanguageData.VQED_SmallMilitaryCrateWithATome.label: military box with an ancient tome
LanguageData.VQED_AncientBurnoutGenerator.description: A compact generator built for short-term use. Needs to be kickstarted to work, and will only operate for a limited amount of time before it shuts down. It can then be kickstarted again.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientBurnoutGenerator.label: ancient burnout generator
LanguageData.VQED_IndustrialBurnoutGenerator.descript: A large emergency generator stored deep underground. Needs to be kickstarted to work, and will only operate for a limited amount of time before it shuts down. It can then be kickstarted again.
LanguageData.VQED_IndustrialBurnoutGenerator.label: industrial burnout generator
LanguageData.VQED_AncientFuelPipeline.description: A large fuel pipeline for transporting chemfuel. Now rusted and badly damaged.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientFuelPipeline.label: ancient fuel pipeline
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHawk.description: An old fighter jet stored for future conflict. Time and corrosion have rendered it inoperative.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHawk.label: ancient hawk
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHoldingPlatform.description: A reinforced platform meant to secure entities. The restraints are now inoperable.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHoldingPlatform.label: ancient holding platform
LanguageData.VQED_AncientLandship.description: A massive land vehicle stored for a peculiar purpose, perhaps for war. Its systems are dead and decayed.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientLandship.label: ancient landship
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryBox.description: A compact supply box once ready for emergency use. Now warped from decades of exposure.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryBox.label: ancient military box
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryCrate.description: A sealed storage crate from a military cache. The contents have degraded or fused shut.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryCrate.label: ancient military crate
LanguageData.VQED_AncientOminousMachinery.description: Complex equipment stored without documentation. Dust-clogged and inert after years of dormancy.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientOminousMachinery.label: ancient ominous machinery
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSpool.description: A large industrial spool for cabling or hose. Corrosion has rendered it brittle and unusable.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSpool.label: ancient spool
LanguageData.VQED_AncientTank.description: A preserved armored vehicle. Its electronics and hydraulics have deteriorated with age.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientTank.label: ancient tank
LanguageData.VQED_BuriedDeathPit.description: An old containment pit now completely covered in twisted metal and scrap, preventing anything that lied dormant inside from crawling out.
LanguageData.VQED_BuriedDeathPit.label: buried death pit
LanguageData.VQED_BustedMinigunTurret.description: An old turret housing torn open by heavy impacts. The weapon system inside is shattered and inert.
LanguageData.VQED_BustedMinigunTurret.label: busted minigun turret
LanguageData.VQED_BustedVehicleElevator.description: An old elevator platform designed to move heavy vehicles. Non-functional due to mechanical failure.
LanguageData.VQED_BustedVehicleElevator.label: busted vehicle elevator
LanguageData.VQED_DamagedTire.description: A spare tire stored too long in dry conditions. Its rubber has cracked and failed.
LanguageData.VQED_DamagedTire.label: damaged tire
LanguageData.VQED_DefunctTerminal.description: An ancient computer terminal. It’s disconnected from power, or simply not working.
LanguageData.VQED_DefunctTerminal.label: defunct terminal
LanguageData.VQED_DefunctTerminalBank.description: An ancient set of computer terminals. It’s disconnected from power, or simply not working.
LanguageData.VQED_DefunctTerminalBank.label: defunct terminal bank
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyAncientKennel.description: A large kennel that could hold several animals suspended in a deadlife dust-induced coma. It’s completely empty.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyAncientKennel.label: empty ancient kennel
LanguageData.VQED_LargeRottenCrate.description: A heavy-duty storage crate that has warped and splintered with time.
LanguageData.VQED_LargeRottenCrate.label: large rotten crate
LanguageData.VQED_MountainOfCasings.description: A mass of rusted ammunition debris. Abandoned after an unknown training or malfunction event.
LanguageData.VQED_MountainOfCasings.label: mountain of casings
LanguageData.VQED_OldShippingContainer.description: A heavy shipping container once locked down for safety. Hinges are fused shut from rust.
LanguageData.VQED_OldShippingContainer.label: old shipping container
LanguageData.VQED_OpenDeadlifeCasket.description: An ancient military casket that suspends a high ranking soldier using the deadlife particles. Whatever has lied inside is no longer there.
LanguageData.VQED_OpenDeadlifeCasket.label: empty deadlife casket
LanguageData.VQED_PileOfCasings.description: Old artillery casings swept into a pile. Likely remnants from storage-level live-fire testing.
LanguageData.VQED_PileOfCasings.label: pile of casings
LanguageData.VQED_RottenCrate.description: A wooden crate stored too close to moisture. It collapsed under its own weight.
LanguageData.VQED_RottenCrate.label: rotten crate
LanguageData.VQED_RuinedInhibitorLeft.description: A containment structure of unknown function. Critical systems have failed from prolonged inactivity.
LanguageData.VQED_RuinedInhibitorLeft.label: ruined large inhibitor (left)
LanguageData.VQED_RuinedInhibitorRight.description: A containment structure of unknown function. Critical systems have failed from prolonged inactivity.
LanguageData.VQED_RuinedInhibitorRight.label: ruined large inhibitor (right)
LanguageData.VQED_RustedAncientCot.description: A rusted-out military cot. It offers little comfort.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedAncientCot.label: rusted ancient cot
LanguageData.VQED_RustedBarrel.description: A sealed industrial barrel. Its contents long dried or evaporated.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedBarrel.label: rusted barrel
LanguageData.VQED_RustedImmobilizer.description: A vertical restraint frame with metal straps and dark stains. Whatever was held here didn’t leave willingly.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedImmobilizer.label: rusted immobilizer
LanguageData.VQED_RustedStepladder.description: A maintenance ladder placed here long ago. Metal fatigue has made it unsafe to use.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedStepladder.label: rusted stepladder
LanguageData.VQED_RustedToolbox.description: A heavy toolbox kept in reserve. The tools inside have fused with rust and dust.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedToolbox.label: rusted toolbox
LanguageData.VQED_TirePallet.description: An organized set of spare tires. Time has made them brittle and unsafe.
LanguageData.VQED_TirePallet.label: tire pallet
LanguageData.VQED_UnwrappedAncientTank.description: A preserved armored vehicle. Its electronics and hydraulics have deteriorated with age.
LanguageData.VQED_UnwrappedAncientTank.label: ancient tank
LanguageData.VQED_UselessScripPallet.description: A rotting pallet stacked with damp paper slips. Possibly currency, though their purpose is lost to time.
LanguageData.VQED_UselessScripPallet.label: useless scrip pallet
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveTerminal.description: An ancient computer terminal. It seems to still be connected to power, with some cryptic defensive protocols ready to be activated by a person in charge.
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveTerminal.label: active terminal
LanguageData.VQED_AncientDesk.description: An old military desk. Nothing useful remains on it.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientDesk.label: ancient desk
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKennel.description: A large kennel that could hold several animals suspended in a deadlife dust-induced coma. Seems secure enough, for now.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKennel.label: ancient kennel
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPlanningDesk.description: An old military desk containing battle maps and plans. Studying it may reveal the location of another ancient silo.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPlanningDesk.label: ancient planning desk
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedChute.description: A closed chute with an unknown purpose.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedChute.label: closed chute
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedDeadlifeCasket.description: An ancient military casket that suspends a high ranking soldier using the deadlife particles.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedDeadlifeCasket.label: closed deadlife casket
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedRotstinkVent.description: A large vent connected to some revolting storage of biomass. It seems to be shut off for now.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedRotstinkVent.label: closed rotstink vent
LanguageData.VQED_DormantMilitaryTurret.description: A dormant automatic turret. Belt-fed ammunition ensures it can fire continuously for long periods of time, but its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, which makes friendly fire likely. It seems to be inactive, for now.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_DormantMilitaryTurret.label: dormant military turret
LanguageData.VQED_EerieSarcophagus.description: A sealed black casket. It shows signs of internal pressure, but no visible access points.
LanguageData.VQED_EerieSarcophagus.label: eerie sarcophagus
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyEerieSarcophagus.label: empty eerie sarcophagus
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyICBMSilo.description: A missile cradle with no payload. Maintenance ports are sealed and fused.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyICBMSilo.label: empty ICBM silo
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMLaunchTerminal.description: An ancient set of computer terminals. The displays contain information about the preparation to launch a series of ICBMs containing deadlife payloads. Once the launch sequence is initiated, it cannot be stopped. It seems only the person in charge of the complex can initiate the launch.
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMLaunchTerminal.label: ICBM launch terminal
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMSiloLid.description: A solid lid designed to protect an armed warhead. The release system has seized.
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMSiloLid.label: ICBM silo lid
LanguageData.VQED_InactiveDeadlifeVent.description: A free standing vent connected to an underground deadlife particle distribution system. If it reactivates, it will quickly flood the area with deadlife dust.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_InactiveDeadlifeVent.label: inactive deadlife vent
LanguageData.VQED_InertDarkObelisk.description: A massive, jagged obelisk with no markings or visible seams. Its surface absorbs light unnaturally, and proximity induces headaches and unease. Though inert for now, occasional vibrations suggest it may not remain dormant forever.
LanguageData.VQED_InertDarkObelisk.label: inert dark obelisk
LanguageData.VQED_InertDarkPillar.description: A towering black pillar of unknown alloy. Though it appears inactive, it hums faintly with a deep, almost imperceptible resonance. The surrounding air feels heavier near it, and equipment readings often fail without reason. No obvious function can be determined, but its presence is deeply unsettling.
LanguageData.VQED_InertDarkPillar.label: inert dark pillar
LanguageData.VQED_InertDeathDoorway.description: A shadowed, monolithic doorway sealed into the structure itself. From within, thin streams of deadlife dust drift outward, defying airflow. No hinges, no mechanisms, only the sensation that something waits on the other side.
LanguageData.VQED_InertDeathDoorway.label: inert death doorway
LanguageData.VQED_LoadedICBMSilo.description: A still-intact missile lies inside this silo. No signs of activation or maintenance in decades.
LanguageData.VQED_LoadedICBMSilo.label: loaded ICBM silo
LanguageData.VQED_LockedICBMSilo.description: A silo hatch that never received a launch signal. The mechanism has since locked tight.
LanguageData.VQED_LockedICBMSilo.label: locked ICBM silo
LanguageData.VQED_SealedDeathPit.description: A sealed containment pit lined with ancient restraints. Faint trails of deadlife dust seep from the cracks, and something inside constantly shifts, pushing, scraping, trying to crawl free. Heavy blast doors prevent the darkness from reaching out, but the mechanism seems well maintained.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_SealedDeathPit.label: sealed death pit
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoProjector.description: An old projector unit positioned for use with a matching screen. Works when powered, but only if pointed at the kino screen.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoProjector.label: ancient kino projector
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoScreen.description: A massive, old-world display once used for communal viewing. Grainy visuals flicker to life only when paired with a functioning kino projector. Still strangely captivating despite the static and distortion.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoScreen.label: ancient kino screen
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveDeadlifeVent.description: A free standing vent connected to an underground deadlife particle distribution system. An endless supply of deadlife dust pours from the outflow.
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveDeadlifeVent.label: deadlife vent
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret.description: An automatic turret. Belt-fed ammunition ensures it can fire continuously for long periods of time, but its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, which makes friendly fire likely.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret.label: ancient military turret
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Bullet.label: mini-turret bullet
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Gun.descripti: A simple automatic gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Gun.label: ancient military turret
LanguageData.VQED_DeadlifeNode.description: A volatile node buried in the facility. Proximity or movement causes instability and discharge of deadlife particles.
LanguageData.VQED_DeadlifeNode.label: deadlife node
LanguageData.VQED_DeathHole.description: A small containment hole where failed experiments were thrown, with the intention to later on be buried in concrete. Faint trails of deadlife dust seep out, and something inside constantly shifts, pushing, scraping, trying to crawl free.
LanguageData.VQED_DeathHole.label: death hole
LanguageData.VQED_DeathPit.description: A sealed containment pit lined with ancient restraints. Faint trails of deadlife dust seep from the cracks, and something inside constantly shifts, pushing, scraping, trying to crawl free.
LanguageData.VQED_DeathPit.label: death pit
LanguageData.VQED_OpenChute.description: An open chute with an unknown purpose. Some eerie sounds can be heard down below, but nobody knows how deep it goes.
LanguageData.VQED_OpenChute.label: chute
LanguageData.VQED_OpenRotstinkVent.description: A large vent connected to some revolting storage of biomass. Ejects huge amounts of rotstink gas.
LanguageData.VQED_OpenRotstinkVent.label: rotstink vent
LanguageData.VQE_DisruptorFlare.description: Plastic tubes filled with bioferrite. On impact, the flare burns, creating a bright flash and a local psychic disruption. This stuns psychically sensitive creatures, revealing those that are invisible, and reducing their consciousness and movement speed for a short while. Afterwards, the flare continues to burn, lighting up a wide area for some time.
LanguageData.VQE_DisruptorFlare.label: disruptor flare
LanguageData.VQE_DisruptorFlare.verbs.0.label: throw disruptor flare
LanguageData.VQED_DistantICBMExplosion.label: distant ICBM explosion
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMSkyfaller.label: deadlife ICBM
LanguageData.CashRegister_CashRegister.label: cash register
LanguageData.CashRegister_CashRegister.description: A cash register. Workplace for your waiters. From here you can control your restaurant.
LanguageData.Frame_CashRegister_CashRegister.label: cash register (blueprint)
LanguageData.Frame_CashRegister_CashRegister.descript: a cash register. workplace for your waiters. from here you can control your restaurant.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_DiningSpot.label: dining spot
LanguageData.TherapyCouch.label: therapy couch
LanguageData.TherapyCouch.description: A partially upholstered kind of bench, comfy enough to relax but not to fall asleep.
LanguageData.Blueprint_TherapyCouch.label: therapy couch (blueprint)
LanguageData.Frame_TherapyCouch.label: therapy couch (under construction)
LanguageData.Frame_TherapyCouch.description: A partially upholstered kind of bench, comfy enough to relax but not to fall asleep.
LanguageData.Mech_Waiter.description: A small mechanoid designed for waiting and hauling. It is slow. Lacking a ranged weapon, it can make only weak melee attacks.
LanguageData.Mech_Waiter.label: waiter
LanguageData.CashRegister_Mech.description: A spot for mechanoid waiters. From here you can control your restaurant.
LanguageData.CashRegister_Mech.label: autonomous cash register
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_OxygenPack.description: A utility pack containing a large supply of compressed oxygen. When worn with vacuum-sealed apparel, it provides full immunity to vacuum by supplying breathable air. The pack only consumes oxygen while in vacuum and must be periodically reloaded. It also dramatically reduces exposure to pollution through the lungs.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_OxygenPack.label: oxygen pack
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige.description: A protective suit that keeps the user safe in the vacuum of space. The suit restricts the wearer's movement, considerably reducing their movement speed.\n\nExpensive and beautiful, prestige vacsuits like this is usually made for those of high status in the royal navy. Embedded eltex threads also enhance the wearer's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige.label: prestige vacsuit
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_VacsuitHelmet_Prestige.descr: A helmet that efficiently recycles the user's oxygen, allowing them to breathe in the vacuum of space for hours at a time. The process isn't perfectly efficient, so the user must periodically return to a pressurized environment.\n\nExpensive and beautiful, prestige vacsuit helmet like this is usually made for those of high status in the royal navy. Embedded eltex threads also enhance the wearer's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_VacsuitHelmet_Prestige.label: prestige vacsuit helmet
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelDrain.description: A hopper-like storage structure meant to input astrofuel into the network, filling up connected tanks.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelDrain.label: astrofuel drain
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelGenerator.description: Produces power by consuming astrofuel. Much more efficient than chemfuel generators.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelGenerator.label: astrofuel generator
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelPipe.description: A large pipe for transporting high-grade astrofuel around. Unlike other pipes, it’s big, bulky, acts as cover and can’t be stood on. Astrofuel pipes can’t be placed on workbench interaction spots and in doorways.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelPipe.label: astrofuel pipe
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelSynthesizer.description: A specialized structure that refines chemfuel into high-grade astrofuel. It must be connected to the astrofuel pipe network and linked to at least one astrofuel tank to operate. Once connected, it automatically converts inserted chemfuel into astrofuel for use in engines and systems.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelSynthesizer.label: astrofuel synthesizer
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelTap.description: A hopper-like storage device meant to hold dispensed astrofuel for use later.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelTap.label: astrofuel tap
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelValve.description: Switches astrofuel flow on and off.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelValve.label: astrofuel valve
LanguageData.VGE_Astropurifier.description: A gravtech unit that enhances the precision and stability of astrofuel refinement. When placed next to an astrofuel synthesizer, it enables perfect 1:1 conversion from chemfuel to astrofuel, though the process takes twice as long.
LanguageData.VGE_Astropurifier.label: astropurifier
LanguageData.VGE_GiantAstrofuelTank.description: A monumental astrofuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship.
LanguageData.VGE_GiantAstrofuelTank.label: giant astrofuel tank
LanguageData.VGE_GiantThruster.description:
A massive, reinforced astrofuel thruster built with advanced alloys and ultra-dense vacstone plating. It massively increases the range and maximum size of the gravship. Thrusters require an unobstructed area free of large buildings and gravship substructure.

Requires vacstone blocks, which can be obtained from orbital asteroids.

A gravship can support up to four giant thrusters.
LanguageData.VGE_GiantThruster.label: giant thruster
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenAstrofuelPipe.description: A hidden, reinforced tube for transporting high-grade astrofuel around. While it’s not visible, it is much more expensive to construct.
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenAstrofuelPipe.label: hidden astrofuel pipe
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialAstrofuelGenerator.descrip: Produces a large amount of power by consuming astrofuel. Much more efficient than chemfuel generators.
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialAstrofuelGenerator.label: industrial astrofuel generator
LanguageData.VGE_Agrocell.description: An enclosed, space-efficient growing unit designed for use on gravships. Built into the floor for unobstructed movement, it features integrated sunlamps and a nutrient system that must remain powered, as plants will die if power is cut.
LanguageData.VGE_Agrocell.label: agrocell
LanguageData.VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.description: A small-sized box containing large uranium shells. Used by different gauss artillery turrets to reload. A box is fed directly into an adjacent gravship artillery when it needs to be reloaded.
LanguageData.VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.label: gauss shell ammo box
LanguageData.VGE_AnticraftCaster.description: A medium gravship-mounted energy weapon that fires short, razor-sharp bursts of cutting beam with surgical precision. Built to punch holes through critical systems, the caster trades sustained suppression for rapid, accurate strikes. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. Uses a lot of power to fire.
LanguageData.VGE_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster
LanguageData.VGE_Bullet_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster beam
LanguageData.VGE_Bullet_GaussGun.label: gauss gun shot
LanguageData.VGE_GaussGun.description: A small, single-barrel electromagnetic cannon that launches dense uranium slugs at extreme velocities. Designed for both local bombardments and medium-range engagements, it can also target other gravships in orbit. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GaussGun.label: gauss gun
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_GaussGun.label: gauss gun
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_JavelinPod.label: javelin pod
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_PointDefense.description: A rapid-fire gun for point-defense applications.
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_PointDefense.label: point defense gun
LanguageData.VGE_JavelinPod.description: A compact multi-tube missile platform that launches a volley of six guided astrofuel javelins. Meant for fast, hard-hitting strikes against exposed gravships and unarmored surface forces. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_JavelinPod.label: javelin pod
LanguageData.VGE_PointDefenseTurret.description: A specialized defensive turret built exclusively for gravships. It intercepts explosive projectiles and incoming drop pods within its protective radius, but cannot engage ground targets. Interception chance scales with the target’s velocity.
LanguageData.VGE_PointDefenseTurret.label: point defense turret
LanguageData.VGE_Rocket_JavelinRocket.label: javelin rocket
LanguageData.VGE_TargetingTerminal.description: A control station dedicated to operating a single gravship artillery piece. Requires a crew member to manually aim and fire the weapon. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_TargetingTerminal.label: targeting terminal
LanguageData.VGE_CompactGeneBank.description: A miniaturized version of the gene bank, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. It stores genepacks and makes them usable for creating new xenogerms when placed near a gene assembler. It draws power directly from the grav engine and prevents genepacks from deteriorating while slowly repairing deterioration.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactGeneBank.label: compact gene bank
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBasicRecharger.description: A miniaturized version of the mech recharger, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. Lightweight mechanoids can recharge here. During recharge, this recharger produces toxic wastepacks and stores them internally. Haulers must remove the wastepacks from time to time. It draws most of the power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBasicRecharger.label: compact mech recharger
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStandardRecharger.descriptio: A miniaturized version of the large mech recharger, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. Medium, heavy, and ultraheavy mechanoids can recharge here. During recharge, this recharger produces toxic wastepacks and stores them internally. Haulers must remove the wastepacks from time to time. It draws most of the power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStandardRecharger.label: compact large mech recharger
LanguageData.VGE_OperatorSubpersonaCore.description: A high-grade subcore specialized in gravship combat. It can link with a single gravship artillery piece and control it the same way a crewmember manning a targeting terminal can. It’s combat capabilities are subpar, but it allows for autonomous artillery batteries without the need for human operators.
LanguageData.VGE_OperatorSubpersonaCore.label: operator subpersona core
LanguageData.VGE_CompactDrugLab.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered drug lab designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it’s equipped with containers, heaters, and measurement devices for producing various drugs. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactDrugLab.label: compact drug lab
LanguageData.VGE_CompactFabBench.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered fabrication bench designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it’s equipped with advanced tools for producing technological marvels from simpler materials. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactFabBench.label: compact fabrication bench
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMachiningTable.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered machining table designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it’s ideal for assembling machinery like guns and ammunition, or breaking down dead mechanoids. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMachiningTable.label: compact machining table
LanguageData.VGE_CompactRefinery.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered biofuel refinery designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it refines biological matter like wood or plant matter into chemfuel. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactRefinery.label: compact biofuel refinery
LanguageData.VGE_CompactSmithy.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered smithy designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it can be used to smith non-mechanical weapons and tools, as well as extract usable metal from slag chunks. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactSmithy.label: compact smithy
LanguageData.VGE_CompactStove.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered stove designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it contains a high-efficiency cooktop and integrated prep surface, as well as a butchering slate. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactStove.label: compact stove
LanguageData.VGE_CompactTailor.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered tailor bench designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, this workbench comes with a sewing machine for rapid tailoring of clothes. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactTailor.label: compact tailor bench
LanguageData.VGE_WallToolCabinet.description: A wall-mounted version of a tool cabinet. Increases work speed when placed near a workbench. One workbench can use up to two tool cabinets.
LanguageData.VGE_WallToolCabinet.label: wall tool cabinet
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedGravExtender.description: This device once expanded a gravship’s build area, but it is now shattered. Some valuable parts can still be reclaimed.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedGravExtender.label: destroyed grav field extender
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedLargeThruster.description: This powerful thruster once pushed gravships across space, but now it lies broken. Even ruined, it holds some useful salvage.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedLargeThruster.label: destroyed large thruster
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallAstrofuelTank.descrip: This tank once stored astrofuel for thrusters, but it has been destroyed. Its frame still holds recoverable materials.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallAstrofuelTank.label: destroyed small astrofuel tank
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallHeatsink.description: This heatsink once cooled the gravship’s systems, but it has burned out. Some steel can still be recovered from the wreck.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallHeatsink.label: destroyed small heatsink
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallOxygenTank.descriptio: This tank once supplied oxygen to the gravship, but it’s now broken and useless. Some steel can still be salvaged from it.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallOxygenTank.label: destroyed small oxygen tank
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallThruster.description: This thruster once powered the gravship, but it is now wrecked beyond use. Scraps of metal and components can still be taken.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallThruster.label: destroyed small thruster
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedEscapePod.description: A crashlanded, damaged escape pod. Can be hacked open to reveal what's inside.
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedEscapePod.label: damaged escape pod
LanguageData.VGE_EscapePodSkyfaller.label: escape pod (incoming)
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkEngine.description:
The gravhulk is a colossal class of gravship, engineered to transport entire megacolonies, orbital platforms, or mobile city-cores across the skies of a planet. The grav engine generates lift by inverting and intensifying the effect of gravity in a field around itself. This engine can lift upwards, but does not produce forward thrust. It can't function far from a large gravity well like a planet, so it is useless for interplanetary travel.

When launched, anything on substructure that's connected to the grav engine will be transported to a new map.

Gravhulks are the pride of glitterworld infrastructure fleets, often used to deploy prefabricated settlements, floating arcologies, or deep-strata excavation hubs. Their sheer scale demands enormous production facilities and crew specialization, making them one of the rarest and most powerful gravships ever built.
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkEngine.label: gravhulk engine
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperEngine.description:
A compact gravtech engine designed for short-range jumps within a planet’s atmosphere. The gravjumper engine creates a brief, localized distortion in gravitational flow, allowing rapid vertical lift, but does not produce forward thrust. It can't function far from a large gravity well like a planet, so it is useless for interplanetary travel.

When launched, anything on substructure that's connected to the grav engine will be transported to a new map.

Often used by explorers, scouts, and smugglers, gravjumper engines are prized for their agility and minimal power requirements. They are simpler to produce than full gravship engines, but still rely on high-grade materials and advanced fabrication.
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperEngine.label: gravjumper engine
LanguageData.VGE_GravFieldAmplifier.description: An advanced ultratech device that dramatically increases the size of a gravship. It extends the area in which substructure can be built, and increases the amount of substructure that a gravship can support. Must be built near a grav engine. A gravship can support up to four grav field amplifiers.
LanguageData.VGE_GravFieldAmplifier.label: grav field amplifier
LanguageData.VGE_CommsTerminal.description: A compact version of a comms console that allows radio contact with other factions and orbital traders. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CommsTerminal.label: comms terminal
LanguageData.VGE_CrewBunkBed.description: A compact double-tiered bed designed for gravship use. Maximizes limited space by allowing two crew members to rest in the footprint of one bed.
LanguageData.VGE_CrewBunkBed.label: crew bunk bed
LanguageData.VGE_CrewLockers.description: A set of compact lockers designed for gravship crew quarters. Provides a small comfort bonus to all nearby bunk beds. Placing more than one locker near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.VGE_CrewLockers.label: crew lockers
LanguageData.VGE_FauxPlant.description: An artificial plant in a sturdy metal pot. It requires no light, water, or air, making it perfect for adding beauty to even the most inhospitable gravship environments.
LanguageData.VGE_FauxPlant.label: faux plant
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipShelf.description: A reinforced storage shelf designed for use aboard gravships. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipShelf.label: gravship shelf
LanguageData.VGE_MedbayBed.description: A specialized gravship bed equipped with an integrated vitals monitor. Designed for medbays, it improves medical outcomes over normal beds. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_MedbayBed.label: medbay bed
LanguageData.VGE_SealantGoop.description: A hardened mass of rapidly-expanding polymer foam. Produced by a sealant popper, it forms an airtight plug that seals breaches in gravship rooms exposed to vacuum. While effective at restoring pressure, it is brittle and easy to destroy.
LanguageData.VGE_SealantGoop.label: sealant goop
LanguageData.VGE_SealantPopper.description: When it detects vacuum levels above 25%, this safety device pops and releases a fast-expanding sealant goo. The substance quickly solidifies, sealing gaps and breaches to restore pressure in the room. Can also be triggered manually.
LanguageData.VGE_SealantPopper.label: sealant popper
LanguageData.VGE_WallFirefoamPopper.description: A wall-mounted variant of the firefoam popper. When it detects fire, it bursts and sprays fire-retardant foam in a circular area around itself. Can also be triggered manually.
LanguageData.VGE_WallFirefoamPopper.label: wall firefoam popper
LanguageData.VGE_WallOrbitalTradeBeacon.description: A wall-mounted version of an orbital trade beacon, required for orbital trading. You can only sell goods to orbital traders if they're near an orbital trade beacon. Can be placed indoors.
LanguageData.VGE_WallOrbitalTradeBeacon.label: wall orbital trade beacon
LanguageData.VGE_CopilotConsole.description: An auxiliary interface that allows a copilot to assist in launching and piloting a gravship. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CopilotConsole.label: copilot console
LanguageData.VGE_PilotBridge.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravhulk. It draws power directly from the gravhulk engine.
LanguageData.VGE_PilotBridge.label: pilot bridge
LanguageData.VGE_PilotCockpit.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravjumper. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_PilotCockpit.label: pilot cockpit
LanguageData.VGE_GravheatAbsorber.description: A specialized thermal sink that draws all residual heat from the grav engine, instantly clearing its cooldown. The absorbed heat leaves the gravheat absorber inoperable for an extended period while it safely dissipates the stored energy. Furthermore, the specialized design provides protection from the heat of solar flares encountered in space, preventing excessive heat from bleeding into the gravship's interior.
LanguageData.VGE_GravheatAbsorber.label: gravheat absorber
LanguageData.VGE_LargeHeatsink.description: A large thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine cooldown duration. A gravship can support up to six large heatsinks.
LanguageData.VGE_LargeHeatsink.label: large heatsink
LanguageData.VGE_SmallHeatsink.description: A compact thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine cooldown duration. A gravship can support up to ten small heatsinks.
LanguageData.VGE_SmallHeatsink.label: small heatsink
LanguageData.VGE_CompactBiosculpterPod.description: A miniaturized version of the biosculpter pod, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship.
